title: eCommerce Growth Executive
description:
Own Category Growth, Optimize Performance, and Expand Market Dominance.



Hadley Designs is seeking an eCommerce Growth Executive to take full ownership of a multi-million dollar product category, with Amazon as the primary growth channel. This is a high-impact role for a results-driven e-commerce operator who thrives on ownership, accountability, and driving measurable growth through disciplined execution and data-backed decision-making.



While this role operates deeply within Amazon, we welcome candidates who have driven growth across e-commerce, DTC, or marketplace environments and are excited to apply that experience within a scaled Amazon ecosystem.



How You’ll Win at Hadley Designs:

We believe performance comes from strong systems executed consistently.



Every eCommerce Growth Executive is expected to progress through three stages:



- Learn the Playbook – Understand our category strategy, operating standards, and decision frameworks

- Apply the Playbook – Execute accurately and consistently to deliver predictable, scalable results

- Enhance the Playbook – Improve systems with new ideas and strategies after mastery is demonstrated



This order matters. We value innovation, but only when it is grounded in proven execution. Our playbook exists to help high performers win faster, create leverage, and scale impact — not slow them down.



To formally apply, apply HERE:

title: eCommerce Virtual Executive
description:
Help Keep a Fast-Growing eCommerce Business Running Smoothly!



Hadley Designs is seeking a Virtual Executive to support core operational functions across the business. This role is designed for dependable, detail-oriented support professionals who thrive in structured environments and take ownership of clearly defined responsibilities.



You will own specific processes within one or more functional areas and be trusted to execute them accurately, consistently, and on time with minimal oversight. This role emphasizes reliability, follow-through, and clear accountability within defined responsibilities.



Over time, you will also contribute to improving workflows and documentation within your scope, helping strengthen operational consistency as the business grows.



What You’ll Be Responsible For:

- Depending on your background and strengths, responsibilities may include:

- Customer support and order management

- Account health monitoring and basic reporting

- Inventory tracking and light supply chain coordination

- Data entry, reconciliation, and system updates

- Basic accounting or finance support

- Maintaining SOPs and internal documentation

- Executing assigned processes accurately and consistently while identifying issues early and proposing solutions



Are you ready to make an impact in a thriving eCommerce company? Apply here:

description:
Own Category Growth, Optimize Performance, and Expand Market Dominance.



Hadley Designs is seeking an eCommerce Growth Executive to take full ownership of a multi-million dollar product category, with Amazon as the primary growth channel. This is a high-impact role for a results-driven e-commerce operator who thrives on ownership, accountability, and driving measurable growth through disciplined execution and data-backed decision-making.



While this role operates deeply within Amazon, we welcome candidates who have driven growth across e-commerce, DTC, or marketplace environments and are excited to apply that experience within a scaled Amazon ecosystem.



How You’ll Win at Hadley Designs:

We believe performance comes from strong systems executed consistently.



Every eCommerce Growth Executive is expected to progress through three stages:



- Learn the Playbook – Understand our category strategy, operating standards, and decision frameworks

- Apply the Playbook – Execute accurately and consistently to deliver predictable, scalable results

- Enhance the Playbook – Improve systems with new ideas and strategies after mastery is demonstrated



This order matters. We value innovation, but only when it is grounded in proven execution. Our playbook exists to help high performers win faster, create leverage, and scale impact — not slow them down.



To formally apply, apply HERE:

title: Executive Assistant to the CEO
description:
We’re searching for an experienced assistant to execute on day-to-day activities, administrative tasks, and special projects for our CEO.

This position touches every corner of the CEO’s life and business, which means the right person will have a passion for coming alongside the CEO and putting the infrastructure in place to bring his big vision into reality.

It’s a big role, and we need someone who has the ability to ramp up quickly when it comes to new information and learning new things. Therefore, we’re looking for someone with deep career ambitions as an assistant to the CEO and someone who truly believes in the value of this role as their calling.



Projects for you might include:

• Acting as the liaison between the CEO and his team-leaders across multiple businesses,

• Owning the logistics of important personal purchases

• Being the point person for the lawyers, partners, accountants, and more

• Coordinating travel arrangements

•Managing his calendar and inbox



Among many, many other things.



Over time, the goal is that you’ll become an extension of our CEO by having the ability to anticipate his needs, see around the corner, and remember things before he does. Because of this, the ability to build trust quickly is critical. We desire a high level of professionalism, confidentiality, discretion and judgement, in both written and verbal communication.



Who exactly are we looking for?



In short, does this sound like you? Someone that is a(n):

• Communicator: You have excellent written and verbal communication.

• Trustworthy: A professional with a high level of discretion and honesty.

• Adaptable and Detail-Oriented: Able to work in a fast-paced environment and keep up with a proactive employer who has a clear vision and high standards.

• Dedicated and Reliable: Committed to the role personally, managing tasks independently without delegating to external teams.

• Experienced and Confident: Possesses the experience to manage priorities effectively, while confidently setting boundaries when necessary.

• Assertive and Professional: Able to communicate clearly and maintain professional boundaries, ensuring tasks are completed in a manner that aligns with both comfort and quality standards.



Why you?



As a minimum, you have:

• You have at least 1+ years of experience supporting a CEO or executive in the past. This is a must in this role, as you’ll be able to pattern match previous experiences and understand everyday shifting tasks and priorities are inherent in supporting an executive.

• You can hold your own. You make decisions decisively, and are able to take very direct feedback.

• You are a rock-solid communicator. Your present information clearly and with no errors, whether that is in written or verbal communication.

• You’re highly-adaptable and flexible, as this role is ever changing in its nature as new projects come to light as such.

• You’ll be contributing to projects related to finance and legal elements, so a strong appetite and experience in financial and legal literacy is desired.

• You thrive in fast-paced environments, with tight deadlines, with a rigorous eye for detail and accuracy

• You take a lot of pride in your outcomes, whether that’s booking just the right dinner reservation, or facilitating the final signing on a business acquisition.



To provide, more insight, the role may include, but is not limited to the following tasks:

• Meeting with the executive on a regular basis

• Compiling daily reports and communications so you can stay on the same page

• Manage and update the executive’s calendar, including scheduling meetings, patient-related appointments, internal check-ins, and personal events

• Coordinate travel, lodging, and itineraries for conferences, seminars, and events

• Screen, prioritize, and respond to
s, messages, and calls on behalf of the executive

• Draft, proofread, and send communications, memos, and announcements

• Prepare agendas, meeting materials, and presentations for leadership or tea
etings

• Take meeting notes and ensure follow-up on action items and deadlines

• Track and submit executive’s expense reports and reconcile clinic-related credit card charges

• Assist with budget tracking and light bookkeeping support for the executive’s initiatives

• Organize and maintain digital and physical files, records, and clinic documents

• Handle confidential information with discretion and ensure HIPAA compliance when needed

• Coordinate projects across departments and support clinic-wide initiatives

• Liaise with vendors, partners, and contractors, including medical equipment reps and service providers

• Prepare reports or dashboards for clinic metrics, KPIs, and executive summaries

• Manage follow-up communications with clinic partners

• Plan and coordinate team events, off sites, and leadership retreats

• Monitor and streamline executive workflows and proactively solve logistical bottlenecks

• Maintain clinic licenses, renewals, contracts, and other compliance documents as needed

• Anticipate needs and handle tasks without requiring detailed direction



Tech Requirements:

• Computer – Minimum i5 processor (or equivalent) with at least 8GB RAM.

• Internet Speed – Minimum 100 MBPS Download Speed, preferably with a backup connection to ensure uninterrupted work.



Schedule:

• Full time, 12:00PM to 8:00PM Pacific Time Zone

• Monday to Saturday



Pay:

• $1,000 - $1300 USD/month



Hiring Process:

• Phone Interview

• Cognitive Assessment

• Executive Practical (2 hours)

• Interview with the Executive

• Hiring Decision Made and Communicated



How to Apply:

• Please include a link to your resume and share a few paragraphs on why you would be a great fit for this role. Thank you.

title: ONSITE- Sales Operations Manager ( CSR Team Lead- Reservations  & Sales)
description:
We are looking for a Sales Operations Manager to oversee the daily operations of our call center supporting restaurant clients, ensuring smooth coordination across reservations, customer service, and sales. This role includes managing the CSR reservation team, assisting clients with operational needs, monitoring key performance metrics, and driving continuous improvement. The manager will also develop and implement sales strategies, support team performance, and handle escalated guest concerns. The ideal candidate has experience in operations, sales, or BPO environments, with strong leadership and performance management skills.



Key Responsibilities:



*Own and manage daily operations of the call center, ensuring smooth execution across reservations, customer service, and sales activities

*Oversee and lead the CSR reservation team, including team leaders and agents, ensuring productivity, accountability, and service excellence

*Act as a primary point of contact for client concerns, providing timely support, updates, and solutions to operational issues

*Monitor and analyze key performance metrics (KPIs) such as call quality, conversion rates, service levels, and customer satisfaction, and drive continuous improvement

*Develop and implement sales strategies and outbound initiatives to support restaurant client growth and revenue targets

*Ensure accurate and efficient reservation management across phone,
, and booking platforms

*Handle escalated guest concerns, ensuring prompt, professional resolution and a positive customer experience

*Collaborate closely with restaurant partners to align on operations, promotions, and reservation requirements

*Build and refine processes, workflows, and training programs to improve efficiency and team performance

*Maintain and present performance reports on sales, reservations, and operational metrics



Qualifications:



*Proven experience in operations, sales, or BPO leadership roles

*Strong background in managing daily operations and leading frontline teams in a call center environment

*Experience overseeing reservation, customer service, or sales teams

*Solid understanding of KPIs, performance monitoring, and reporting

*Demonstrated ability to develop and execute sales strategies

*Strong problem-solving skills with experience handling client and guest escalations

*Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills

*Highly organized with strong attention to detail

*Professional, proactive, and solutions-oriented mindset



What we can offer:



?Competitive salary and performance-based incentives.



?Opportunities for professional growth and development.



?Supportive and collaborative work environment.



**Kindly include/send your updated resume**

title: GHL Certified Admin with Make.com Experience
description:
What This Role Is

Gracchus Partners builds growth systems for businesses that are serious about revenue. GoHighLevel is our execution layer — the platform where strategy becomes automation, follow-up becomes consistent, and client systems run without manual intervention.

We need a certified GHL admin who builds things that work the first time, documents what they build, and understands that a workflow is only as good as the business outcome it produces. This is not a "set it and forget it" role. It's a "build it right, then scale it" role.



Starts Part time and will move to Full time as we Scale



What You'll Do



Build and maintain GHL funnels, landing pages, and forms for client onboarding and lead capture

Design, build, and test multi-step automation workflows — lead follow-up, appointment reminders, nurture sequences, pipeline stage triggers

Configure and manage GHL sub-accounts for individual client deployments

Create automation snapshots that can be deployed across multiple client accounts

Integrate GHL with third-party tools including 
, Zapier, Stripe, and webhooks to extend workflow capability beyond native GHL functions

Audit existing workflows for logic gaps, missed triggers, and drop-off points

Document every build — what it does, why it was built, and how to modify it

Communicate build status and blockers clearly without being asked


 AI employee set up experience





What You Must Have



GoHighLevel certification — required, not negotiable

Proven builds: funnels, forms, and multi-branch automation workflows in production environments

Working knowledge of GHL's pipeline management, conversation routing, and trigger logic

Ability to translate a business process (sales follow-up, client onboarding, appointment booking) into an automated workflow without a step-by-step spec

Strong attention to conditional logic — if/then branches, wait steps, goal completions

Clean written communication. You'll be interfacing with clients and internal stakeholders.





What Sets You Apart



You've built and deployed reusable GHL snapshots across multiple sub-accounts

You can build multi-step 
 scenarios that connect GHL to external platforms — and know when Make is the right tool versus native GHL automation

You understand the difference between a workflow that fires and a workflow that converts

You've worked inside a marketing agency or SaaS environment running GHL at scale

You can spot a broken funnel from a conversion rate, not just a failed trigger

You think in systems, not tasks





Compensation

Commensurate with experience. Performance upside available as the firm scales.



To Apply

Send your résumé and a screenshot or Loom of a GHL funnel  build you're proud of.

Not a list of tools you know. Not a description of what you "can" do.

Show the build. Walk us through what it does, what business problem it solves, and what you'd do differently if you rebuilt it today. That's the filter. It tells us more than any résumé line ever will.

Generic applications are not reviewed.

title: Customer Support Specialist
description:
***Applicants who have supported school management, scheduling, or other education technology platforms will be prioritized.***



Role Summary:

We are looking for a Customer Support Specialist who will serve as the first point of contact for our customers. In this role, you will provide real-time support for our platform, resolve customer issues, and ensure a smooth experience for our users.



You will work closely with the Customer Success Managers during the implementations and collaborate with internal teams to improve the overall support experience. You will also help identify recurring support trends and share insights with our Product and Engineering teams to help improve the platform.



As we continue to grow, you will play an important role in helping shape and improve our support processes.



Primary Responsibilities:

• Manage and respond to daily support tickets.

• Provide clear, professional, and timely resolutions for issues such as app navigation, functionality questions, login or access issues, and basic troubleshooting.

• Work closely with the Customer Success Managers to triage and resolve implementation-related concerns.

• Escalate complex technical issues when necessary.

• Track and categorize support requests to identify patterns, trends, and areas for improvement.

• Maintain and update help center articles and internal documentation.

• Assist in testing new product features and updates to ensure a smooth customer experience.

• Contribute to improving support processes and workflows as the company grows.



Qualifications:

• Excellent English communication skills (written and verbal) - MUST

• Previous experience in customer service, technical support, or a similar support-focused role - MUST

• Experience in supporting school management, scheduling, or other education technology platforms - ADVANTAGE

• Hands-on experience with ticketing tools.

• Strong troubleshooting and problem-solving skills.

• Highly organized with the ability to manage multiple tasks and priorities.



Work Setup and Schedule:

• Full-time remote position

• 8-hour shift per day, 5 days per week





Application Instructions:

• Submit a brief cover letter and include a working link to your CV/Resume

• Use “SCHOOL” as the subject line of your application



***Applications that do not include a working CV/Resume link will not be processed.***

title: Go-To-Market (GTM) Operations & Strategy Specialist
description:

Working Hours: Full-time, UK business hours (Mon-Fri, 9:00am-5:30pm GMT/BST)

s professionally

Chiropractic clinic experience is NOT required

Highly organized, process-driven, and reliable

Excellent written English communication skills

Open to candidates from a variety of professional backgrounds

title: 3PL Enterprise Account Coordinator
description:
Account Coordinator - Ally Logistics



ABOUT ALLY LOGISTICS:

Ally Logistics is a U.S.-based third-party logistics (3PL) company headquartered in Grand Rapids, Michigan. Since 2012, we’ve been committed to creating the ultimate freight shipping experience by operating at the optimal intersection of people and technology.



As a full-service 3PL, we specialize in a wide range of freight solutions, including dry van, refrigerated, drayage, straight truck, open deck/flatbed, drop-trailer programs, warehousing, and more. Our diverse service capabilities allow us to support shippers across industries with flexible, reliable, and scalable logistics strategies.

We partner with skilled global talent to support our continued growth and operational excellence, ensuring our customers receive efficient, high-quality service at every step of the supply chain.



ROLE SUMMARY:

The Account Coordinator supports daily transportation operations by building and scheduling TL shipments in the TMS while ensuring timely same-day and next-day freight coverage across multiple equipment types. They will also handle account support by gradually taking on responsibilities such as requesting accessorial charges, providing customer updates as needed and spot bidding on new shipments.



Regular Weekly Schedule (40 hours): Monday – Friday: 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM Eastern Standard Time with 1-hour unpaid lunch break. Overtime (40+ hours) requires manager approval.



JOB DUTIES/RESPONSIBILITIES: 

-Build and schedule TL shipments in TMS system, effectively and efficiently

-Manage same-day and next-day freight coverage - including dry van, refrigerated, and other equipment types

-Record and update in and out times in customer TMS systems for Enterprise accounts to support visibility and accuracy

-Dispatch drivers and perform proactive track-and-trace for Enterprise-specific loads and lanes

-Extract and communicate critical customer updates to the internal team and, when appropriate

-Handle Account Support: Gradually take on additional responsibilities such as requesting accessorial charges, providing customer updates as needed, and spot bidding on new shipments

-Optimize Operational Efficiency: Continuously seek out and implement improvements to streamline operations and enhance service delivery for the assigned account.

-Maintain Customer Relationships: Develop and maintain strong relationships with customers, addressing any concerns or issues promptly to ensure satisfaction.



KEY PERFORMANCE INDICATORS (KPIs):

-Request pick up / delivery appointments within 2 hours of tender acceptance

-Book Enterprise shipments - 20-40 loads per week

-Win 5-10 spot shipments per week



REQUIRED SKILLS & QUALIFICATIONS:

-Minimum of 2 years of experience in logistics/3PL industry

-Minimum of 2 years of Customer facing experience, preferably within the logistics/3PL industry

-Strong written and verbal English communication skills

-Ability to work independently with minimal supervision.

-Strong problem-solving skills and attention to detail.



Access to:

-A reliable computer with  high-speed internet

--Backup internet source (mobile hotspot or secondary line preferred)

-Webcam + microphone for Zoom calls

-Headset

-Professional remote workspace

-Ability to work U.S. business hours (EST)



Experience with:

-Outlook

-Zoom phone

-Slack

-Basic CRM or logistics platform



Additional Requirements

1. Technology & Equipment Requirements

-Reliable high-speed internet and computer

-Webcam + microphone for Zoom calls

-Quiet, professional workspace

2. Availability Requirements

-Ability to work U.S. Eastern Time

-Must provide advanced notice for planned time off

-Must maintain consistent communication (Slack responsiveness,
, etc.)

You’ll work with our team to make revisions based on feedback and help keep projects moving forward on time.

title: Marketing Growth Manager
description:
What This Role Is

Gracchus Partners is a fractional Chief Growth Officer consultancy. We build growth systems for businesses that are serious about revenue — not brand awareness theater. We work fast, we work in AI, and we hold ourselves to enterprise-grade standards regardless of client size.

This role exists because the work is scaling. We need someone who can own the operational side of client growth delivery — proposals, client communications, and AI-assisted content production — without hand-holding.



We begin at part-time but will transition to full-time depending on close rate 



What You'll Do



Draft, format, and refine client growth proposals using established templates and AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, GHL)

Manage pre-sale client conversations —
, scheduling, follow-up — with professionalism and strategic awareness

Produce AI-assisted deliverables for active client engagements: content calendars, video scripts, social post sets,
 sequences

Operate inside GoHighLevel (GHL) — workflows, CRM updates, automation management

Support proposal research: competitive landscape, industry positioning, ICP definition inputs

Maintain document version control and client file organization





What You Must Have



Bachelor's degree in Business — Marketing concentration strongly preferred

MBA Optional

Demonstrated fluency with AI tools in a production context — not just familiarity

Strong business writing. Clean, direct, no filler. You'll be writing client-facing documents.

Comfort working inside ambiguity. We build systems that don't exist yet.





What Sets You Apart



You've worked inside a marketing agency, consultancy, or business development function

You understand the 4Ps — and know most agencies only touch the fourth one

You can take a client brief and produce a first-draft proposal without being walked through it step by step

You've used AI to produce content at volume, not just one-off prompts





Compensation

Commensurate with experience. Performance upside available as the firm scales.



To Apply



Send your résumé and a positioning statement for a product or service you actually like. Not a summary. A positioning statement — who it's for, what it does, why it wins. Generic applications are not reviewed.

title: Sales Virtual Assistant (Sales Enablement)
description:
About the Company

Located in Campbell, California, MiaRec is an award-winning software company that offers AI-powered Automated Quality Management and Conversation Intelligence solutions for contact centers worldwide. Our Generative AI-powered platform is designed to automate workflows, save costs, boost efficiency, enhance customer experiences, grow revenue, and drive digital transformation.



What We’re Looking For:

We are currently seeking a detail-oriented and proactive Sales Enablement Specialist / Sales Virtual Assistant to support our sales team and help optimize sales admin. This role is ideal for someone who thrives behind the scenes: keeping sales teams organized, equipped, and efficient while working closely with sales, marketing, and leadership in a fast-paced B2B SaaS environment.



What You'll Do:

As a Sales Enablement Specialist / Sales Virtual Assistant, you will play a key role in supporting the sales organization by streamlining administrative processes, maintaining tools and data, and enabling sales to focus on closing deals. Your responsibilities will include:



-Sales Pipeline & CRM Support:

Maintain and update sales pipelines in HubSpot, ensuring accurate deal stages, data hygiene, and visibility. Track follow-ups, tasks, and reminders to support deal progression and sales team efficiency.



-Sales Enablement & Admin Support:

Assist sales reps with day-to-day administrative tasks such as preparing meeting agendas, organizing notes, managing calendars, and ensuring follow-ups are completed on time.



-Sales Materials & Documentation:

Support the creation, organization, and maintenance of sales collateral including pitch decks, proposals, one-pagers, case studies, and internal playbooks using tools like Google Docs, and HubSpot.



-Lead Management & Coordination:

Support inbound and outbound lead workflows by assigning leads, tracking responses, reactivating dormant leads, and coordinating with marketing to ensure smooth handoffs and follow-up execution.



-Lead Generation & Outreach Support:

Assist with outbound lead generation using ZoomInfo, LinkedIn, and Dripify by downloading and keeping records of prospect lists, executing outreach admin tasks, tracking responses, and ensuring all leads and activities are properly documented and followed up in HubSpot.



-Multi-Channel Outreach Support:

Assist with sales outreach campaigns by preparing and recording
 templates, LinkedIn messages, and call scripts. Help schedule outreach sequences (eg. via Dripify) and ensure consistent follow-through by the sales team.



-Event, Webinar & Campaign Support:

Assist with pre- and post-event or webinar coordination, including list preparation, outreach support, follow-up tracking, and reporting.



-Reporting & Sales Insights:

Prepare and maintain sales reports, dashboards, and summaries in HubSpot and Dropbox to help leadership track performance, pipeline health, and activity metrics.



-Sales Process Optimization:

Identify gaps or inefficiencies in sales admin workflows and proactively suggest improvements to tools, templates, and processes that enhance sales admin productivity.



What You'll Bring:

-Bachelor’s degree in Business, Marketing, Communications, or a related field (or equivalent experience).

-At least 3 years of experience in Sales Operations, Sales Enablement, Virtual Assistant, or B2B SaaS sales support roles.

-Strong interest in technology, SaaS, and AI-driven solutions.

-Highly organized, detail-oriented, and process-driven.

-Proactive self-starter with the ability to anticipate needs and take ownership.

-Excellent written and verbal communication skills.

-Comfortable working with CRM systems and productivity tools (HubSpot preferred).

-Direct experience with HubSpot CRM, ZoomInfo, LinkedIn outreach tools (including Dripify), and other sales enablement platforms

-Strong time-management skills and ability to juggle multiple priorities.

-Willing to work Mondays to Fridays, 8:00 AM to 4:30 PM Pacific Time (some flexibility may be required when supporting East Coast stakeholders).





What You’ll Need to Work Remotely

Technical Hardware Requirements:

CPU (Processor):

Intel i5 / Ryzen 5 processor or higher

Apple M1 (for macOS users)



RAM:

8GB RAM minimum (16GB preferred)

Storage:

256GB SSD



Other Requirements:

High-quality webcam and headphones for virtual meetings and collaboration





What We Offer

This is a 100% remote opportunity. We offer competitive hourly pay, the chance to work with cutting-edge AI technology, a collaborative and supportive team environment, opportunities for professional growth, and the opportunity to be remotely involved in major industry events such as Enterprise Connect and Contact Center Expo.



Our Core Values

At MiaRec, we don’t just build technology—we build with purpose. Our culture is shaped by five core values that guide how we work, collaborate, and grow:

-Commitment to Excellence – We take pride in high-quality work, push through challenges, and get things done with purpose.

-Proactive Ownership – We don’t wait to be asked. We take initiative and lead with accountability.

-Integrity in Every Action – We do what’s right, not what’s easy—trust is non-negotiable.

-Growth Mindset – We stay curious, welcome feedback, and continuously improve.





If this role sounds like a great fit, we’d love to hear from you.

Due to the high number of applications, only shortlisted candidates who meet the role requirements will be contacted. Thank you!

title: Planner & Planner Inserts Designer
description:
THIS IS NOT A REGULAR DESIGN JOB



We're not looking for someone to execute a brief and disappear. We're looking for a designer who lives and breathes planners — someone who has opinions about layouts, notices what's missing in the market, and gets genuinely excited about designing a brand new themed monthly spread. If you've never used a discbound planner, this role is not for you.



---



WHO WE ARE



FeroniArt Planners is an Amazon FBA brand in the discbound planner niche. We have 600+ active listings, ship 1,500+ orders every month, and our catalog covers discbound notebooks, planner covers, inserts, and accessories — all built around the disc-ring system used by brands like Happy Planner, ARC, and Levenger Circa.



We're a small two-person team. We move fast, make decisions quickly, and we're serious about becoming the #1 discbound planner brand on Amazon. We're not there yet — and this role is a big part of how we get there.



---



WHAT WE NEED



Our existing catalog has good bones but needs a design upgrade. Some inserts are outdated. Some covers don't reflect where the market is heading. We're also launching entirely new product lines — themed insert collections, premium covers, and new categories we haven't touched yet.



We need a designer who can take ownership across all of this:



1. Refresh & Update Existing Designs

- Review our current insert catalog and identify what needs updating

- Redesign dated layouts to match current planner trends: clean typography, intentional white space, functional structure

- Maintain brand consistency across the catalog while elevating the overall look



2. New Undated & Dated Insert Collections

- Design undated monthly, weekly, and daily inserts in themed collections — nature, botanical, minimal, seasonal, and more

- Design dated versions of the same inserts for annual releases

- Work across all standard discbound sizes: Letter (8.5x11 / 11-disc), Classic (7x9.25 / 9-disc), Half Letter (5.5x8.5 / 8-disc), Mini (4.5x7 / 7-disc)

- Deliver both native-size PDFs and letter-size home-print versions for every insert



3. New Specialty Insert Categories

- Home management: meal planning, cleaning schedules, household trackers

- Business & productivity: project planning, meeting notes, goal setting

- Hobby & lifestyle: reading logs, fitness trackers, travel journals, gratitude pages

- Student: class schedules, assignment trackers, study planners

- Each category should feel like a curated collection — not a random assortment of pages



4. Planner Cover Design

- Design print-ready and supplier-ready cover files for new product launches

- Work with fabric swatches and material references — we're launching woven fabric and textured PU leather covers

- Create product mockups for Amazon listings and internal review



5. Amazon Listing Visuals

- Design infographic images that clearly communicate product features, size, disc compatibility, and use case

- Create A+ Content modules: feature highlights, size comparison charts, brand story visuals

- Work alongside our Amazon Listing Specialist — you design, they upload and optimize



---



WHO WE'RE LOOKING FOR



- Someone who actually uses planners — or at minimum, deeply understands how people use them

- A designer who follows trends: what's selling, what's emerging, what's overdone

- Comfortable working independently — we don't micromanage, but we expect initiative and consistency

- Detail-oriented: correct bleed, proper margins, clean exports — every single time

- Someone who wants to grow with the brand, not just complete tasks and move on



---



SKILLS REQUIRED



- Adobe InDesign — required for all insert and print file production

- Adobe Photoshop — required for listing images and infographics

- Canva — for quick Amazon visuals and mockups

- Strong understanding of print specs: bleed, safe zones, CMYK vs RGB

- Adobe Illustrator — a plus for cover and vector work

- Experience designing for Amazon listings — a strong plus

- Familiarity with discbound planners (Happy Planner, ARC, Levenger Circa) — a strong plus



---



COMPENSATION



- $75 paid trial task for shortlisted candidates (approx. 2–3 hours) — details below

- $400–500/month part-time (approx. 20 hours/week)

- Path to full-time ($700–900/month) based on output and performance

- Long-term role — we're building a team, not filling a slot



---



HOW TO APPLY



Send a message that includes:

- A brief introduction — who you are and what kind of design work you love most,

- Your current country of residence,

- A portfolio link — we want to see planner inserts, stationery, or print work specifically

- One specific observation about FeroniArt's current products or listings on Amazon

- A sample of your planner insert design work — a page layout, weekly spread, or any print-ready planner page you have designed before



Applications without a portfolio will not be reviewed.



---



TRIAL TASK



After we review your application and portfolio, shortlisted candidates will receive an existing FeroniArt undated monthly calendar InDesign file along with a $75 payment for their time. At that stage, we will ask you to:



1. Study the file — understand how it's structured and how the design works

2. Design a brand new themed undated monthly calendar in the same format — we will provide the theme

3. Export two versions: Classic size (7x9.25) print-ready PDF + Letter size (8.5x11) home-print PDF

4. Design one Amazon listing infographic for this insert — show the size, disc compatibility, and one key selling point

5. Briefly explain the design choices you made



We're evaluating your InDesign skills, your design thinking, and your understanding of what makes a planner insert actually work — not just look good.

title: Full-Time Lead Generation & CRM Specialist (GoHighLevel | Outreach | Social Media Support)
description:
Full-Time Lead Generation & CRM Specialist (GoHighLevel | Outreach | Social Media Support)

???? $4.50–$5.50/hour (based on experience)

? Full-time, 40 hours/week

???? Remote – 

???? Paid bi-weekly (or weekly if needbe) via Wise or PayPal or direct deposit

???? Schedule: Overlap with Eastern Time (EST) preferred — ideally available during US morning or early afternoon hours



About Us

We're a truck, trailer, and RV repair company based in Pompano Beach, South Florida — and we're growing fast. We serve commercial fleets, owner-operators, and RV owners across Broward County, and we have aggressive plans to expand.

We run lean. Every person on this team owns their work and moves the needle directly.

We're not hiring someone to "manage our social media." We're hiring someone who finds leads, works them hard, and turns them into booked jobs.



What You'll Be Working On

Your #1 mission is to build a large, clean database of businesses in Broward County that operate trucks, trailers, or RVs — and then convert those leads into booked service appointments through smart, persistent, multi-channel outreach.

Everything else on this list supports that core goal.

#1. Lead Generation & Database Building — 50%+ of your time

Use Google Maps, industry directories, Seamless, Lusha, Apollo, and similar tools to research and identify businesses that operate commercial vehicles or RVs. Build a master database that includes company name, website, industry, estimated fleet size, physical address, phone numbers,
s, and key contacts where available.

We want a large, structured, usable list — built with care, not speed.

#2. CRM Management (GoHighLevel or similar)

Set up and manage pipelines, import and tag lead data, build
/SMS/follow-up automations, and keep lead status and conversation history current and organized.

#3. Outreach & Appointment Setting — Critical

Run outbound campaigns across
, SMS, WhatsApp, and DMs. Follow up consistently — most deals close after the 4th or 5th touch. Respond to inbound inquiries across platforms 
, Reddit, Google, etc.) and convert conversations into booked service appointments.

We measure results, not activity. Booked appointments = success.

#4. Automation & AI Workflows

Build follow-up automations that reduce manual effort over time. Use AI tools to scale outreach and responses. We want systems that compound — not constant manual work.

#5. Social Media — Supporting Role

Post daily to
, Instagram, and Google Business Profile (TikTok optional). Engage in trucking and RV-related groups, respond to messages, and use social channels to drive inbound leads.

Social media supports lead generation — it is not the primary job.

#6. Basic Marketing Materials

Create simple, clean flyers and graphics in Canva or similar tools to support outreach campaigns. Nothing elaborate — functional and professional.

#7. Light Admin / RFP Support

Assist with occasional research and document prep for service bids as needed.



What We're Looking For



- GoHighLevel experience — be specific and honest about your level

- Strong internet research and lead sourcing skills

- Comfortable running multi-channel outreach 
, SMS, WhatsApp, DMs)

- Highly organized and detail-oriented

- Self-starter who takes initiative without waiting for instructions

- Proficient with AI tools (ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, etc.)

- Strong written English; Spanish is a bonus

- Available to overlap with EST hours (Miami, FL) — at least 4–5 hours of shared working time per day



What Working With Us Looks Like

We're a small, fast-moving operation. You'll work directly with the owner. We communicate clearly, give you the tools you need, and get out of your way. We don't micromanage — we set goals and expect you to own them.

We're building something here, and the right person grows with us. This role starts full-time and we treat long-term contributors well.



What Success Looks Like at 60 Days

- A large, clean, tagged lead database ready for outreach

- Active outreach happening daily across multiple channels

- Booked appointments traceable to your efforts

- Automations in place that reduce manual follow-up work



This Role Is NOT For You If:

- You're looking for a social media posting job, you wait for step-by-step instructions, or you think one follow-up
 is enough.



This Role IS For You If:

- You like hunting for leads, you follow up until you get an answer, and you take ownership of outcomes — not just tasks. We want someone who treats this business like it matters, because it does.



To Apply, Include:

- Your lead generation experience and tools you've used (Seamless, Lusha, Apollo, etc.)

- Your GoHighLevel experience — be specific

- Your availability and how many hours per day you can overlap with Eastern Time

- A brief walkthrough of how you'd find 50 fleet or RV businesses in a specific Florida city

- The word SIERRA somewhere in your application

- Self-motivated & pro-active — you take ownership and don't wait to be told what to do

- Reliable and available during Philippines business hours (9AM–5PM PHT)

- Not working multiple jobs at the same time - we’ll notice the lack of commitment/investment in your work.





Nice-to-Haves

- Passionate about books & reading

- Familiarity with Trello, Slack, Google Drive, etc

- Experience/skills with coding, or other things that could bring value.



Why Join Us?

- Stable, full-time remote position

- 13th month + other benefits.

- Clear path for salary increases and expanded responsibilities based on performance

- Be part of a growing team where your contributions directly shape the work we publish



How to Apply

-Our hiring process has three stages:



Stage 1: Application

Please
 me at 
 with the following:

- Your answers to the 8 questions below



Application Questions

1) Do you currently have a job? If yes, what do you do and how many hours per week? If no, what was your previous job & what were your responsibilities?

2) Why does this role attract you, and what about your experience or background makes you a strong fit for the tasks involved?

3) How much salary are you looking to make? (Please state in PHP per month)

4) Do you have any experience with working as a VA or in a similar role? Please describe.

5) What does "being proactive" in your work mean to you? Give a brief example from a previous role.

6) Are you comfortable following detailed SOPs and processes, even when they feel repetitive? How do you stay consistent?

7) Please attach a link to your OJ profile.

8) Please attach a 2-minute video (i.e using loom) OR a cover letter about why you are interested in this job. 





Stage 2: Skills Test

After applying, some candidates will be invited to complete an online skills test covering attention to detail, problem solving, and editorial ability.



Stage 3: Interviews

A small number of candidates who pass the skills test will be invited to a Zoom interview to assess fit, communication, and working style.



---

We review every application carefully. We look forward to hearing from you. Initial applications will close on April 2nd.

title: Clinical Research Coordinator / Clinical Operations Specialist (Sponsor-Side | Dermatology)
description:
Company Overview

We are a sponsor company focused on advancing dermatology research both in vivo clinical trials and in vitro studies. We collaborate with local and international partners to design, initiate, and manage high-quality studies.



Role Overview

We are looking for a Clinical Research professional to support sponsor-side operations, including site identification, study start-up, regulatory coordination, and vendor/site oversight. The ideal candidate has a strong understanding of the Philippine clinical research landscape and can help build and activate a reliable network of trial sites and research partners.



Key Responsibilities

 • Support end-to-end clinical trial operations from a sponsor perspective 

 • Identify, evaluate, and onboard clinical sites, dermatology clinics, and laboratories for both in vivo and in vitro studies

• Lead or support feasibility assessments and site selection strategy

• Build and maintain a strong network of investigators, dermatologists, and research facilities

• Coordinate with CROs, vendors, and site teams to ensure smooth study execution 

• Oversee or assist in study start-up activities (contracts, budgets, timelines, documentation) 

• Support and coordinate regulatory submissions (e.g., ethics committees, FDA Philippines) 

• Ensure compliance with ICH-GCP and local regulatory requirements

• Track study progress and provide updates to internal and external stakeholders (including US sponsors/partners) 



Required Qualifications

• Experience as a CRA, Start-Up Specialist, or Clinical Research Coordinator

• Strong understanding of clinical trial processes (start-up, regulatory, site management)

• Experience working with US sponsors or international studies

• Demonstrated ability to engage and activate clinical trial sites

• Familiarity with Philippine regulatory processes (ethics submissions, FDA, etc.) 

• Valid ICH-GCP Training Certificate (required)

• Strong communication and stakeholder management skills 



Highly Preferred

• Experience in dermatology clinical trials

• Experience supporting or coordinating in vitro research

• Existing network of dermatology clinics, hospitals, or research labs in the Philippines

• Experience in site feasibility and activation from a sponsor or CRO perspective



Key Success Factors in This Role

• Ability to bring in qualified trial sites and investigators

• Strong regulatory coordination capability

• Active and valid ICH-GCP certification with applied knowledge in trials

• Comfort working in a sponsor-driven, fast-moving environment

• Ability to bridge clinical (in vivo) and laboratory-based (in vitro) research workflows



Compensation

 Competitive and flexible based on experience, expertise, and network value

title: YouTube Banner Designer (Photoshop/Canva) – Exact Style Replication ($40 per Banner)
description:
I am hiring a graphic designer to create YouTube channel banners based on existing designs.



You will be provided with:



Multiple reference banners

A professional headshot



Your task is to:



Replace the person in each banner with the provided headshot

Match the original design as closely as possible



This includes:



Same backgrounds

Same fonts

Same layout

Same colors

Same overall style



This is a precision execution role, not a creative redesign.



Test Files (Required for Application):



All files are here:





Use these files to create your draft banners.



IMPORTANT REQUIREMENTS (READ CAREFULLY):

1. Exact Style Matching

Your banners should look nearly identical to the originals

Do NOT redesign, restyle, or “improve” anything

Match spacing, positioning, fonts, and layout closely

2. Subject Replacement Quality

Clean, professional cutout of the headshot

Natural blending (lighting, color, contrast)

No rough edges or visible edits

3. Expression & Editing Rules (CRITICAL)

Use the headshot exactly as provided

Do NOT change facial expression

Do NOT use AI tools to modify the face

Do NOT attempt to match expressions from the reference banners



Your role is compositing, not altering the subject.



Submissions that modify the face or expression will be rejected.



4. YouTube Banner Specifications (REQUIRED)

Size: 2560 x 1440 pixels

All key content must fit within the center safe zone

Must display correctly on desktop, mobile, and TV

APPLICATION REQUIREMENTS (MANDATORY)



To be considered, you must:



1. Create Draft Banners

Submit at least 2 draft banners using the provided files

You may watermark your work for protection



Top candidates will be asked to complete the full set before hiring.



2. Submit Your Work Properly (IMPORTANT)



Upload your draft banners to Google Drive or Dropbox and include a view-only link in your application.



Requirements:



Set access to “Anyone with the link can view”

Do NOT require permission requests

Clearly label your files (example: Banner_1_
g)



?? Submissions that require access requests or do not include draft banners will NOT be reviewed



Approval & Payment Process

I will review your draft banners

Selected candidates will complete the remaining banners

Approved banners will be paid at $40 each

Final versions must be delivered without watermarks

Pay:

$40 per approved banner

Multiple banners required

Opportunity for ongoing work if quality is high

Ideal Candidate:

Advanced Photoshop or Canva skills

Strong compositing and cutout ability

Experience with YouTube banners/thumbnails

High attention to detail

Able to follow instructions exactly

How to Apply:



Include:



A Google Drive or Dropbox link with your draft banners

The software you used (Photoshop, Canva, etc.)

Your turnaround time

IMPORTANT:



If your application does not include properly submitted draft banners using the provided files, it will not be reviewed.

title: Senior Digital Marketing Specialist (HubSpot-Focused)
description:
About the Role

Automotive Parts Solutions (APS) is looking for an experienced Senior Digital Marketing Specialist with strong expertise in HubSpot Marketing Hub. This position is ideal for someone who understands full-funnel digital marketing strategy, execution, automation, and analytics.



You will be responsible for building complete marketing funnels, launching multi-channel campaigns, producing digital content, and using HubSpot to manage and optimize all marketing operations. This role requires a marketer who can make decisions based on data, create compelling content, and improve performance across platforms.



Key Responsibilities



Full-Funnel Digital Marketing

Develop and execute digital marketing strategies that strengthen the APS brand and deliver measurable results.

Plan and manage campaigns across social media,
, HubSpot, and other digital channels.

HubSpot Management

Run and optimize marketing campaigns inside HubSpot Marketing Hub.

Build workflows, set up segmentation, and manage lead nurturing and automation.

Create, monitor, and refine full marketing funnels and sales pipelines.

Use HubSpot analytics to evaluate performance and recommend improvements.

Content Creation and Execution

Create marketing assets including graphics, short-form videos, product promos, and branded visuals.

Manage social media content calendars and community engagement.

Data Analysis and Strategy

Analyze campaign metrics and provide clear insights and recommendations.

Work with leadership to propose new strategies and refine messaging based on performance data.

Optimize targeting, messaging, and funnel performance to improve engagement and conversions.



Qualifications



We are looking for someone who brings both strategic and hands-on marketing skills:

Required Skills and Experience

Strong experience with HubSpot Marketing Hub (automation, segmentation, analytics, workflows).

Proven background in digital marketing strategy and campaign management.

Ability to create graphics, branded content, and short videos.

Strong analytical skills with experience interpreting and presenting data.

Excellent communication skills and the ability to manage tasks independently in a remote setup.



Preferred

Experience building complete marketing funnels from scratch.

Ability to balance creativity with data-driven decision making.



Why Join APS?



Fully remote work setup

Opportunity to influence the direction of the brand

Fast-growing automotive business with room for long-term growth

Creative and strategic role with ownership over digital marketing operations

title: Video Editor for Clothing Brand
description:
We're a fast-growing clothing brand inspired by Japanese culture — and we're looking for a video editor who understands what makes people stop scrolling and buy.



We produce a high volume of short-form video ads (product demos, try-ons, unboxing, UGC-style content) and need someone who can take raw clips and turn them into scroll-stopping, high-converting creatives.



What You'll Be Editing

- Short-form videos (product demos, try-ons, unboxing, UGC-style ads)

- Content for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and
 Ads

- UGC videos from creators



What You Need to Know

- How to craft a strong hook in the first 1–3 seconds

- How to structure a video: Hook ? Body ? CTA

- How to turn raw footage into engaging, high-converting ads

- How to generate and work with AI voiceovers (e.g. ElevenLabs)

- How to bring a script to life: Script ? Voiceover ? Visuals ? Final edit



Nice to Have (Not Required)

- Experience with AI UGC content

- Genuine interest in Japanese culture, streetwear, or JDM cars



What We Offer

- Stable, long-term work

- Flexible hours — work from anywhere, anytime

- Competitive pay

- Performance bonuses for winning creatives



Growth

We care more about attitude than experience. If you're hungry to learn and improve, there's a real opportunity here to grow into a Lead Editor or Creative Lead role as the brand scales. Use the subject line "ananas" when applying so we know you read the full post.



How We Hire

- Apply using the instructions below — make sure to include all requested details.

- If we think you're a good fit, we'll reach out and ask you a few questions.

- You'll complete a paid trial project — one short video edit based on a real brief. This takes about 1–2 days and is our way of making sure we're a great fit for each other.

- We'll have a quick interview to get to know you better.

- If everything clicks — you're hired! 



To Apply, Send Us:

1) A short intro about yourself and why you're a great fit

2) Whether you've worked with clothing or fashion brands before

3) The editing software you use

4) A link to your portfolio

title: Operations Virtual Assistant
description:
Note: Interested applicants must submit their application exclusively through the OnlineJobs platform. Do not
 the company directly. Any candidate who contacts the company outside of the OnlineJobs system will be disqualified from consideration.



Operations Virtual Assistant

(Process-Driven | High-Precision | Behind-the-Scenes Operations)



Job Overview



Maid In America Cleaning Services is hiring an Operations Virtual Assistant to protect schedule integrity, data accuracy, and operational consistency.



This is a behind-the-scenes execution role. You will not be customer-facing. You will work inside defined systems and SOPs to ensure our operational engine runs cleanly and efficiently every day.



If you enjoy structured work, moving quickly without sacrificing accuracy, and taking pride in clean execution, this role will feel natural to you.



What You’ll Do:



1. Scheduling & Job Management (Primary Responsibility)

You will own scheduling preparation and system accuracy for our TN locations.



This includes:

- Creating and modifying clients, jobs, and visits in Jobber

- Preparing future-day schedules for review and approval

- Creating training tasks in Jobber for new tea
mbers

- Re-sequencing jobs and rebalancing teams within defined guardrails

- Maintaining week-to-week schedule consistency whenever possible

- Flagging and correcting conflicts or inefficiencies early

- Executing same-day scheduling adjustments exactly as directed



2. Data Accuracy & System Integrity

You will ensure operational data is accurate, complete, and reliable.



This includes:

- Updating customer notes, job frequencies, and service details

- Invoicing customers promptly after service completion

- Calculating cost-of-service data after jobs

- Preparing timesheet and tips reports for payroll

- Logging complaints and rectified cleans accurately

- Creating and publishing weekly operational reports

- Manual KPI data entry

- Verifying work-to-labor ratios using company tools



3. Administrative Support

You will support operational structure and remove administrative friction.



This includes:

- Supporting the Assistant Operations Manager with administrative execution

- Maintaining internal trackers and shared documents

- Following established documentation and checklists consistently



What This Role Requires

- High pace with high accuracy

- Comfort with structured, repeatable tasks

- Strong attention to detail

- Clear communication when issues arise

- Strong adherence defined systems and guardrails

- Ability to work independently within clear expectations



This role involves a high volume of operational tasks that must be completed correctly and consistently. As the company grows, volume will increase — and this role grows with it.



Who We’re Looking For



Detail-Oriented & Reliable

You take pride in doing things correctly and thoroughly.



High Throughput Executor

You can handle volume without losing structure or focus.



Process-Driven

You work well inside defined systems and appreciate clear expectations.



Accountable Communicator

You flag issues early, own mistakes quickly, and ask for clarification when needed.



Tech-Comfortable

You’re comfortable using tools like Slack, Google Suite, Chrome extensions, and scheduling platforms. Experience with Jobber is a strong plus.



Experienced in Fast-Paced Admin or Scheduling

Background in administrative, dispatch, logistics, scheduling, or operations-heavy roles is

preferred.



Work Requirements

- Monday–Friday, 8AM–5PM U.S. Central Time

- Reliable internet with backup

- Dedicated workspace

- Backup power options in case of outages

- Fluent written English



Our Core Values

- Communication

- Connection

- Quality

- Service

- Teamwork



If these values resonate with you, we want to hear from you.



Important Screening Step (Read Carefully)



SERIOUS APPLICANTS ONLY:

1. Complete our Culture Index survey: 

2. Submit your application with the subject line beginning with the core value you most resonate with (ALL CAPS).

3. Use a minimum of 5 Apply Points when applying

4. In your application message, include one sentence describing the most repetitive task you have performed at a high standard for 6+ months.



Applications that do not follow all instructions will not be reviewed.

title: Customer Support Experts Needed
description:
We are now hiring Customer Support Experts to assist our customers over the phone.

This is a full-time position only with long-term potential



Customers will call us and ask for assistance with various tasks, such as:



Checking their
 accounts

Purchasing items they need

Signing up for services

Logging into or managing their accounts

Checking or signing up for credit score reports

Conducting general online searches



The tasks we handle are all things that can be done online.



PAY & EARNING STRUCTURE



Base rate starts at $4.50 per hour.

Agents usually work 10 hours per day including the paid breaks, and we allow more hours if someone wants to earn more.

During busy times, we also pay time-and-a-half overtime when we need additional coverage.

Good performers can earn a monthly bonus between $60 and $150.

There is a $50 monthly attendance bonus for consistent on-time performance.

Every 6 months, we evaluate performance and agents can receive up to an extra $0.50 per hour added to their rate if they are doing well.



With base hours plus bonuses and performance increases, a strong performer can earn up to around $1,100 per month.



This is the roadmap of our hiring process:



- You will take a quiz that typically takes about an hour to complete.

- If you pass the quiz, you will be invited to take two live mock calls or skill tests. The first one usually takes around 20 minutes, and the second one is longer, typically about an hour.

- Once you pass, you will then proceed with orientation and training.



Please note that our quizzes and skill tests can be challenging for beginners and require sharpness, speed and excellent attention to details. If you believe you possess these skills, feel free to apply.



You need to have fluent English as well as having very good internet connection and a quiet place to work.

Please apply only if you are fully available for a full-time position.

Please do not apply if you are not based in the Philippines.



When You Apply*



Please answer the following questions:



1. How many hours are you available daily, and on which days of the week?

2. How soon are you ready to start?



Lastly, please include a link to a Vocaroo audio recording (minimum 45 seconds) where you briefly introduce yourself. Tell us a bit about your background, relevant experience, and one hobby you genuinely enjoy.



Thanks,

Aron

title: Customer Service & Appointment Coordinator- Remote
description:

Full-time | Long-term

US hours (Mountain standard Time)



Customer Service & Appointment Coordinator

Inbound Calls | Lead Qualification | Appointment Booking

We are hiring a confident, professional English-speaking Customer Service Representative to manage inbound calls, respond to follow-up inquiries, and book qualified appointments for our sales team.

This is a front-line role. You will represent our company on every call.

Strong, natural English communication is not optional. You must be able to speak clearly, understand nuance, and communicate with confidence and professionalism.

title: Customer Service Representative UK - Full Time Job Position
description:
Customer Service Representative



Full-time, remote work. Immediate start. 1-2 people needed for growing team.



***We repost our ad regularly for improved visibility when we have an open position. If you have responded to the work ad once, you do not need to remessage to the latest ad.***



We are an established hardware company looking for Customer Service Representatives to support the growth of our international business. Primary responsibilities include attending to customer queries over
 and WhatsApp instant messages and identifying which products customers should purchase. A successful candidate will be passionate about delivering an enjoyable customer experience, have excellent English written communication skills, very high attention to detail, and the ability to work in an organised manner.



You will not have to voice speak with any customer. All communication will be text-based.



We are looking for people who want to work with us long-term. Consequently, we seek to be a company with a work environment, culture people will also enjoy working with long-term.



Job Responsibilities

- Must be able to work UK work hours Monday to Friday - 8 am until 5 pm and weekend shifts when assigned.

- Other work shift times may be included: Weekend shifts & late UK shifts.

- Daily monitoring of incoming
 & instant messenger customer queries.

- Categorising & labeling customer queries for providing timely & accurate responses.

- Attending customer queries by helping them identify which specific products they should purchase.

- Dialoging with customers and requesting additional information from customers when necessary to help with the product identification process.

- Providing customers with an overall excellent customer experience in regards to timeliness of responses, quality of communication, and the accuracy of purchase advice given.

- Flagging and escalating difficult queries for experienced tea
mbers to follow up.

- Please respond to this job application with 'REF:
in your title so we know that you've read it thoroughly (make sure the reference is in the title itself, not just in the message content).



Experience & Skills

- Excellent verbal and written English communication skills.

- Minimum 3-4 years of experience in a customer service role with a track record of providing customers with excellent service.

- Very high attention to detail and interest in learning technical products as well as able to spot even small differences between similar hardware products.

- Highly customer service oriented, positive and pleasant personal disposition.

- Highly organised, detail-oriented, and able to manage multiple projects and tasks.

- Self-starter who is able to identify, scope, and manage projects from end to end.

- Team player willing and interested in helping other tea
mbers.



Benefits

- Full-time work

- Fully remote work

- Paid annual time off (4 weeks / 20 days)

- 13-month pay bonus when customer service targets are met

- Monthly bonus available: Tea
mbers who have graduated to working independently automatically qualify for a monthly bonus (usually takes about 3-6 months to reach this level)

- Experienced senior tea
mbers able to work independently can be offered flexible working hours or part-time work opportunities.

- Growing CSR team offers career progression and salary increase opportunities through senior tea
mber and training roles.



Hiring process

- 2-3 product identification assignments and a video interview

title: LTL Manager
description:
We’re a fast-growing eCommerce company dedicated to delivering exceptional customer experiences across multiple marketplaces, including Amazon, ebay and our direct-to-consumer channels. As we scale, we’re looking for a seasoned Customer Service Manager who understands the intricacies of online retail, thrives in a dynamic environment, and has a proven track record of building and leading high-performing support teams.



Are you ready to lead with purpose, solve problems with precision, and bring energy to a fast-moving eCommerce team? 



We are looking for a motivated Customer Service Manager - LTL to join our growing support organization. We are looking for hands-on leaders who thrive in the details, love data, and know how to rally a team.



What You'll Do:

• Own the follow-up process for LTL shipments requiring phone outreach

• Keep shipment data organized, accurate, and actionable

• Drive resolution through persistent follow-through and clear communication

• Coach your team on task ownership and accountability



What You Bring:

• Strong phone skills and follow-up discipline

• Solid Excel knowledge (filters, lookups, basic formulas)

• Detail-oriented mindset and comfort with operational data



Requirements:

• 3+ years experience in customer service or logistics support

• Strong phone communication and follow-up discipline

• Intermediate Excel skills (filters, lookups, formulas)

• Detail-oriented and comfortable managing operational data

• Ability to lead a small team and prioritize tasks effectively



***Very important: Do take note that the applicant is required to share their updated CV with appropriate access. Applicants who are non compliant with this will be automatically ignored.***

title: Social Media Content Creator & Video Editor
description:
***Please read before applying:***



 Applications that skip questions or don't include links to social profiles, portfolios, or work samples will not receive a response — not because we're rude, but because we're busy rebuilding a château and incomplete applications tell us everything we need to know. If you're serious, show us. We're looking for people who follow through.



I'm a female content creator and former commercial and music video director with a growing audience across TikTok (97K), Instagram (71K), and YouTube (12K). My content has a strong visual identity — bold, colorful, cinematic. I need someone who gets that.

You'll turn my footage into short-form content ready for me to review and post: Reels, TikToks, YouTube Shorts,
 clips, carousels, and montages. This is a creative role. Aesthetic matters as much as technical skill.

What you'll produce:



Short-form video clips (9:16, burned-in captions)

Montages and mood edits from raw footage

Instagram carousels with strong visual flow

Captions that sound like a real person, not a brand account

Hashtag sets per platform

Thumbnail options



What I'm looking for:



Strong editing portfolio — show me Reels, TikToks, or carousels you've made

A real eye for color, pacing, and composition

Excellent written English with personality

Self-directed — you get a brief and run with it

Reliable and communicates proactively



To apply, include 2-3 portfolio examples, one sentence on why this role appeals to you, and write the word MAGNIFIQUE somewhere in your message so I know you read this.

title: *** Credit Repair specialist with Experience ***READY TO START
description:
Credit Repair Specialist (Part-Time, Long-Term) 



We’re a small credit repair business focus on grown, 

Our mission is simple: help clients improve their credit scores the legal and ethical way, using consumer protection laws and accurate, factual ane METRO 2 dispute strategies.



Right now we’re hiring ONE (1) reliable VA (not a whole team)  *** someone who can learn and follow directions ***, communicate well, and handle day-to-day dispute workflows. NO CUSTOMER INTERACTIONS REQUIRED.



 What You’ll Handle :

- You will primarily support our clients by:

- Reviewing and analyzing credit reports/credit files (most of them of SmartCredit)

- Preparing and submitting disputes for negative items, including:

Late payments

Collections

Charge-offs

Bankruptcies

Inquiries

Student loans

Repossessions

Any other negative tradelines.

- Following up on bureaus responses and updating case status

- Working inside DisputeFox CRM

Creating client accounts:

- New
 accounts for clients

*** What We’re Looking For (Must-Haves) ***

Most important requirement:  You should follow instructions.

We need someone dependable who executes tasks exactly as instructed.



You should also have:

- Proven experience in credit repair disputes

- Understanding of dispute best practices and compliance (legal/ethical only)

- Strong written English (clear, professional messages)



Comfortable working with tools like:

- DisputeFox

Schedule & Work Setup (Non-Negotiables)

- Monday to Friday 9am to 1pm EST. TIME (or to be determinate).

) .

 How to Apply / Please send:

Tools you’ve used (DisputeFox, Credit monitoring sites, CRMs, etc.)



One example of how you would handle a bureau response that says “Verified/Updated” (brief)



***This is the start salary*** WEEKLY OR BI-WEEKLY PAY!

ETING

title: Paid Ads Manager for Ecom/DTC
description:
We’re Looking For Someone Who Can Push Budget, Launch Tests Fast, And Scale Winners.

We care about execution, speed, and results.



At fatjoe, we run paid acquisition across multiple channels and constantly test new offers, creatives, and campaigns. That means lots of ads, lots of iterations, and lots of data.



If you can’t handle high testing velocity, large numbers of creatives, and aggressive scaling, this role isn’t for you.

But if you can… keep reading.



About fatjoe

fatjoe delivers marketing services to thousands of agencies and brands worldwide.

Bootstrapped and founder-led. No corporate bureaucracy.

We’ve grown to $15M+ annual revenue with a lean team under 20 people, and we’re just getting started.



Our mission is simple: Build the most scalable marketing services platform in the world.



To do that, we need people who move fast and care about results.

Not meetings.

Not bureaucracy.

Not corporate theatre.



The Role

We run a lot of ads. We test a lot of creatives. We push budgets when things work.

Your job is to launch, manage, and optimise paid campaigns across Meta Ads, Google Ads & Linkedin Ads, while keeping our testing machine running smoothly.

This is not a beginner's role.



You’ll be expected to:

* Launch campaigns quickly and correctly

* Manage large volumes of creatives

* Monitor performance daily

* Identify winners and scale budgets

* Kill losers fast

* Keep campaigns organised and structured



Execution speed matters.

If you’re slow, disorganised, or afraid to push budgets — this isn’t the job for you.



Responsibilities:

* Launch and manage Meta Ads and Google Ads campaigns at scale

* Upload and test large volumes of creatives on Meta

* Manage Search, Performance Max, and display campaigns on Google

* Monitor campaign performance daily across both platforms

* Work with creators and platforms on ad creative

* Identify winning creatives, audiences, and keywords

* Scale budgets aggressively when campaigns perform

* Cut losing ads quickly

*Maintain clear campaign structures and naming conventions

* Troubleshoot ad delivery issues, rejections, and tracking problems

* Report key metrics clearly (ROAS, CPA, CTR, CPM, etc.)

* Work closely with our marketing team to keep the testing system running



Requirements:

You’ve done this before.

Not theory. Not a course. Real ad accounts.



Minimum requirements:

* 2+ years managing Meta Ads and Google Ads.

* Strong experience running Meta creative testing campaigns

* Experience managing Google Search and Performance Max

* Experience managing high-volume ad accounts

* Comfortable launching large numbers of creatives

* Strong understanding of ad metrics (ROAS, CPA, CTR, CPM)



Bonus Points:

* Advanced Google Ads optimisation experience

* Experience with eCommerce or DTC brands

* Experience managing £75k+ month ad spend

* Experience writing or briefing ad copy



This Role Is NOT For



This role is not for people who:

* Need constant supervision

* Work slowly

* Overcomplicate simple tasks

* Don’t understand Ads Manager

* Panic when budgets increase

* Can’t handle launching multiple campaigns daily

* Make careless setup mistakes



We move fast and expect people to keep up.



Compensation

Salary: $1000-$1200 per month (depending on experience)



Benefits:

* Fully remote and full-time role

* Work with a small, high performance marketing team

* Direct access to founder

* No corporate politics or bureaucracy



Hiring Process:

We keep things simple.

1. Submit your application here: 

**Note: you will need to record a short video intro

2. Short screening interview

3. Practical assessment

4. Offer



Ready to Apply?



If you:

* Love running paid ads

* Enjoy testing lots of creatives

* Can move fast without making mistakes

* Know how to scale winners



Then apply.

If not, this probably isn’t the role for you.

title: Marketing Content Designer, Video Editor & Administrative Assistant
description:
We are seeking a reliable, creative virtual assistant to support two businesses: a Direct Primary Care medical practice and an individual real estate agent. This is a full-time, long-term position focused on marketing content creation, as well as general administrative and communication support.



This role combines creative work with day-to-day operational tasks, so we are looking for someone who is both detail-oriented and adaptable.



Hours

20 to 40 hours per week

3 to 5 days per week

Flexible schedule with clear deadlines

Opportunity for long-term growth and increased responsibility



Primary Responsibilities



Marketing & Creative

Create social media graphics using established brand guidelines

Edit short-form videos for social media

Perform basic to intermediate photo editing for marketing use

Prepare and schedule content for platforms such as
 and Instagram

Support both real estate and medical marketing with clean, professional visuals

Make revisions based on feedback and maintain consistent branding



Administrative & Communication Support

Assist with general administrative tasks across both businesses

Manage and update CRM systems, including Follow Up Boss

Respond to
s, text messages, and general inquiries in a professional and timely manner

Help manage and organize client communications and follow-ups

Assist with outreach and communication efforts for the medical practice to support growth and patient engagement

Organize and manage digital files, content, and client information

Help prepare documents, marketing materials, and client-facing content



Required Skills and Experience

Strong graphic design ability with a focus on clean, professional visuals

Experience creating and editing short-form video content

Working knowledge of photo editing tools or similar software

Understanding of social media formatting and content requirements

Ability to learn and work within CRM systems, including Follow Up Boss

Strong written communication skills for client-facing messages

Ability to follow brand guidelines and maintain consistency

Strong organizational skills and attention to detail

Clear communication, responsiveness, and reliability



Preferred but Not Required

Experience creating marketing content for real estate or medical practices

Familiarity with modern content creation tools and platforms

Experience with CRM systems and client communication workflows

Understanding of short-form video trends for social media



What We Are Looking For

Someone detail-oriented who takes pride in clean, professional work

Someone comfortable switching between two brands and audiences

Someone who communicates clearly and professionally with clients

Someone who accepts feedback well and improves quickly

Someone organized and dependable with strong follow-through

Someone interested in a long-term working relationship



To Apply, Please Include

A short introduction about yourself

Your experience with graphic design, video editing, and administrative work

A link to your portfolio or sample work

The tools and software you are most comfortable using

Your hourly rate and availability



Applications without sample work will not be considered.



Qualified applicants will be invited to a short multi-step selection process.

title: Graphic Designer
description:

Staak Inc.

mbers on project direction and execution
