title: Call Center Manager (Long-term Career, EXPERTS ONLY)
description:
We're hiring a Call Center Manager for our growing home improvement company!

We're seeking an experienced leader to manage our outbound/inbound calling team focused on setting high-quality appointments for roofing and other home improvement services (e.g., siding, windows, gutters, etc.).



Pay: 

-Hourly + a team performance bonus. The better you are at building a team, the more you make! Can easily make ~$2k/mo just in bonuses. 



Key Requirements:

-Proven experience managing teams of 10+ callers (appointment setters, telemarketers, or similar roles) in a fast-paced call center environment

-Direct hands-on experience in setting appointments specifically for roofing, remodeling, restoration, or other home improvement/trade services

-Strong track record of driving KPIs like contact rates, booking rates, show-up rates, and conversion

-Ability to hire, train, coach, motivate, and performance-manage callers to hit and exceed targets

-Comfortable with scripting, objection handling, lead qualification, and optimizing call processes



Schedule:

-Full-time, Monday through Saturday

Hours: 10 AM – 6 PM Eastern Daylight Time (must be available and working these hours reliably)



This is a long-term career opportunity for someone who wants stability, growth, and to build something lasting with a company that values results and team development. We're looking for a committed leader ready to grow with us...not a short-term gig.



How to Apply:

-Reply with the exact phrase "I am your call center manager" in your message, and include a Loom video (1-3 minutes) where you introduce yourself and cover (DO NOT SEND A PRE RECORDED LOOM):

1. Your relevant experience managing call teams and setting home improvement/roofing appointments

2. Your approach to leading a team, hitting targets, and handling challenges

USE THE CODE WORD BANANA AT THE BEGINNING OF YOUR VIDEO.

3. Why you're the right person for this long-term role and excited about this opportunity



Serious applicants only! Applications without the phrase and Loom video will not be considered.



If this sounds like you, we want to hear from you! Apply now. ????

title: Home Improvement/ Roofing Call Center
description:
About Us

ProCraft Restoration Group is a premium residential restoration and remodel company serving the Southeast US (roofing, exterior, interior, energy efficiency upgrades). We're a stable, growing team building an inside sales outbound department.

Your Role – Straightforward & Focused

Your ONLY job: Make high-volume outbound calls to our warm database (past happy customers + previous leads) ? follow a proven script ? qualify interest ? book in-home appointments for our local reps ? log everything in CRM. No closing sales – just setting appointments.

Daily Responsibilities



100–150 outbound dials/day to warm contacts.

Use our script to re-introduce company/services (lifetime warranties, expanded offerings), ask key questions (main need: roof/exterior/interior/energy), and book specific day/time with correct specialist.

Log calls, notes, outcomes, and move contacts in pipeline (e.g., New ? Attempting ? Appointment Set) in GoHighLevel (GHL).

Send templated follow-up SMS when needed.

Hit daily/weekly appointment targets consistently.



Must-Have Qualifications



Excellent spoken English: Neutral/light accent that's clear and easy for US homeowners.

Proven outbound/cold calling + appointment-setting experience (US clients preferred; ideal: roofing, solar, HVAC, real estate, insurance, home services).

Comfortable with high volume (100+ dials/day) and handling "no's" frequently.

Quiet home office, reliable high-speed internet, quality headset with mic.

Available for US EST hours (overlap with PH night/morning shifts common in call center roles).



Nice-to-Have (Big Advantages)



Experience with GoHighLevel (GHL), JobNimbus, Salesforce, HubSpot, or similar CRMs.

Background in home services industries.



What We Offer



Stable full-time, long-term role with a reputable US company.

Competitive pay + generous bonuses (e.g., per shown appointment + team targets).

Full training, proven scripts, clear KPIs – you'll know exactly how to succeed.

Growth path: Top performers can advance to senior setter or team lead.



How to Apply – Serious Applicants Only

To be considered, reply with:



1. A short voice recording (30–60 seconds) introducing yourself + your outbound experience (use Vocaroo, Loom, or any link).

2. Summary of your appointment-setting/cold-calling experience:

-Industries/companies you've called for.

-What you promoted/sold.

-Typical daily dials and appointments booked per day/week.



3. Your available hours in EST (e.g., full 9 AM–5 PM EST availability).

4. Expected hourly rate + if you're open to per-appointment bonuses.



Subject line / First line of your application message MUST be:

“I can make 100+ calls/day and book appointments. AND YOUR ROOFING/ SOLAR EXPERIENCE” with a minimum of 5 apply points (show that you're serious).

We're seeking disciplined, phone-strong performers ready for consistent high-volume work with rewards for results. If this matches your skills and you can commit long-term, apply now – we respond quickly to qualified candidates!

title: Accounting Manager (Remote – Philippines)
description:
Position Overview

The Accounting Manager will play a critical role in managing our financial operations, ensuring accurate bookkeeping, reconciling accounts, preparing financial reports, and providing strategic data insights to leadership. This role requires extensive expertise in QuickBooks Desktop, strong analytical skills, and experience with financial reporting, payroll, and billing processes.



Key Responsibilities

•Manage all agency bookkeeping with a focus on accuracy and efficiency.

•Perform monthly reconciliations between QuickBooks and bank accounts.

•Prepare and provide monthly financial statements (P&L, Balance Sheet) to leadership.

•Pull data from various systems, create visualizations, and provide insights to support business strategy.

•Oversee payroll and billing processes, ensuring compliance and accuracy.

•Collaborate with leadership to optimize financial workflows and reporting.



Qualifications & Requirements

•Expert-level proficiency in QuickBooks Desktop (including setting up accounts and classifications).

•Strong bookkeeping experience, ensuring accurate financial records.

•Experience in financial reporting (P&L, Balance Sheet, reconciliations).

•Knowledge of payroll and billing processes, preferably in a service-based industry.

•Advanced Excel and PowerPoint skills for data organization and presentation.

•Familiarity with project management/CRM platforms such as 
.

•Experience with data visualization tools like Tableau or Power BI.

•Strong analytical mindset with the ability to translate financial data into strategic insights.

Detail-oriented, proactive, and highly organized.

title: Remote Accounting Manager
description:
Role Overview



The Remote Accounting Manager is responsible for overseeing day-to-day accounting operations, ensuring accurate financial reporting, compliance, and internal controls. This role manages the accounting team, reviews financial transactions, and supports leadership with timely financial insights.



Key Responsibilities

Accounting & Financial Management



Oversee general ledger activities, journal entries, and account reconciliations



Ensure timely and accurate month-end and year-end close



Review financial statements (P&L, Balance Sheet, Cash Flow) for accuracy



Monitor AR/AP, cash flow, and bank reconciliations



Ensure proper expense coding and cost allocation



Payroll & Compliance



Review payroll summaries and ensure proper posting to the GL

mber to help keep operations running smoothly.

s

s on behalf of the founder

title: Client Care Specialist
description:
TYPICAL HOURS

- Start time between 8:30 and 9:00 AM

- End time 5:00 PM



MISSION

The Client Care Specialist is an operational admin role and is the relationship hub— this role ensures agents feel taken care of, the calendar is protected, and opportunities for growth are identified daily. You manage client communication, control scheduling, support light sales, and strengthen long-term relationships. When active clients are fully supported, you shift into outreach and revenue-building mode.



DAILY SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE

- Agents feel supported and confident

- Calendar is clean, optimized, and protected

- Sales opportunities are identified and surfaced

- Relationships are actively maintained

- No client is left wondering what is going on



CORE RESPONSIBILITIES



1. Client Communication and Care

- Monitor and respond to
, text, Slack, and CR
ssages

- Maintain a friendly, fast, concierge-level tone

- Confidently answer questions about pricing, packages, and services

- Recommend upgrades and add-ons when appropriate

- Resolve small issues independently

- Prioritize long-term and OG clients

- Log notes and important details in the CRM

- Agents should feel like they have a personal point of contact, not a ticket system.



2. Scheduling and Calendar Control

- Fully manage the calendar inside Tonomo

- Confirm appointments and resolve scheduling questions

- Optimize routes and timing for efficiency

- Push back on unreasonable requests using solution-first language

- Avoid saying no when possible by presenting options

- Decline same-day requests if they hurt operations

- Escalate truly critical situations to Tyler

- Protect weekday scheduling and limit weekends unless approved

- The calendar exists to support quality, not chaos.



3. Light Sales Support and Opportunity Spotting

- This role supports growth without pressure selling.

- Upsell add-ons when agents ask questions

- Suggest listing campaigns, Zillow Showcase, video, or premium services when relevant

- Identify high-intent or hot agents

- Flag those agents for Manager to personally follow up

- Support value-based conversations, not discounts



4. Client Outreach and Relationship Building

- Once active tasks are complete, shift into outreach mode.

- Reach out to agents who have not ordered recently

- Send friendly check-in texts,
s, or calls

- Reconnect with past clients to stay top of mind

- Perform care calls after projects are delivered

- Ensure clients are happy and heard

- Ask for reviews when expectations are met

- Log outreach and results in the CRM



5. Care Call Guidelines

- Phone calls are preferred when possible

- Text is acceptable and encouraged when appropriate

- If an agent has multiple jobs in a short time, one phone call per week is sufficient

- Follow-up texts can be used to check in and confirm satisfaction

- Dealer’s choice, based on context and relationship

- Goal is connection, not interruption



6. Review Requests

- Review asks typically happen during care calls

- Text follow-ups are also acceptable

- If satisfaction is confirmed, politely ask for a Google review

- Track reviews received

- Thank agents for their time and support

- Reviews are a growth lever. Treat them with intention.



7. Project Awareness and Support

- While evening ops owns most delivery and QC:

- Monitor Tonomo for overnight deliveries

- Handle morning video deliveries if they come in

- Assist with follow-ups tied to completed jobs

- Coordinate with evening ops when questions arise



TOOLS USED DAILY

- Tonomo for scheduling, orders, delivery, and invoicing

- Slack for internal communication

-
 and text for client communication

- GoHighLevel CRM for notes, outreach, and tracking

- Social media is not part of this role

title: Quality Control Specialist - Real Estate Media
description:
ABOUT THE ROLE



We’re looking for a detail-obsessed Quality Control Specialist to join our team and help us deliver top-notch real estate media to our clients. In this role, you'll review photos, videos, and virtual media before they go out the door — making sure everything looks polished, professional, and exactly how the client expects it. You'll collaborate closely with our editing team, catch anything that’s “off,” flag necessary changes, and help us maintain a reputation for stunning, consistent work. You’ll also support light client communication when needed — helping make sure small edit requests or updates are handled quickly and professionally. If you have a keen eye for detail, love great visuals, and thrive in a fast-paced environment, you’ll fit right in.



WHAT YOU'LL BE DOING



Media Quality Assurance:

- Review completed photo and video projects using our editing platforms and project management systems.

- Check photos, drone photos, virtual twilight images, and videos for anything that needs fixing.

- Cross-reference client requests with project notes to ensure custom edits are completed properly.



Identify common visual issues like:

- Missing light bulbs, power lines, trash cans, stickers on appliances, etc.

- Light flares, reflections, blurry images, crooked lines, poor HDR quality, color issues.

- Typos in agent branding, missing or wrong logos, shaky video clips, bad audio.

- Ensure outdoor shots look natural — especially when sky replacements or virtual edits are involved.

- Submit clear, detailed edit requests to the editing team with screenshots and notes when needed.

- Double-check edits after corrections are made to ensure everything is finalized correctly.



Light Client Support:

- Assist with light customer service duties, including responding to client
s or texts about editing needs.

- Help coordinate small edit requests and corrections to ensure client satisfaction.

- Maintain professional and timely communication with clients when troubleshooting small issues.



Collaboration & Communication:

- Work directly with the editing team to flag major issues or minor fixes.

- Offer clear, constructive feedback and keep everything moving efficiently.

- Stay in close contact with the operations team and project managers to meet delivery timelines.



Process Improvement:

- Keep notes on common errors or recurring issues to help improve our internal processes.

- Stay up to date on new editing techniques, tools, and industry best practices.

- Help update the QC process regularly based on new learnings or client feedback.



What You’ll Need:

- 1+ years of experience in quality control, media production, editing, or real estate marketing preferred.

- A strong eye for detail — you notice the small things others miss!

- Basic understanding of photography and videography (composition, lighting, editing basics).

- Familiarity with photo editing platforms (Dropbox, Lightroom, Photoshop, etc.).

- Comfortable using project management systems for tracking tasks and deliverables.

- Clear and professional written communication skills (Slack,
, project notes).

- Ability to work independently, prioritize tasks, and manage fast turnaround deadlines.

- A customer-first attitude and a problem-solving mindset.



Bonus Skills (but not required):

- Real estate media experience (photos, videos, drone work)

- Experience reviewing or editing media assets yourself

- Familiarity with platforms like Vimeo, Canva, Final Cut, Premiere Pro



Work Hours & Flexibility:

- Flexible hours, based on project volume and delivery timelines.

- Ability to respond quickly to new projects and client edit requests.

- Some weekend or evening availability may occasionally be needed during busy seasons.



You'll Love This Role If:

- You get satisfaction from making good work great.

- You love working behind the scenes to deliver a polished final product.

- You’re organized, proactive, and love working in a fast-paced creative environment.

- You like collaborating with a team but also enjoy working independently.

title: Online Math/Science Teacher(Near-Native Accent)
description:
About Pomelo Academy

Pomelo Academy is an innovative online international school dedicated to delivering high-quality education to students worldwide. We provide a dynamic and engaging learning environment, catering to individualized instruction that transcends geographical boundaries.



Job Description

We are seeking passionate and experienced Near-Native English-speaking Online K-12 Math and/or Science Teachers with verifiable teaching certifications. The ideal candidates will have strong academic backgrounds in Mathematics and/or Science, experience teaching young learners (ages 5–18), and a commitment to creating a supportive, inquiry-based, and engaging online learning environment.



Responsibilities



Deliver interactive and engaging Math and/or Science lessons to individuals and small groups of 2–6 students aged 5–18.

Teach using internationally recognized curricula such as A Closer Look, Glencoe Science, Pearson Interactive Science, NGSS-aligned resources, Singapore Math, or IB/AP/A Level Math programs.

Create age-appropriate lesson plans focused on conceptual understanding, inquiry, problem-solving, and real-world applications.

Incorporate visuals, multimedia, and hands-on virtual activities to make abstract concepts accessible and engaging.

Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback to students and parents.

Foster curiosity, discussion, and active learning in a safe and supportive space.



Qualifications



Professional teacher with at least 2 years of teaching experience (Kindergarten–Grade 12).

Must hold a valid teaching license/certification (e.g., Teaching License, State Certification). TESOL/TEFL is a plus.

Near-native English accent with excellent spoken and written communication skills.

Strong academic background in Mathematics and/or Science (Biology, Physics, Chemistry, General Science).

Experience teaching in public/international schools or reputable online platforms.

Familiarity with inquiry-based and/or interdisciplinary approaches (e.g., STEM/STEAM).

Comfortable working between 07:00–22:00 (Weekdays) and 9:00–22:00 (Weekends), GMT+8.

Proficiency with digital platforms such as ClassIn, Microsoft Office, and other educational technologies.

Must have a stable and fast internet connection and a PC/laptop with at least Windows 10 or Mac OS Catalina.



Benefits



Flexible working hours.

Opportunity to teach using globally respected Math and Science curricula.

Be part of an international, passionate team of educators.

Access to training and professional development.

Regular enrollment model (not a booking system), ensuring schedule stability and consistency

title: Shopify Customer Support
description:
Hi there! We are a fast-growing e-commerce startup simplifying the chaos of buying solar equipment.



We don’t just answer
s — we solve real operational challenges at scale. We bring structure, speed, and clarity to a complex supply chain.



You will own the full customer support function of a fast-growing 7-figure e-commerce company. From communication to fulfillment coordination, you’ll ensure every customer receives fast, clear, and highly personalized support — the opposite of high-volume, scripted ticket handling.



Work Schedule

This is a full-time remote role. Hours are from from 9:00AM – 7:00PM EST

Responsibilities include:

Provide high-touch customer support across phone,
, and live chat, ensuring fast, clear, and personalized communication.

Manage the full order lifecycle — tracking shipments, confirming timelines, handling order changes, and keeping customers updated at every step.

Coordinate daily with suppliers to ensure smooth fulfillment, resolve delays, manage backorders, and process RMAs, returns, and warranties.

Maintain clean, accurate records inside Shopify, ClickUp, helpdesk tools, and Google Sheets, following all SOPs with precision.

Respond to and intercept chargebacks, communicate with customers to resolve disputes, and document all resolution steps.

Intercept shipments when needed to prevent incorrect or unwanted deliveries and coordinate actions with suppliers and Manage and maintain the Order Management System (OMS) to ensure all orders, statuses, timelines, and notes stay clean and up-to-date.

Troubleshoot customer issues quickly, take full ownership of complex cases, and proactively prevent problems before they reach the customer.

Deliver a concierge-level customer experience that reflects professionalism, clarity, and brand consistency.

Identify patterns, recurring issues, and opportunities to improve processes — and communicate insights to leadership.

Act as the bridge between customers, suppliers, and internal operations, ensuring seamless communication and smooth execution end-to-end.



To excel in this role, you must be able/have the following:

Fluent, accent-neutral English (C1/C2 level) — clear verbal and written communication is non-negotiable

1+ year of hands-on customer service experience (eCommerce experience strongly preferred)

Experience supporting customers across phone,
, and live chat

Ability to manage order tracking, supplier coordination, RMAs, returns, and shipping issues

Strong comfort using tools like Shopify, ClickUp, Gorgias/Helpdesk, Google Sheets, etc.

Ability to follow SOPs with precision while maintaining clean documentation

Strong organizational skills — able to manage multiple customer threads and timelines without losing details

Experience working inside an eCommerce environment (preferred, not required)

Ability to troubleshoot issues quickly and provide clear, solution-oriented responses

Demonstrated reliability — consistent attendance, strong follow-through, and accountability

Personal Traits:

You are patient, calm under pressure, and capable of handling stressful situations professionally

You think clearly, communicate clearly, and stay composed — even when dealing with difficult customers

You move fast without sacrificing accuracy

You’re a problem-solver — you can think deeply and make sound decisions on the fly

You anticipate issues before the customer ever feels them

You’re highly organized and detail-oriented — loose ends bother you

You take ownership — if something is unclear, you figure it out; if something breaks, you fix it

You’re reliable, consistent, and take pride in delivering a world-class experience

You’re coachable, open to feedback, and always improving

You’re naturally helpful, empathetic, and solutions-driven



What’s in it for you?

Competitive Salary

Fully Remote – Work from anywhere with full flexibility

Growth & Influence – Be part of a fast-scaling 7-figure brand where your work directly shapes the customer experience

10 Days Paid Time Off – Recharge and refresh with flexible PTO

Performance Bonuses – Earn more based on company and team results

Strong Team Culture – Join a supportive, disciplined team built on clarity, communication, and ownership

Please Note: This is a remote contractor role. Salary is gross and you are responsible for handling local taxes in your country of residence.



How to Apply

If this role sounds like a perfect fit, we’d love to hear from you. Here’s how to apply:

Step 1: Complete the google form 
/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSeIjMzd_TWeLC956wvnFs0fm9EWVALn-pbfpjBhHxr31nqL_g/viewform?usp=sharing&ouid=

title: Social Media Video Editor
description:
Part-Time Graphic Designer & Video Editor (Social Media)



About 10 hours per week



We’re looking for a detail-oriented Graphic Designer & Video Editor to support ongoing social media content. This is a part-time role with potential for long-term collaboration.



What You’ll Do

Edit short-form videos (Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts, Instagram, LinkedIn) and occasional long-form content

Create simple, clean graphics for social media

Follow clear instructions and bring ideas to life through editing

Apply current social media trends while keeping content aligned with our brand

Maintain consistency across all visuals



What We’re Looking For

Experience with video editing and graphic design

Familiarity with tools like Canva and CapCut (or similar)

STRONG attention to detail and ability to follow directions

Awareness of social media styles and trends

Willingness to learn, improve, and adapt



Tools

You can use your own tools, or we can provide access to Canva and CapCut.



What Matters Most

We care about the final result. You’ll be given clear direction and content, and your role is to execute it in a clean, engaging, and consistent way.



Application Questions (keep answers short and clear)



1. Write 2–3 sentences about your experience with video editing and graphic design.

Also include the word “Create” somewhere in your answer.



2. If I send you a video and ask you to make the first 3 seconds more engaging, what are 2–3 things you would look for or change?



3. How did you learn video editing and graphic design, and what do you currently do to stay updated with new trends or styles? Give a specific example.

title: Remote Dental Sales Representative — High-Ticket Inbound + Patient Reactivation
description:
? HIRING IMMEDIATELY — Start date: ASAP. Shortlisted candidates contacted within 48 hours.



We are a fast-growing Canadian dental group led by Dr. Michael J. Webster, operating two brands across Kelowna, BC and Vancouver, BC. We are looking for a top-tier remote sales representative to handle high-value dental leads and drive patient reactivation — starting now.



—— WHAT YOU'LL DO ——



NEW TEETH TODAY™ — HIGH-VALUE INBOUND (
)

New Teeth Today™ is our premium full-arch same-day dental implant programme, operating out of Kelowna Dental Centre and Yaletown Dentistry. You will be the first voice these patients hear. They are high-intent leads — often people who have struggled with their smile for years and are finally ready to change their lives. Your job is to listen, build trust, handle cost and fear objections with empathy, and convert them to a free consultation with our lead consultant, Hannah.



KELOWNA DENTAL CENTRE — OUTBOUND REACTIVATION (
)

You will proactively call lapsed Kelowna Dental Centre patients, re-engage them with the practice, and schedule their return appointment. This is warm outbound calling — patients who have been with us before.



—— WHAT WE NEED FROM YOU ——



? NEUTRAL, CLEAR ENGLISH — this is non-negotiable. New Teeth Today™ patients making life-changing decisions will not proceed if communication is unclear. Your English must be effortless for Canadian ears.

? 3+ years in phone-based sales — high-ticket, healthcare, or North American BPO accounts strongly preferred

? Experience with consultative, empathy-led sales — not just transactional appointment booking

? Comfortable and confident making outbound calls

? GoHighLevel (GHL) experience strongly preferred — you will manage multiple pipelines independently

? Background in dental, implant, cosmetic, or elective healthcare sales is a major advantage

? Quiet dedicated home office, 25+ Mbps wired internet, quality headset and webcam



—— TECH ——

GoHighLevel (GHL) · VoIP/softphone · CRM pipeline management · 25+ Mbps wired connection



—— COMPENSATION ——

Competitive base salary + performance bonus tied to New Teeth Today™ consultations booked and KDC reactivation appointments scheduled. Include your target monthly rate (USD) in your application.



—— HOW TO APPLY — 3 STEPS ——



1. Send your application with a summary of your most relevant sales experience and measurable results (appointments booked, conversion rates, revenue generated). Include your target monthly rate (USD).



2. Record a 60–90 second VIDEO introducing yourself and telling us how you would respond to a New Teeth Today™ lead who says: "I'm very interested but I'm worried about the cost." Upload to YouTube (unlisted) or Google Drive and include the link in your application. Applications without a video will NOT be reviewed



3. Top candidates will be invited to a 15-minute interview with Hannah, Lead Consultant at New Teeth Today™. Shortlisted applicants will be contacted within 48 hours.



We are looking for a long-term tea
mber. If you are the right person, you will be well compensated and well supported.

title: Outbound Sales Cold Calling for U.S. Based Grocery Leads – Phone Sales / Telemarketing
description:
Hi there! 



We’re looking for a reliable and professional outbound calling specialist for a sales-focused role engaging with U.S.-based independent natural grocery stores. While you’ll have a script to guide your conversations, we’re not looking for robotic script readers — we value warmth, adaptability, and the ability to foster genuine connections with friendly retail staff.



?



About Us

Weave Sales is a U.S.-based team that helps brands grow through personalized outreach and smart communication to independent natural grocery stores. We’re passionate about building meaningful business relationships and operate with trust, consistency, and strong communication at the core of everything we do. You can look us up at 
.



This position is ideal for someone looking for a long-term, stable remote role with clear expectations and daily structure. Additionally, our phone sales program is popular and scaling rapidly – if you excel, there is room for promotion and training/managing new tea
mbers next year.



This is a long-term opportunity for someone who:

- Speaks fluent English with a neutral or near-neutral accent

- Has excellent internet connection (see below)

- Can show up consistently, on time, every day

- Is confident and comfortable making outbound calls



Work Schedule (Required)

- Full-time: Monday to Friday

- Hours: 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM Eastern Standard Time (EST)

- You must be punctual and available every day during this time — no exceptions.



Initial Application Instructions

- Upload a 2–5 minute Loom video answering the questions listed below

- Share a screenshot of your internet speed test

- Provide details about your internet provider, computer, and headset setup



Loom Video Instructions

Please record a Loom video (2–5 minutes) answering the following:



1. What’s your name and where are you located?

2. Tell us about your work experience — especially related to phone calls or outbound work.

3. How would you rate your English (1–10) and why?

4. Why do you want to work with our team?

5. Are you comfortable working 9–5 EST and making daily outbound calls?

6. What is your internet speed and provider?

7. Briefly describe your headset and work environment.



???? *Please speak naturally — don’t read a script. We want to get a sense of your real communication style.*



Compensation: 

Base rate: $4–$8 USD per hour (depending on experience)

Bonus for each successful appointment that leads to a placement or reorder



? It is very achievable to earn $8/hour or more once bonuses are included — even with modest success.



This is not a hard-selling role — placements and reorders are quite common and easy to attain for most brands/products you will be selling.



Think you’re a great fit? We’d love to hear from you! We review applications as they come in! Apply now and take the first step in joining a fast-growing, mission-driven team!

title: Outbound Caller (Telemarketing & Appointment Setting) – U.S. Leads
description:
Hi there!



We’re hiring a remote, phone-based outbound caller to support a rapidly growing Phone Sales program calling independent U.S. natural grocery stores. Clear, accent-neutral spoken English is required, as you’ll be speaking directly with U.S. store staff all day. The ability to think on your feet to navigate gatekeepers and buyer questions in a non-salesy demeanor is also required. This is a soft sales position.



This role is focused on outbound calls to retail stores to secure new free placements and to drive reorders from stores where free placements have already been made. The primary objective is to obtain a verbal yes on the call, while also collecting the necessary contact information, such as an
 address, to support follow-up and order execution.



This is a long-term opportunity for someone who:

- Speaks fluent English with a neutral or near-neutral accent

- Has a minimum of two years of experience in the BPO industry, appointment setting, or telemarketing sales.

- Has excellent internet connection and a HIGH quality headset (see below)

- Can show up consistently, on time, every day

- Is confident and comfortable making outbound calls + can think on your feet



Work Schedule (Required)

- Full-time: Monday to Friday

- Hours: 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM Eastern Standard Time (EST)

- You must be punctual and available every day during this time — no exceptions.



Initial Application Instructions

To apply, please complete this short form:



You’ll be asked to:

- Upload a 2–4 minute Loom video answering the questions listed below

- Share a screenshot of your internet speed test

- Provide details about your internet provider, computer, and headset setup



Loom Video Instructions

Please record a Loom video (2–4 minutes) answering the following:



1. What’s your name and where are you located?

2. Tell us about your work experience — especially related to phone calls or outbound work.

3. Describe your ability to think on your feet and navigate objections or gatekeepers.

4. How would you rate your English (1–10) and why?

5. Why do you want to work with our team?

6. Are you comfortable working 9–5 EST and making daily outbound calls?

7. Your internet speed and provider, and whether you can connect via wired ethernet/LAN.

8. Briefly describe your headset, how it connects to your computer, and your work environment.



*Please speak naturally — DON’T read a script. We want to get a sense of your real communication style.*



Compensation:

Rate: $4–$6+ USD per hour (depending on experience & bonus)

Bonus for each successful placement or reorder



It is very achievable to earn $8/hour or more once bonuses are included — even with modest success.



This is not a hard-selling role — free placements and reorders are quite common and easy to attain for most brands/products you will be selling.



Think you’re a great fit? We’d love to hear from you! We review applications as they come in! Apply now and take the first step in joining a fast-growing, mission-driven team!

title: Airtable + Softr Expert (UI/UX + Automation Builder)
description:
We’re looking for a highly skilled Airtable + Softr expert to help us build clean, scalable internal tools and client-facing applications.



This role is for someone who is both:



Strong technically (Airtable architecture, automations, integrations)

Strong on the front-end (Softr UI/UX, clean user experience)



What You’ll Be Doing:



Build and optimize Airtable databases (structure, relationships, logic)

Create automations (Airtable, Zapier/Make, APIs)

Design and build Softr front-end interfaces for internal tools and client portals

Connect workflows across multiple tools (CRM, forms, APIs, etc.)

Improve and scale existing systems



Requirements:



Proven experience with Airtable (advanced level)

Proven experience with Softr (must have built multiple live apps/interfaces)

Strong understanding of relational databases and automation logic

Experience with n8n, Zapier, Make, or similar tools

Ability to think in systems and build clean, scalable solutions

Strong communication and ability to work independently



Links or screenshots of Softr apps/interfaces you’ve built

Brief explanation of your role in each project

Your favorite automation you’ve built (and why)



Applications without examples of Softr work will not be considered.



Nice to Have:



Experience with GoHighLevel or CRMs

API integrations

Basic UI/UX design sense

title: Project Coordinator / Intake Specialist
description:
We are seeking a highly organized Project Coordinator / Intake Specialist to act as the bridge between incoming requests and execution teams. This role is ideal for someone who can analyze requests logically, transform them into structured workflows, and coordinate delivery while maintaining clear and effective communication with stakeholders.



The ideal candidate combines strong analytical thinking with excellent communication skills, enabling them to manage expectations, ensure clarity, and keep projects moving efficiently across teams.



Key Responsibilities



Request Intake & Task Translation

- Review incoming client or internal requests and convert unstructured or complex inputs into clear project briefs, tickets, or templates for execution teams.



Task Triage & Prioritization

- Assess requests based on scope, urgency, dependencies, and required resources, then assign them to the appropriate team or workflow.



Stakeholder Coordination

- Communicate with clients and internal teams to gather missing details, clarify requirements, and ensure alignment before execution begins.



Workflow Tracking & Follow-Through

- Monitor task progress, maintain accurate documentation, and ensure smooth movement of deliverables from intake to completion.



Qualifications



- Strong English communication skills (written and verbal)

- Experience in project coordination, client operations, or workflow management

- Ability to analyze ambiguous requests and convert them into actionable steps

- Strong organizational and documentation skills

- Ability to manage multiple priorities across teams

- High attention to detail and strong problem-solving skills

- Experience working in remote or distributed teams

- Familiarity with project management or ticketing tools (e.g., Hubspot, Asana, ClickUp, Monday, Jira, Trello)

- Experience in client-facing operations or service delivery environments

- Able to stay calm under pressure and handle multiple priorities



How to Apply



If you’re interested, please send your:

- Resume link

- Availability

- Monthly expected salary (in USD)

title: Real Estate Manager
description:
Job Title: High-Tier Account Manager (SaaS & Real Estate) – $2,500+/mo + Bonuses

Location: Remote (Must work Canadian EST/PST Hours)

Role: Client Success, Onboarding & Growth Coaching

Industry: Real Estate Technology (SaaS)



The Mission

We are the fast-growing real estate platform in Canada. We don’t just sell software; we help real estate agents become the go to agent in their area.



We are looking for a High-Status Account Manager who can take a new client from "just signed up" to "Real Estate Pro." You aren't a support rep; you are a Growth Consultant.



The Role: Your Daily "Wins"

White-Glove Onboarding: Lead high-energy "Launch Calls" with top-producing agents. You’ll ensure their AI is trained, their branding is perfect, and they have their first "Wow" 
nt within the first 30 minutes.



Strategic Coaching: You will host group coaching sessions to ensure agents are actually using the tools to generate GCI (Gross Commission Income).



Webinar Mastery: Host weekly "Mastermind" webinars for our community to show off new features, share success stories, and keep engagement high.



Churn Defense: Monitor account health. If an agent isn't logging in, you reach out proactively to get them back on track.



Revenue Expansion: Tag-team with the Sales team to move successful agents from monthly plans to Annual Managed Territories.



Must-Have Requirements (Do not apply if you don't have these):

SaaS or Real Estate Background: You must have experience as an Account Manager for a software company OR have worked in Real Estate (ISA, Team Lead, or Admin). You must know what a "listing," "escrow," and "CRM pipeline" are.



English Mastery: Your verbal and written English must be Tier 1. You will be speaking with high-net-worth Canadian business owners daily.



The "Consultant" Voice: You can lead a meeting, handle an ego-driven agent, and pivot a conversation toward ROI.



Tech Fluency: You are comfortable with CRM logic, AI triggers, and Zoom/Webinar platforms.



Why Join Us?

High-Growth Environment: We are dominating the Canadian market and expanding fast.



Competitive Pay: We pay above-market rates for the Philippines because we expect world-class results.



Performance Bonuses: We reward retention and upsells. If our clients win, you win.



Long-Term Career: We aren't looking for a freelancer; we want a core tea
mber.



?? HOW TO APPLY (Mandatory Step)

We do not read generic resumes. To be considered, you must:

Send a Video Introduction (Loom or Google Drive link). 

Include the word "TERRITORY" in your subject line so we know you read this.

title: Customer Service & Outbound Calling Specialist (HVAC/Plumbing – Full Time, Remote)
description:
???? ABOUT US



We are 3R Plumbing & Mechanical, a fast-growing, veteran-owned HVAC and plumbing company based in Massachusetts.



We are building a high-performance team focused on:



Excellent customer service

Fast response times

Maximizing booked calls and revenue



We are looking for a motivated, reliable Virtual Assistant to handle inbound calls and outbound calling campaigns.



???? ROLE OVERVIEW



This position is a mix of:



Inbound call handling (booking service calls)

Outbound calling (following up, rehashing unsold jobs, maintenance reminders)



You will be a key part of our call center and revenue team.



???? RESPONSIBILITIES

???? Inbound Calls (Weekends + Overflow Weekdays)

Answer incoming customer calls

Book service appointments in our system

Handle basic customer questions

Route emergency calls properly

???? Outbound Calling (Primary Role)

Call past customers to:

Book service/maintenance

Follow up on unsold estimates

Promote memberships

Work through daily call lists

Use scripts (we will train you)

Track outcomes of each call

???? SCHEDULE

Required:

Weekends (Saturday + Sunday): Full coverage

Weekdays: Flexible hours (part-time or full-time available)



???? Must be available during U.S. Eastern Time (EST) hours



???? REQUIREMENTS

MUST HAVE:

Excellent English (clear speaking, minimal accent)

Confident on the phone (sales experience is a PLUS)

Reliable internet + quiet workspace

Headset with good microphone

Experience with:

Customer service OR call center OR sales

HUGE PLUS:

Experience with:

HVAC / Plumbing / Home Services

CRM systems (ServiceTitan is a BIG PLUS)

Outbound dialing / cold calling

title: IT Engineer
description:
We are a US-based Managed Service Provider (MSP) seeking a skilled and motivated IT Engineer to join our dynamic team. This role offers a unique blend of IT project implementation and day-to-day technical support responsibilities, providing an excellent opportunity to grow your skills in a supportive and collaborative environment.



As an IT Engineer, you will play a key role in maintaining and improving our clients’ IT environments, troubleshooting issues, and contributing to exciting IT projects. If you’re passionate about technology, problem-solving, and delivering exceptional service, we’d love to hear from you!



Key Responsibilities:

**Provide Level 2 technical support for hardware, software, and network issues, escalating complex problems as needed.

*Plan and implement IT projects, ensuring timely and successful delivery.

*Troubleshoot and resolve issues related to desktops, servers, and networks.

*Perform PC maintenance, upgrades, and installations.

*Manage and support user equipment, software, and services remotely.

*Document work thoroughly and update the ticketing system to ensure transparency and efficiency.



Technologies You’ll Work With:

*Operating Systems: Windows and Mac desktop environments, Windows Server.

*Networking: Cisco, Ubiquiti, Fortinet, and general networking concepts.

*Cloud Platforms: Microsoft 365 and Azure.



What We’re Looking For:

**Experienced L2 IT Support role

*Strong troubleshooting skills for hardware, software, and networks.

*Familiarity with Microsoft 365, Windows Server, and networking concepts.

*Excellent communication and customer service skills.

*A proactive, problem-solving mindset with the ability to work independently and as part of a team.



Preferred but Not Required:

*Certifications such as Network+, Microsoft Certified, or CCNA.

*Experience with firewalls, VPNs, and virtual environments.



Why Join Us?



We believe in creating an environment where our tea
mbers can thrive both professionally and personally. Here’s what we offer:



*Career Growth: Paid certifications, training, and structured onboarding to help you advance your skills.

*Attractive Compensation: Competitive salary, performance-based incentives (monthly profit share and end-of-year bonus), and 13th-month pay.

*Health & Wellness: Monthly healthcare allowance to support your well-being.

*Work-Life Balance: 100% remote work with company-provided equipment.

*Supportive Culture: Be part of a forward-thinking team that values collaboration, innovation, and having fun while doing great work.



What Sets Us Apart?



*Performance-Based Rewards: Monthly profit sharing and bonuses for high-performing tea
mbers.

*Continuous Learning: We invest in your growth with paid certifications and training.

*Collaborative Environment: Work with a team that values your input and supports your success.

*Flexibility: Enjoy the freedom of remote work while contributing to impactful projects.



How to Apply

If you’re ready to take your IT career to the next level, we’d love to hear from you! Apply now and join a team that’s passionate about technology, growth, and delivering exceptional service.



**Submit your application and include the numbers (3136) in your subject line. This helps us ensure you’ve read the full job description.



**Please also attach your updated CV to your application or provide a link to your CV. Applications without a CV will not be considered.



**Currently looking for candidates in NCR or nearby areas of the Philippines



*** The working hours for this role are 2:00 PM -11:00 PM CST with an hour of Lunch break, Monday to Friday.



We look forward to hearing from you.

title: AI Image & Video Designer
description:
WHO WE ARE LOOKING FOR



We are seeking an AI Creative Expert with strong visual taste, technical skill, and a forward-thinking approach to content creation to support the visual content production of a startup jewelry brand.



You should have a solid background in graphic design, experience creating brand assets, and hands-on expertise using AI tools for images and video. A strong portfolio and an exceptional eye for aesthetics are essential, particularly in producing realistic, high-quality visuals and creatively showcasing jewelry in compelling ways across fashion and lifestyle contexts.



Requirements:

- At least 2 years of experience in graphic design, digital creatives, or AI visual content creation

- Proven experience creating website graphics and brand visual assets

- Hands-on experience with AI tools for realistic image and video generation such as Midjourney, DALL·E, Runway, Pika, Adobe Firefly, or similar

- Strong proficiency in design tools such as Adobe Creative Suite, Canva, or similar

- Ability to translate brand identity into visually striking and creative jewelry presentations

- Strong sense of color, typography, composition, and motion visuals

- Ability to work efficiently, meet deadlines, and incorporate feedback

- Experience with beauty, lifestyle, fashion, jewelry, or consumer brands is a strong advantage

- Good command of English with clear, professional communication

- Familiarity with Google Workspace, Notion, or similar collaboration tools



WORK SCHEDULE / DETAILS

- Flexible working schedule. You manage your own hours but must be available for coordination or updates between 3:00 PM and 11:00 PM PHT when needed.

Type: Project-based with opportunity for long-term collaboration

Location: Fully remote



Expected Weekly Output:

100 to 200 realistic AI-generated images featuring jewelry products, lifestyle scenes, or brand visuals

10 to 15 short-form AI-generated videos that creatively showcase jewelry for social media and marketing



HOW TO APPLY

Please follow the instructions carefully. Applications that do not follow the steps below will not be considered. Only shortlisted applicants will be contacted.



- Include the phrase "Amazing AI" in your application.

- Introduction: Briefly introduce yourself, state your interest in the role, and summarize your relevant experience. Include the design and AI tools you regularly use.

- Portfolio: Provide a link to your portfolio showcasing AI-generated images and videos. Include at least one realistic AI-generated jewelry image and one creative AI-generated jewelry video sample.

- Rates: State your expected project-based rates in USD.

title: Social Media Content Creator & Video Editor
description:
SOCIAL MEDIA CONTENT CREATOR & VIDEO EDITOR

East Coast Tree Care & Lawn Company | Remote | Part-Time / Project-Based



ABOUT US

We are a family-owned tree care and lawn company that has served homeowners, municipalities, and commercial properties across the East Coast since 1964. Our team of certified arborists and lawn care professionals are known for science-driven tree and plant health care. Our social media presence should reflect that same expertise and professionalism.

Our brand voice is educational, trustworthy, and grounded in real horticultural science — not hype.



THE ROLE

We're looking for a creative, detail-oriented Social Media Content Creator who can produce both static graphics and short-form video content for Instagram,
, and TikTok. You will work closely with our marketing team to develop posts that are visually on-brand and engaging to a homeowner audience in the northeastern United States.

This is not a "post and ghost" role. We want someone who genuinely understands visual storytelling, thinks critically about what makes content perform, and brings creative ideas to the table — not just executes templates.



WHAT YOU'LL BE DOING



Design static social media graphics (posts, stories, carousels) aligned to brand guidelines

Edit short-form video content for Reels, TikTok, and
 — including captions, transitions, music, and text overlays

Research competitor brands in the tree care and landscaping industry and analyze what's working in their content strategy

Propose original post ideas based on seasonal timing, trending formats, and our brand pillars

Prepare a regular content calendar with captions and post assets ready for team review

Maintain consistency in logo placement, color palette, fonts, and tone across all posts

Make edits based on feedback quickly and accurately





MUST-HAVE SKILLS



Proficiency in Canva, Adobe Photoshop, Illustrator, or similar design tools

Video editing experience — CapCut, Adobe Premiere, DaVinci Resolve, or similar

Ability to add captions/subtitles, transitions, text overlays, and audio to short-form videos

Strong written English — you will write or refine social media captions

Experience creating content for a brand's social media accounts (not just a personal page)

Ability to research competing brands and write a brief analysis of their content strategy

Exceptional attention to detail — incorrect spelling, off-brand colors, or cropped logos are dealbreakers

Reliable internet connection and ability to meet deadlines consistently



NICE TO HAVE



Experience with home services, landscaping, or green industry brands

Familiarity with the U.S. seasonal calendar and northeastern climate

Experience with scheduling tools (Later, Buffer, Meta Business Suite)

Motion graphics or animated post experience





OUR FOUR CONTENT PILLARS

All content we produce fits within one of these four pillars. Understanding them will be essential to your work:



Experts in the Science of Landscapes — Educational posts rooted in real arboriculture, plant health, and lawn science. No fluff, no oversimplification.

We Understand Current Conditions — Timely content tied to what's happening seasonally: pest pressure, storm damage, drought, disease outbreaks, etc.

Happy Customers — Testimonials, before/after photography, and showcasing the results of our work.

Employee Spotlights — Featuring our certified arborists, climbers, and crew members to humanize the brand.





WHAT TO INCLUDE IN YOUR APPLICATION



A brief introduction about yourself and your background in social media content creation

Links to 3–5 examples of social media graphics or videos you've created for a brand (not personal accounts)

A short paragraph on how you would approach creating content for a tree care company — what would you research first, and what platforms would you prioritize?

Your answers to the quiz questions below (required)

Your availability and preferred rate (per post, per hour, or monthly retainer)





APPLICATION QUIZ — REQUIRED

Applications that do not include answers to all four questions will not be reviewed.

Q1: What year was this company founded, and what region of the U.S. do we serve?

(Hint: The answer is in this job post.)

Q2: Name two of our four content pillars and give a one-sentence example of a social post that would fit each one.

(Hint: The pillars are listed above.)

Q3: Find one tree care, landscaping, or lawn care company on Instagram that you think has strong social media content. What is their handle, and in 2–3 sentences, what do they do well?

(This requires a quick search — we want to see how you think about competitor content.)

Q4: To confirm you read this entire post — begin your application message with the phrase "Green Roots, Strong Branches" as the very first line. Applications that do not start with this phrase will not be reviewed.



HOW TO APPLY

Send your application using the Apply button on this listing. Include everything listed above along with your quiz answers. We review applications on a rolling basis and respond to every serious applicant. Portfolio links are required — applications without samples will not be considered.

title: Admin & Marketing Assistant
description:
PLEASE NOTE:

1. This job is open: we won't make a decision until next week

2. We are committed to going through all applicants. Even if there are many, you should apply. We are looking for the right person



Hello ????

I run several small businesses and products and also consult for a few companies on product development and strategy. I previously founded, grew, and sold a software development agency: so there's a lot going on at any given time. I need someone to help me bring order to the chaos and execute on marketing tasks I know exactly how to do but don't have the time for.





PLEASE

Read this job description carefully. You are much more likely to get this job if:

1. You don't copy-paste some AI response to our questions

2. You read carefully and provide everything we request





## What is the job about?

This is a hybrid Admin Assistant + Marketing Executor role. You'll support me across multiple businesses and projects with two types of work:



Admin & operations — the unglamorous but essential stuff: bookkeeping tasks, organizing documents, managing inboxes, preparing presentations, matching invoices to transactions, and keeping things from falling through the cracks.



Marketing execution — following clear directions (and sometimes figuring things out yourself) to get marketing work done: scheduling social media posts, sourcing leads, researching influencers, preparing demos, creating AI-generated promo videos, reaching out to partners, and more.



You do NOT need to be a marketing expert. You need to be sharp, resourceful, and able to follow instructions well... while also having enough taste and initiative to move things forward without me micromanaging every step.



What will you be doing?

In no particular order:

- Bookkeeping support — uploading invoices, matching bank transactions, reconciling spreadsheets

- Lead research — using tools I'll provide to find and compile prospect lists based on criteria (company size, industry, location, etc.)

- Influencer & partnership outreach — researching potential partners, reaching out according to templates we define together, managing relationships

- Demo preparation — setting up product demos for leads/customers following given instructions

- Content & social media — creating posting schedules, defining what gets posted when, using AI tools to generate promotional videos

-
/support inbox management — responding to questions, investigating user issues with internal tools, drafting responses for approval

- GTM support — reaching out to targets for consulting initiatives, light negotiation, keeping me in the loop

- Partner program management — keeping a webpage updated, onboarding new partners

- A variety of other admin + marketing tasks — these will evolve as we go



What does the engagement look like?

This is not a traditional role with a manual you follow every day. The tasks change daily. Some days are boring and repetitive. Other days are creative and strategic. You need to be comfortable with both.

I'm juggling a lot and won't always have time for long briefings. You'll often get short instructions (or video walkthroughs) and need to run with them. Initiative matters enormously here.



## How many hours? How does it progress?

Starting at 100–120 hours/month (~25-30h/week). There is clear growth potential to full-time (160h/month) as we prove the fit and workload increases.



## What are the requirements?

Stable internet connection

Ability to do video calls

Fluent in English (written and spoken)

Availability must overlap at least 4–5 hours with Lisbon/Portugal time

Highly organized and detail-oriented

Comfortable switching between very different tasks throughout the day

Resourceful — you Google things (or ChatGPT-them), you figure things out, you don't wait to be unblocked

Basic comfort with spreadsheets,
, and common online tools

Marketing experience is a plus but not required

Bookkeeping/admin experience is a plus but not required



## Why should you care?

This is an immense opportunity to learn and grow. You'll be exposed to multiple businesses, tools, marketing strategies, and AI products. For the right person — someone curious, proactive, and hungry to learn — this can be a career accelerator.



## How to apply?

Send your cover letter and introduction.

You MUST answer our screening questions or you will be immediately disqualified.

You MUST submit a introduction video or you will be immediately disqualified. Why? We need to see that you are proficient in English without back and forth.



?? TO APPLY: You MUST answer the following 4 questions in your application message. Applications without answers will not be reviewed.



Record a short video (1-2 min) introducing yourself and why this role fits you. Paste the link (Loom, YouTube, Google Drive — any works).

Are you available to start soon? How many hours/week, and what hours in CET do you overlap with?

Describe a time you were given a vague task and had to figure it out yourself. What did you do?

Which tasks in this post are you most comfortable with, and which would be new to you?

title: SEO Assistant

About the Role

Meet deadlines without compromising attention to detail.

Continuous Learning & Creativity

Suggest new ideas and innovative approaches to enhance content quality.



Requirements

Proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro – essential for advanced editing.

Knowledge of VFX tools such as Adobe After Effects or Blender.

Ability to create animations and work with 3D models.

Strong understanding of visual storytelling, pacing, and narrative flow.

Excellent attention to detail and a creative eye.

Familiarity with exporting content across multiple platforms and devices.

Ability to manage multiple projects under tight deadlines.

Strong collaboration and communication skills for working with remote teams.



Work Schedule

Hours: 40 hours per week

Days: Monday to Friday

100% remote – must have reliable internet connection and ability to collaborate online.

title: Meta Ads Specialist (Property Investment | Lead Generation | Long-Term Role)
description:
We are a UK-based property business looking for a Meta Ads specialist to help us generate high-quality seller leads from
 and Instagram.



This is not a typical “run ads” role.



We are focused on one outcome:



Getting landlords to sell their properties to our investor clients.



You will be responsible for building, managing and improving campaigns that generate real conversations, not just clicks or low-quality leads.



This is a pay for campaign role, with a view to full time employment.



What You’ll Be Doing

Setting up and managing Meta ad campaigns (lead generation + conversion)

Testing different ad creatives and messaging

Improving cost per lead and cost per qualified enquiry

Working with our team to refine funnels (lead form ? call booking ? sale)

Monitoring performance and making data-driven decisions

Setting up and managing pixel + conversions API (via GoHighLevel)



What Success Looks Like

Consistent flow of qualified landlord enquiries

Cost per lead in the £20–£35 range

Strong conversion from lead ? call ? deal

Clear reporting on what’s working and what isn’t



Requirements

Proven experience running Meta ads for lead generation

Strong understanding of conversion-focused campaigns (not engagement)

Experience with
 Pixel and Conversions API

Ability to analyse data and make decisions independently

Good written English

Reliable and responsive





Experience in property, real estate or financial services

Experience using GoHighLevel

Experience improving landing pages or funnels



Important

We are not looking for someone who:



Focuses on vanity metrics (likes, comments, reach)

Needs constant direction

Blames the algorithm instead of improving the message



We want someone who takes ownership and improves results.



Pay

Starting part-time (hours flexible)

Competitive rate based on experience

Opportunity to move into a full-time role with long-term growth

To Apply



Please answer the following:



What is the best cost per lead you have achieved on Meta ads?

What type of business was it for?

How do you improve lead quality, not just volume?

What would you test first in a campaign like this?

title: EXECUTIVE ASSISTANT – OPERATIONS & FOLLOW-UP
description:
Remote | Full-time | Long-term



I’m hiring an Executive Assistant – Operations to work directly with me and act as the execution backbone of my businesses.



This is not a task-based VA role.

This is a coordination, follow-up, and execution role.



If you need constant instructions, avoid follow-ups, or give generic updates, do not apply.



???? CONTEXT



I manage multiple businesses and projects, including:



E-commerce B2C (DTC brands)



E-commerce B2B (sourcing, suppliers, services)



Operations across Asia (China / SEA), North Africa, and international markets



Fast-moving, multi-project, multi-timezone environment.



???? YOUR MISSION



You are the central operations point between:



Founder (me)



Freelancers



Suppliers



Internal collaborators



Your responsibility is simple:

???? Make sure things get done, on time, without excuses.



???? CORE RESPONSIBILITIES



Track tasks, deadlines, and priorities across projects



Follow up proactively with freelancers and collaborators



Identify delays, blockers, and risks early



Push execution when people are late or unclear



Maintain task boards (Asana / ClickUp) and documentation (Notion)



Prepare short, clear daily or weekly execution summaries



Support calendar and priority management



Ensure execution continues even when instructions are minimal



?? IMPORTANT (READ CAREFULLY)



This role is execution-first, not strategic at the start



You must be comfortable following up, reminding, escalating, and insisting



Generic VA profiles will be rejected



If you dislike chasing people, this role is not for you



? HOW TO APPLY (MANDATORY)



Answer ALL questions below.

?? Incomplete, vague, or AI-generated answers will be rejected.



1?? Past Experience (LAST TWO ROLES ONLY)



For each role, clearly specify:



Country of the founder / manager



Exact position / title



Type of business (e-commerce B2C, B2B, agency, startup, etc.)



Daily responsibilities in detail (real tasks you handled every day)



2?? Freelancer / Team Coordination



Have you managed freelancers or remote teams? (Yes / No)



If yes, explain exactly how:



follow-ups



task tracking



handling delays or no-responses



quality control



3?? Tools – REAL PRACTICAL LEVEL



For each tool, indicate level + real usage:



Notion



Asana / ClickUp / Monday



Google Docs / Sheets / Drive



OnlineJobs / Upwork (assistant or employer side)



4?? Languages



Languages you speak or write



Level for each (native / fluent / professional / basic)



5?? Availability



Current timezone



Weekly availability (hours)



6?? Mandatory Question (MAX 3–5 lines)



A freelancer is late and not responding. What do you do, step by step?



???? Budget Transparency



Full-time role.

Monthly budget: USD 900–1,000.

Confirm if this range works for you.



???? Short, generic, copied, or AI-style replies = automatic rejection.



I’m looking for someone reliable, structured, proactive, and execution-driven for a long-term collaboration.



Youssef

title: Remote Administrator - SOP Implementation & Admin Support
description:
Job Title

Remote Administrator – SOP Implementation & Admin Support



Job Type

Part-time Remote Contractor (Philippines)



Hours

Minimum 10 hours per week to start, with the possibility of additional hours as the role develops or when required.



Pay and Hours 

This role will start at $4.01- $5.67 per hour for a suitable candidate, and depending on experience this may be reviewed. It is likely there will be the opportunity  for additional hours and increased responsibility as the role develops.



About the Business

Sowena operates across three property businesses in the UK:

• Sowena Property – property investment and portfolio management

• Sowena Lettings – management of our own property portfolio

• Sowena Stays – serviced accommodation

The business is run by property investors and mentors Ginny Lean and Jeremy Grigg.

We are currently implementing new Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs) to improve organisation, efficiency, and systems across the business.

You will work with Ginny, Jer and our existing administrator Karen to help implement these systems and support the day-to-day administration of the business.



Purpose of the Role

The purpose of this role is to support the Sowena team by:

• Implementing Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs)

• Keeping tasks organised in Asana

• Supporting administration across the business

• Maintaining organised systems and records

This role is ideal for someone who enjoys organisation, systems and structured processes.



Key Responsibilities

SOP Implementation

• Assist with implementing new administrative SOPs

• Help document and maintain business processes

• Ensure tasks follow established procedures



Task & Workflow Management

• Organise and manage tasks in Asana

• Track deadlines and follow-ups

• Ensure tasks are completed on time



Administrative Support

• General administration support

• Updating spreadsheets and documents

• Managing digital records and files

• Supporting communication when required



CRM Management

• Maintain contact records in LACRM (Less Annoying CRM)

• Keep contact databases organised and updated



Marketing Support

• Support
 campaigns using Mailchimp

• Maintain contact lists and campaign records



Director Support

• Assist with diary coordination where required

• Help track business tasks and priorities



Required Skills

Candidates should have experience with:

• Microsoft Office and Google Workspace

• Asana (or similar task management software)

• CRM systems

• Mailchimp or similar
 marketing platforms

You must also:

• Speak clear and professional English

• Be highly organised and reliable

• Have strong attention to detail

• Be comfortable learning new systems and processes



Technical Requirements

Candidates must have:

• Fast and stable internet connection

• A reliable computer

• A quiet working environment

• Ability to attend Microsoft Teams meetings



Application Instructions

Please
 us with your CV and Cover Letter to: 


 

Insert in the subject line: SOP Implementation & Admin Support

=

Real Estate Property Management VA



About the Role



Are you organized, confident, and ready to take on a key role in property management?



Smartland is seeking a skilled Real Estate Property Management VA / Property Manager Assistant who thrives in a fast-paced environment, communicates with ease, and keeps operations running smoothly. If you enjoy problem-solving, supporting tenants, and ensuring everything stays on track, this opportunity is for you.



Compensation

Paid weekly

What You’ll Do

Excellent spoken English

Competitive pay with room for growth



Supportive, professional team



Valuable experience in U.S. real estate property management



Long-term career advancement opportunities

title: Junior Accountant
description:
Remote Junior Accountant

Finance Operations | Full-Time | Remote | CDT Hours

Build Financial Clarity. Move Fast. Eliminate Friction.

Question. Delete. Optimize. Accelerate. Automate.



Bolt Farm Treehouse operates like a high-performance system—where speed, accuracy, and ownership drive everything. Behind every unforgettable guest experience is a clean, reliable financial engine.



We’re hiring a Full-time contractor Virtual Assistant / Junior Accountant to execute daily financial operations with precision, maintain real-time accuracy, and free up leadership to focus on forward planning and growth.



This is not a passive support role. You are a detail-obsessed operator who ensures every transaction, report, and reconciliation is clean, complete, and on time.



ABOUT BOLT FARM

Bolt Farm Treehouse is an award-winning mountaintop retreat and spa in Tennessee creating life-changing luxury experiences in nature-immersed settings.



Our mission is to build iconic destinations that inspire deeper connection, reflection, and romance. The brand blends architectural innovation, hospitality design, and operational systems that allow each property to scale while maintaining a magical guest experience.



We operate as an AI-first company where data dashboards, automation, and digital systems power decision-making so the team can focus on what matters most: building extraordinary places people never forget.



Core Values (BAM-WOW)

Best is the Standard – Accuracy and excellence in every detail



All-In Ownership – Own outcomes, not tasks



Move Fast – Speed with precision



Wow Every Guest – Excellence behind the scenes fuels guest experience



Your Mission

Maintain a clean, accurate, and real-time financial system through daily execution and reconciliation—ensuring leadership always has decision-ready data.









What You’ll Own

Perform nightly revenue reconciliations across systems



Manage and categorize transactions in QuickBooks Online (QBO)



Review and track expenses in Ramp (coding, follow-ups, accuracy)



Support Gusto payroll reviews and reporting checks



Assist in building and maintaining financial SOPs (e.g., “Payroll Bible”)



Generate daily and weekly reports for leadership visibility



Identify discrepancies and flag issues proactively



Maintain clean records across multiple entities



Execute administrative finance tasks to reduce leadership load



Success Metrics (First 90–180 Days)

100% of nightly reconciliations completed on time and error-free



Financial data remains clean, organized, and audit-ready



Reduction in discrepancies and rework



Improved operational efficiency in finance workflows



Measurable time saved for leadership



What You Bring

3–5 years of accounting or bookkeeping experience (multi-entity preferred)



Strong proficiency in QuickBooks Online



Experience with Ramp, Gusto, or similar tools



High attention to detail and consistency



Ability to work independently in a remote, fast-paced environment



Strong communication and proactive problem-solving



Organized, reliable, and execution-focused



Preferred (Not Required)

Experience in hospitality, construction, or startup environments



Familiarity with automation tools or AI workflows



Experience supporting finance leaders



You’ll Thrive Here If…

You take pride in clean, accurate systems



You move quickly without sacrificing quality



You operate with high ownership and low oversight



You proactively solve problems and flag issues early



You enjoy being the operational backbone of a fast-moving team



This Role Is NOT for You If…

You require constant direction or reminders



You struggle with detail, accuracy, or consistency



You prefer slow-paced or highly structured environments



You avoid ownership or accountability



You have difficulty working independently in a remote setting



Compensation & Details

Location: Remote



Schedule: Full-Time (30–35 hours/week)



Compensation: $12–$15/hour



Why This Role Matters

This role directly improves operational efficiency and ensures our financial systems remain clean, scalable, and decision-ready.



At Bolt Farm, clarity drives speed. Your work enables better decisions, faster execution, and a stronger company.



BOLT FARM Where speed meets legendary. ????

title: Paid Ads Specialist
description:
About the Company

Keystone Click is a Milwaukee-based B2B digital marketing agency that helps manufacturers, professional services firms, and growth-stage companies build pipelines through strategy-led digital marketing. We punch above our weight, combining sharp strategy with hands-on execution across SEO, content, paid media, and marketing automation. Our team is collaborative, process-driven, and committed to measurable results.



Position Overview

We’re looking for a Part-Time Paid Social Media Specialist based in the Philippines to own the day-to-day planning, execution, and optimization of paid social campaigns across 
 and
/Meta for our portfolio of B2B clients. You’ll work closely with our Account Manager, content team, and account strategists to translate client goals into high-performing ad campaigns that generate qualified leads and measurable pipelines. This is a part-time contract role at a rate of $10/hr, with a strong possibility to grow into a full-time position based on performance and business needs.



Key Responsibilities

Plan, build, launch, and manage paid social campaigns on LinkedIn Campaign Manager and Meta Ads Manager 
 & Instagram) across multiple client accounts.

 Develop audience targeting strategies including custom audiences, lookalike audiences, retargeting segments, and ABM-style targeting on LinkedIn.

Write compelling ad copy and collaborate with creative resources on ad visuals, carousels, and video assets tailored to B2B audiences.

Monitor campaign performance daily; optimize for KPIs such as CPL, CTR, ROAS, and conversion rates through A/B testing, bid adjustments, and budget reallocation.

Build and maintain campaign dashboards and performance reports for internal stakeholders and client-facing delivery.

Conduct competitive research and audience insights analysis to inform campaign strategy and messaging.

Manage ad spend budgets responsibly, ensuring pacing aligns with monthly and quarterly targets.

Stay current with platform algorithm changes, new ad formats, and paid social best practices – proactively bringing recommendations to the team.

Coordinate with the content and SEO teams to align paid efforts with organic strategy and ensure consistent messaging.



Qualified Applicants

3+ years of hands-on experience managing paid social campaigns on 
 and
/Meta for B2B clients or agencies.

Demonstrated expertise in LinkedIn Campaign Manager (Sponsored Content, Message Ads, Lead Gen Forms, Conversation Ads) and Meta Ads Manager.

Strong analytical skills with the ability to translate data into actionable optimization decisions.

Experience building audience segments, retargeting funnels, and multi-touch attribution models.

Proficiency with analytics and reporting tools (Google Analytics, Looker Studio, or equivalent).

Excellent written English communication skills – you’ll write ad copy and collaborate across time zones via Slack,
, and project management tools.

Self-starter mentality with strong time management; comfortable working independently in a remote, async-first environment.

Portfolio or case studies showing measurable paid social results (lead volume, CPL reduction, ROAS improvement, etc.).



Preferred Qualifications

 Experience working with U.S.-based B2B agencies or clients in manufacturing, professional services, or SaaS verticals.

Not required but helpful: Meta Blueprint Certification and/or LinkedIn Marketing Certification.

Basic graphic design skills (Canva, Figma, or Adobe Creative Suite) for quick ad creative iterations.

 Understanding of SEO and content marketing principles and how paid and organic strategies complement each other.



How To Apply

Send your resume, a brief cover letter, and 1–2 portfolio examples of B2B paid social campaigns you’ve managed to 
 include metrics that demonstrate your impact (leads generated, cost-per-lead, ROAS, etc.). We’d love to see what you can do.

title: Bilingual Lead Generation & Admin Assistant (Chinese/English)
description:
Company: MetaOne



Location: Remote (Philippines)



Compensation: $2.00 - $3.00 USD per hour

Schedule: Philippine daytime hours



About Us:

We are MetaOne, a fast-growing international startup. We manage B2B client pipelines and digital operations across Canada, the Philippines, and China. We rely on highly organized systems and accurate data to keep our business growing.



The Role:

WeChat &
 Coordination: Draft basic outreach messages or reply to standard inquiries via
