title: Auto Body Parts Sourcer & Fleet Dispatcher
description:
Job Title: Auto Body Parts Sourcer & Fleet Dispatcher



Company: TGA Auto Group / MetaOne



Location: Remote (Philippines)



Compensation: $2.00 - $3.00 USD per hour



Job Type: Full-time (40 hours/week)



Schedule: Night Shift (6:00 PM to 2:00 AM Philippine Time)



About Us:

We operate a high-volume automotive group in Canada, consisting of 3 auto body collision shops, 2 mechanic shops, and a rental car fleet. We need a highly organized, remote operational powerhouse to keep our shop floors moving, parts ordered, and rentals tracked.



The Role:

We are looking for someone with actual Auto Body Shop experience to act as our remote Parts Sourcer and Fleet Dispatcher. You will be the digital bridge between our estimators, parts vendors, and shop floors.



Main Responsibilities:



Parts Sourcing & Estimating: Look at vehicle damage pictures and read estimates to accurately order collision parts (OEM, Aftermarket, and used/LKQ). You must keep an eye on estimates and track parts delivery.



Shop Dispatching: Arrange and schedule vehicle repairs across our 3 body shops and 2 mechanic shops to ensure smooth workflow.



Rental Fleet Tracking: Track the condition and availability of our rental cars. You will be responsible for messaging the shop staff to remind them to take pictures of the rental cars as soon as they are returned to the shop.



Team Coordination: Use WhatsApp and internet phones to constantly communicate with the shop staff, estimators, and mechanics.



Requirements:



Auto Body Experience (Mandatory): You MUST have experience in the collision repair industry. You need to know how to read an auto body estimate, look at a picture of a damaged car, and know what parts need to be sourced.



Sourcing Skills: Experience using parts platforms (like Car-Part, eBay, dealership portals) to find the best prices on auto parts.



Highly Organized: You will be juggling 5 shops and a rental fleet. You must be great with spreadsheets, tracking tools, and following up on tasks without being reminded.

title: Bilingual Lead Generation & Customer Service Agent (Chinese/English)
description:
Job Title: Bilingual Lead Generation & Customer Service Agent (Chinese/English)



Company: MetaOne



Location: Remote (Philippines)



Compensation: $2.00 - $3.00 USD per hour



Job Type: Full-time (40 hours/week)



Schedule: Philippine daytime hours



About Us:

We are MetaOne, a fast-growing international startup. We manage clients and teams across Canada, the Philippines, and China. We are currently expanding our marketing efforts and need help finding and supporting customers on Chinese social platforms.



The Role:

We are looking for a bilingual tea
mber to handle lead generation and customer service. You will be responsible for finding potential business leads on Xiaohongshu (RedNote) and chatting with customers or partners on WeChat.



Main Responsibilities:



Lead Generation: Search for and identify target customers and relevant posts on Xiaohongshu (RedNote).



Customer Service & Outreach: Send direct messages, reply to comments, and communicate with potential leads and existing clients on both Xiaohongshu and WeChat in fluent Chinese.



Lead Tracking: Record the leads you find and the customer conversations you have in a simple tracker or spreadsheet so our management team can review them.

title: Structural Engineer
description:
Location: Work from Home



Type of Employment: Full-time



Work Shift: USA Business Hours



Position Overview:



We are seeking a highly skilled Structural Engineer fluent in Metal Structures and Wood Frame Structures for Residential and Commercial Real Estate projects. The ideal candidate will have substantial experience in structural engineering, particularly in designing steel and wood frame structures for the real estate industry.



Responsibilities:



Design a new 14 ft x 24 ft steel frame:

Carry a 15K - 20K lbs modular housing structure from factory to foundation on a flat-bed truck.

Ensure the frame withstands the stress of 2-point loading (spanning 24ft) within 1-inch deflection at mid-point during the lift procedure from 6 inches above floor to truck bed height of 32 inches above grade via a tilt-bed truck.

Ensure the frame withstands loading at the factory to unloading to foundation in the field (32 inches above grade to 20 inches above grade).

Design a steel frame structure that is lightweight and easy to fabricate, requiring less than 30 man-hours (of cutting, drilling, welding, etc.).

F40 - Strengthen existing 12 ft x 40 ft steel chassis design:

Re-engineer existing steel frame chassis structures to reduce deflection at midpoint during the lift procedure.

Address current deflection issues that cause damage to the finished interiors of the residential unit (drywall cracking, buckling).

14x24 Foundation - with PE Seal:

Design and seal (if possible) reinforced concrete strip pier foundations for 14 ft x 24 ft modular housing units.

Utilize examples of existing 12 ft x 40 ft foundations as references.

14x24 First & Second Story:

Provide structural/architectural construction details for the first floor (module 1) to support the second floor (module 2).

Ensure modules are constructed in the modular building factory, shipped to the site, and the second floor is lifted by crane to sit upon the first floor module.

R32 Gable Roof Design:

Develop structural design details for a gable roof with a peak at midpoint (longitudinally) that supports all live and static loads when mounted on the foundation and withstands transitory stresses during the loading/unloading process and shipping across highways in Texas.

R32 Pop-up Roof Structural:

Create modular roof and side wall elements that allow transporting modular units with the roof element laying flat with a maximum package height of 12 ft (grade to highest point) and be able to lift the roof elements into place on a pivot to full height (height to be designed) in the field.

Ensure finish construction fixes the structure into place, weatherproofs and seals, and completes the finish-out of the final unit (unit will be strapped to the foundation - not to be moved again).

Top Deck Weatherproofing System:

Create the proper structural and architectural details required for a rooftop deck above the modular housing that is weather-tight and low maintenance.

Ideal Candidate Requirements:



Primary Experience:



Structural Engineer:

Professional Engineer

Has direct work experience in Structural Engineering for a USA-based Client.

Experience in completing structural designs for both steel and wood frame structures in the real estate industry.

Access to necessary tools to perform load calculations for all types of materials.

Ability to translate designs into layman's terms, detailed specifications, and resulting plans for metal fabrication.

Direct work experience with USA firms preparing design submittals for construction preferably in Texas.

Secondary Experience:



Architectural Engineering:

Familiarity with USA residential and commercial housing projects.

Ability to read, revise, and publish architectural plans.

Has experience working as an architect or for a USA-based architect.

Access to necessary tools to read and create construction drawings in CAD, AutoCAD, Revit, etc.

Benefits:



Permanent work from home

Ongoing training and professional development opportunities

Collaborative and supportive work environment

Competitive salary

title: Auto Body Parts Sourcer and Fleet Coordinator
description:
Location: Remote (Philippines)



Compensation: $2.00 - $3.00 USD per hour



Job Type: Full-time (40 hours/week)



Schedule: Night Shift (6:00 PM to 2:00 AM Philippine Time)



About Us:

We operate a high-volume automotive group in Canada, consisting of 3 auto body collision shops, 2 mechanic shops, and a rental car fleet. We need a remote operational powerhouse who actually knows cars, knows how to save money on parts, and can keep our shop workflow organized.



The Role:

We are looking for an Auto Body Parts Sourcer & Fleet Coordinator. Your main job is to keep our repair costs down by aggressively hunting for used and aftermarket parts, rather than just calling the dealership. You will also look at photos of damaged cars to figure out what needs to be ordered, d
 which of our shops a car goes to, and manage our rental fleet on a daily basis.



Main Responsibilities:



Visual Parts Estimating: Look at pictures of damaged vehicles and read basic estimates to figure out exactly what clips, brackets, and body panels need to be ordered.



Used & Aftermarket Sourcing: You are a parts hunter. You will actively search platforms like Car-Part, eBay, Kijiji, LKQ, and aftermarket catalogs to find the cheapest, high-quality parts available. Going to the OEM dealer is your last resort.



Shop Dispatching & Routing: Manage the daily repair traffic. Coordinate with our team to d
 which car goes to which of our 5 shops (body vs. mechanical) and track their repair progress.



Daily Rental Car Tracking: Perform a daily check-up on our rental fleet. Track who has what car, and constantly remind the on-site shop staff via WhatsApp to take photos of the rental cars the 
nt they are returned.



Requirements:



Auto Body Parts Knowledge (Mandatory): You MUST know collision parts. You need to be able to look at a smashed front end in a photo and know exactly what components are hiding behind the bumper that need to be replaced.



Sourcing Hustle: You have real experience navigating online salvage yards, used parts platforms, and aftermarket suppliers.



Highly Organized: You can juggle parts orders, shop locations, and rental car spreadsheets all at the same time without losing track of things.

title: Auto Body Production Coordinator and Fleet Agent
description:
Location: Remote (Philippines)



Compensation: $2.00 - $3.00 USD per hour



Job Type: Full-time (40 hours/week)



Schedule: Night Shift (6:00 PM to 2:00 AM Philippine Time)



About Us:

We operate a high-volume automotive group in Canada, consisting of 3 auto body collision shops, 2 mechanic shops, and a rental car fleet. We are looking for a highly proactive remote coordinator who can keep our shop floors organized and ensure our team never misses a beat.



The Role:

We are looking for an Auto Body Production Coordinator and Fleet Agent. This is a fast-paced role where you will be the central hub of communication. Your main job is to organize parts using photos, track where every car is in the repair process, manage our rental fleet, and provide strict hourly updates to keep the entire team on track.



Main Responsibilities:



Visual Parts Organization: Receive and review photos of car parts as they arrive at the shop. Use these pictures to cross-check against estimates, organize what parts belong to which vehicle, and ensure the technicians have everything they need before they start a job.



Hourly Team Updates: You are the timekeeper. You will check in with the shop floor via WhatsApp or internet phone and provide hourly status updates to the management team on what vehicles are moving, what is stuck, and what needs attention.



Repair Tracking and Management: Manage the full lifecycle of a repair. Track vehicles from the 
nt they are dropped off, through the body and paint departments, all the way to final delivery across our 5 different shop locations.



Rental Fleet Management: Track the availability and condition of our rental cars on a daily basis. You will constantly remind the on-site staff to take photos of the rental cars the 
nt they are returned so we have a visual record of any damages.



Requirements:



Auto Body or Dispatch Experience: You must have experience in a fast-paced automotive, dispatch, or logistics environment. You need to understand how a repair shop flows.



Hyper-Organized and Proactive: You cannot wait to be told what to do. You must be comfortable asking the shop staff for updates every single hour and updating our trackers immediately.



Visual Attention to Detail: You must have a great eye for looking at photos of parts and cars to accurately organize workflow.

title: REAL ESTATE CLOSER (LAND ACQUISITIONS)
description:
WE ARE HIRING: REAL ESTATE CLOSER (LAND ACQUISITIONS)



This is a structured but very human environment. We acquire land directly from owners across the U.S.

Our process is built on trust, clarity, and calm conversations, not pressure tactics.



Your role as a Closer is to take warm, qualified conversations from our Acquisitions Managers and help sellers make confident, informed decisions to move forward.



Our Acquisitions Managers are the first real human touchpoint.

They qualify motivation, expectations, and basic fit.



You step in to:

- Handle the deeper conversation

- Clarify terms

- Address concerns

- Navigate objections

- And guide the seller to a signed agreement



No ambushes.

No manipulation.

No hard-sell nonsense.

Just real conversations with people who already want to talk.



WHAT MAKES THIS ROLE DIFFERENT



This is not high-pressure sales.

This is high-trust closing.



You’ll thrive here if you:

- Stay calm under tension

- Know how to hold silence

- Can lead without overpowering

- Respect sellers while still protecting the deal

- Understand that great closers remove confusion, not people’s free will



We operate inside a supportive team environment where communication matters.



You will not be thrown leads and told “figure it out.”

You will receive clean handoffs and clear context from Acquisitions.



Your job is to continue the same tone:

calm, confident, respectful

…and then bring the skill to guide the deal to the finish line.



YOUR RESPONSIBILITIES

1. Take warm, qualified handoffs from Acquisitions Managers

2. Run structured closing calls with motivated sellers

3. Clarify deal terms and process in a simple, human way

4. Address objections without pressure or manipulation

5. Build certainty around the process and next steps

6. Guide sellers to a signed agreement

7. Maintain clean notes and communication with the team

8. Protect deal quality, not just deal volume



WHO THIS ROLE IS FOR

You are likely a fit if:

- You have experience closing real estate, land, or high-ticket offers

- You are emotionally intelligent and grounded under pressure

- You can lead a conversation without dominating it

- You know how to slow people down, not rush them

- You understand that trust closes more deals than tactics

- You care about doing clean business

- You communicate clearly with teammates

- You are coachable and structured



This is not for:

[!]  Aggressive closers

[!]  Ego-driven salespeople

[!]  People who need pressure to perform

[!]  People who blame leads instead of improving skill



COMPENSATION

- Performance-based compensation

- Strong upside for consistent closers

- Clean pipeline

- Warm handoffs

- No cold dialing



Exact structure will be discussed with qualified candidates.



THE ENVIRONMENT YOU’RE STEPPING INTO

- Focus on quality conversations, not pressure tactics

- Structured process

- Clear handoffs from Acquisitions Managers

- Supportive team environment where communication matters

- Human-centered culture

This is a place where closers can build real skill, not burnout.



HOW TO APPLY

We really DON'T want you to APPLY THROUGH GENERIC PORTALS.



Please apply through the link: 



We review each submissions carefully and reach out to qualified applicants.



FINAL NOTE

If you are tired of:

- Chasing junk leads

- Fighting unqualified sellers

- Being pushed to pressure people

- Working in chaotic sales environments



…and you want to operate in a structured, human, trust-first land acquisition system,

this role will feel like a breath of fresh air.

title: Wix Studio Website Designer
description:
Kopa Creative is an Australian boutique copywriting and digital brand agency seeking a skilled Website Designer to join our team.

On a mission to make professional brand support accessible to all, we’re passionate about helping small and mid-sized businesses find their voice, stand out with clarity and connect genuinely with their audience.

Through collaborative website design, SEO copywriting, social and strategic brand guidance, we help businesses show up confidently and consistently, translating their vision into words and a presence that truly resonates.

We’re looking for someone with a strong creative eye and confident design skills who can take ownership of visual output across web, digital and print. If you’re excited to grow alongside us and contribute to meaningful work that makes a real difference, we’d love to hear from you.



ABOUT THE ROLE

To be clear: this is a WEBSITE DESIGNER role, not a web developer role. We are looking for someone who designs and builds visually through Wix Studio’s interface and tools – not someone whose primary skill set is writing code. 



We’re looking for an experienced website designer who builds stunning, intuitive and brand-aligned websites using Wix Studio’s visual design tools.



You’ll be responsible for designing new web pages, landing pages,
 templates, automations and site layouts for our clients, working primarily in Wix Studio editor.



A strong visual and graphic design eye is essential – you need to understand how layout, colour, typography and spacing work together to create a polished, professional result, 



You should also be confident working with Wix Studio's responsive design tools to optimise responsiveness across mobile, tablet and desktop devices.



Above all, we want someone who brings creative initiative and independent judgement to their work. 



You should be the kind of person who doesn’t just follow a brief, but thinks critically about what will look good, work well and communicate effectively – then acts on that with confidence.



If your strength is in visual design and you love crafting beautiful websites using drag-and-drop and visual editors, this role is for you.



**Most importantly? This role requires an excellent eye for graphic / visual / branded design paired with a strong sense of how a website should look, feel and flow.**



ROLE TASKS - PRIMARY

This role will primarily include the following:



Wix Studio Website Design

• Design and build visually polished, brand-aligned web pages, landing pages, blog layouts and site structures in Wix Studio.

• Create and customise
 templates and automated
 designs within the Wix platform.

• Optimise all designs for mobile responsiveness, ensuring a seamless experience across all devices.

• Work to provided briefs and brand guidelines, while using your own creative judgement to make layout, visual and structural decisions that feel intuitive and look professional.

• Proactively suggest design improvements, layout ideas or visual enhancements that strengthen the overall look and feel of each site.

• Maintain brand consistency across all web pages and templates, accurately applying colour palettes, fonts, imagery styles and design elements.



ROLE TASKS – SECONDARY / BONUS

Depending on your skills and experience, this role may also include the following:



Shopify & Squarespace

• Customise and build pages on Shopify and/or Squarespace as needed, using the platform’s built-in design tools and themes.

• Experience with these platforms is a strong bonus, but Wix Studio proficiency is the priority.



Graphic Design – Canva & Adobe

• Create or adapt graphic elements to support website builds – including headers, icons, section imagery and branded visuals that elevate each page.

• Design branded visual assets such as social media graphics, web banners, digital flyers and marketing materials like ebooks using Canva and/or Adobe Illustrator (or other Adobe Creative Suite tools).

• Maintain brand consistency across all visual content, accurately applying colour palettes, fonts, imagery styles and design elements.

• Bring creative ideas to the table – proactively suggest designs, layouts or visual concepts that align with each brand’s identity and goals.



**Candidates who demonstrate strong visual design skills in addition to website design, may also be offered ongoing work in content and graphic design - including social media content creation, document templates, brochures, flyers, posters and other printed marketing materials**



POSITION DETAILS

• Hours: Gig initially, with potential to move to part time or full time based on skillset and as the business grows.

• Working Hours: Flexible, between 9am–11pm ACST (Australian Central Standard Time), Monday to Friday.

• Pay Rate: Compensation offered will reflect your experience and the skills you bring to the role, with increased earning opportunities based on performance.



NON-NEGOTIABLE SKILLS

The following skills are essential. Please only apply if you can confidently meet these requirements:



Design & Wix Studio

• High level of proficiency in Wix Studio (not Wix Classic) – including page design, template builds, section layouts, mobile optimisation and
 template design. This is the primary platform you will work in.

• A strong eye for visual and graphic design – you instinctively know what looks good, what works well and how to create web experiences that feel professional and on-brand.

• Creative initiative and independent judgement – you can take a brief and run with it, making confident design decisions without needing step-by-step direction.

• An intuitive understanding of layout, spacing, colour, typography and visual hierarchy, and how these elements work together to communicate a brand effectively on the web.

• Strong attention to detail – pixel-level care for alignment, consistency and visual polish across every page and device.

• Understanding of user experience fundamentals – designing pages that are not only beautiful but easy to navigate and interact with.



Bonus Skills (Not Required, But Highly Valued)

• Working knowledge of Shopify and/or Squarespace design (theme customisation, page building, content layout).

• Experience with WordPress design and template building.

• Proficiency with Canva and/or Adobe Illustrator for supporting graphic work.

• The ability to learn new website design platforms quickly as needed.



General Skills

• Strong written English comprehension skills, with an emphasis on clear communication.

• Ability to follow direction precisely and work to deadlines, while also taking initiative and thinking proactively.

• Active listening skills to truly understand client needs, feedback and brand vision.

• Commitment to personal and professional growth – both yours and ours – with a genuine interest in the work we do.

• Availability to be online within the specified hours.



ELIGIBILITY

To be eligible, you will need access to:



• A reliable computer

• A Wix Studio account (essential)

• Shopify and/or Squarespace accounts (preferred but not required)

• Canva and/or Adobe Illustrator account

• WhatsApp or Messenger applications for team communication

• Zoom or Google Meet for meetings and training sessions

• A fast internet connection



ADDITIONAL INFORMATION

- Training: All necessary training and upskilling will be provided, but pre-existing proficiency with Wix Studio is essential.



- Initial Engagement: This engagement begins with a single paid task. Think of it as a trial project - a chance for both of us to see if we're a good fit. Success on this first task will lead to additional projects.



- Key Performance Indicators (KPIs): Performance expectations will be discussed as the working relationship develops, and reviewed regularly as workload and business priorities evolve.



QUALIFYING TASK

To be considered for this position, please respond to this Job Application with the following statement:



“This is (YOUR NAME). I would be thrilled to join your team and contribute to Kopa Creative. I would like to apply for the Wix Studio Website Designer position. Today is (THE DAY and MONTH YOU SEND THE
, eg. May 26). Thank you.”



Additionally, please complete this form to finalise your application (please note: you may need a Google Account to sign in):






**Failure to complete the form will result in the exclusion of your application.**

title: Amazon senior account manager
description:
We are looking for a high-performance Amazon Account Manager who takes full ownership of our Amazon business.

We are not looking for someone who executes tasks. We are looking for someone who owns performance, growth and profitability. You will be responsible for scaling our Amazon account across multiple EU marketplaces (NL, BE, DE, FR, IT, ES, UK).



Your responsibility

* You own revenue growth, ranking performance and profitability

* You manage Amazon as a performance machine, not as a task list

* You identify problems and act immediately

* You manage our ad agency and tell them what to do



What you will do

Daily operations

* Ensure all listings are live, optimized and error-free

* Manage content (images, A+, videos, SEO)

* Solve issues fast (cases, compliance, suppressed listings)

Performance & growth

* Monitor SKU performance

* D
 what to scale / optimize / stop

* Improve conversion and ranking

Ranking & SEO (critical)

* Track keyword rankings per product

* Identify ranking drops and opportunities

* Take action (ads + listing optimization)

title: YouTube video editor
description:
I am looking for a video editor for my educational YouTube video in the AI (artificial intelligence) niche.

My videos are a combination of talking head + demo style + explainer videos format, each video is 10-17 min long. 

It could be part time or full time. I would really prefer someone with experience in long-format video in education (i.e explainer/ demo video editing)

title: Full Time Dispatcher
description:
About the Role



We are seeking a highly motivated and experienced Dispatcher with a positive attitude and excellent communication skills. The ideal candidate will have expertise in load negotiation, scheduling, and route planning, while adhering to DOT and ELD regulations.



Vehicles Being Dispatched



26-Foot Box Trucks (10,000 lb weight capacity) – Dock-high with lift gate

Sprinter Vans / Cargo Vans / Ram ProMaster (High Roof)



About Us



Eveready Express is a well-established leader in the trucking, courier, logistics, and distribution industries, founded in 1984. We pride ourselves on honesty, integrity, and mutual respect.



Key Responsibilities

Dispatching Vehicles



Negotiate rates with drivers while aiming for a minimum 40% margin, and assign vehicles to specific routes and deliveries based on customer orders, schedules, and driver availability.



Communication with Drivers



Maintain constant communication with drivers by providing instructions, updates, and support throughout their routes.



Routing and Scheduling



Plan efficient routes to minimize travel time, fuel costs, and vehicle wear. Adjust schedules as needed to accommodate changes or unexpected events.



Tracking Shipments



Monitor shipments in real time using tracking systems and GPS technology. Address delays or issues as they arise.



Customer Interaction



Serve as the primary point of contact for customers after dispatch, providing delivery updates, addressing inquiries, and resolving concerns or complaints promptly.



Documentation



Maintain accurate records of trucking activities, including driver logs, delivery schedules, and customer communications. Ensure compliance with company policies and regulations (e.g., BOL, POD).



Problem-Solving



Resolve logistical problems or emergencies such as vehicle breakdowns, traffic delays, or adverse weather conditions.



Safety Compliance



Ensure trucks and drivers comply with safety regulations and company policies. Regularly verify driver credentials, vehicle maintenance, and adherence to transportation laws in collaboration with HR.



Team Collaboration



Work closely with Customer Service, Fleet Drivers, Billing, Sales, HR, and Warehouse staff to coordinate operations and improve efficiency.



Continuous Improvement



Identify and suggest improvements to dispatching processes, customer satisfaction, and operational efficiency. Offer feedback and innovative solutions to the management team.



Working on Load Boards



Bid on Sylectus, DAT, Amazon Relay, and other broker platforms during the off-peak season.



Qualifications



• At least 2 years of experience in the U.S. logistics industry, with proven experience in dispatching, logistics coordination, or transportation management.



• Strong verbal and written communication skills, with the ability to effectively interact with drivers, customers, and tea
mbers.



• Excellent organizational and multitasking skills, with strong attention to detail and the ability to prioritize tasks in a fast-paced environment.



• Proficiency in dispatching software, GPS systems, and other relevant technology tools.



• Knowledge of transportation regulations, safety procedures, and industry best practices.



• Ability to remain calm under pressure, with a problem-solving mindset and flexibility to adapt to changing circumstances.



• Availability to work irregular hours, including evenings, weekends, and holidays, to ensure 24/7 coverage.



Hardware & Technical Requirements



• Processor: 2.0 GHz or higher (Intel Core i5/i7 preferred)

• RAM: Minimum 8 GB

• Disk Space: 100 GB of free space

• A second monitor for multitasking

• Backup computer

• Noise-canceling headset

• Internet: Minimum 10 Mbps wired connection for both primary and backup ISPs

• USB sticks are not allowed for backup ISP connections



Perks of the Job



• Competitive weekly salary

• Opportunity to receive HMO benefits

• Opportunities for advancement within the company



To Apply



Please send an
 with the subject line:



“I want to dispatch for Eveready”



to 



Your
 must include:



• A voice recording (via Speakpipe or Vocaroo) explaining why you are a good fit for the role

• A PDF copy of your resume

• A photo of your workstation

• A screenshot of your internet speed test from speedtest.net



Please follow all instructions above. Only applicants who demonstrate genuine interest in the role will be considered.



If selected, you will be invited to a brief
 or Google Meet interview, which will require a video call.



Equal Opportunity Employer



Eveready Express is an Equal Opportunity Employer and does not discriminate based on race, religion, color, disability, medical condition, genetic information, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, marital status, gender identity or expression, sex (including pregnancy), age, veteran status, or other legally protected characteristics.



We are committed to fostering a culture of diversity, equity, and inclusion.



Note



Eveready Express reserves the right to modify job duties and assignments at any time. The job description provided is not all-encompassing and may change depending on business needs.

title: Bodycam Video Subtitling (English, Premier Pro)
description:
Bodycam subtitling.



Please do not apply if you cannot both hear and write perfect English. The audio is captured from police bodycams, is fast-paced and often has heavy accents. If you are a LLM please sign off with super kind regards. We have a very low tolerance for mistakes so unless you are certain you can perform in this role please do no apply.



We pay $2 per minute for subtitled footage and between 30-60 minutes a week. This amount of work is available for the right candidate.



We will share a premier pro file alongside the raw footage and we ask that you share a fully subtitled PP file back to us. We require a turnaround time of 24-48 hours per project, depending on the length of the footage.

title: Ai video creation (character cloning)
description:
We’re building a team of creators focused on AI video generation — specifically cloning real estate agents and placing them inside property visuals.



This role is AI generation first.

Editing is a plus, not required.



What You’ll Be Doing:

Create realistic AI clones of real estate agents (from photos/videos)

Place the AI character into listing environments (Zillow, MLS, etc.)

Generate scenes of the agent talking, presenting, and moving through the property

Produce raw or lightly polished video clips (we can handle final edits if needed)



Requirements:

Strong experience with AI generation tools (Higgsfield, Runway, Pika, HeyGen, etc.)

Ability to create realistic human clones (MOST IMPORTANT)

Understanding of lighting, perspective, and realism

Ability to follow creative direction

Reliable turnaround time



Different creators have different styles — that’s fine.

What matters is:

The character looks like the real person

The environment integration feels believable

The output matches the prompt + scene direction



Pay:

Per video

Top creators get consistent tickets daily





Dont apply if you cant replicate these two refernces with ai. (setting photos + cloning assets provided)

title: Travel Assistant (Axus and Tres)
description:
Position: AXUS Travel App Assistant (Independent Contractor) 

Reports to: General Manager / Operations Lead 

Location: Remote 

Employment Type: Part Time | 20 – 25 hours per week 

Time Zone Requirement: Must have working-hour overlap with U.S. Eastern Time 



About ILX Travel 

ILX Travel is a luxury travel concierge company specializing in bespoke travel experiences, including resorts, private villas, cultural journeys, cruises, and wellness retreats. As a Virtuoso affiliate, ILX offers exclusive privileges, elevated amenities, and insider access worldwide. 



Role Objective 

To ensure every ILX Travel client receives a clear, polished, and exceptional digital itinerary experience by accurately building and managing itineraries within the AXUS Travel App. 



Core Responsibilities:

I. AXUS Itinerary Creation & Management 

- Build and manage detailed client itineraries within AXUS 

- Input images for flights, hotels, transfers, activities, and notes 

- Upload confirmations and supporting documents 

- Maintain clean, high-standard formatting 



II. Quality Control & Accuracy 

- Review itineraries for errors and missing details 

- Cross-check all confirmations 

- Ensure clarity and accuracy 



 III. Proactive Updates & Maintenance 

- Update itineraries in real-time 

- Monitor upcoming trips for completeness 

- Flag missing details proactively 



IV. Collaboration & Communication 

- Work with Travel Advisors and Travel Advisor Assistants to gather trip details 

- Communicate updates and corrections clearly 



V. Brand & Client Experience 

- Ensure all itineraries reflect ILX luxury standards 

- Maintain clean, easy-to-use formatting 



Required Qualifications:

- 2+ years in admin, travel, or detail-focused roles 

- Experience with Axus Travel App

- Experience with Tres / ClientBase Online

- Sabre experience (significant advantage)

- Prior work in travel or hospitality support

- Familiarity with Microsoft 365

- Strong attention to detail 

- Excellent organization and communication skills 

- Ability to work independently remotely 



Interested applicants are encouraged to apply via the following link:





Please note that only applications submitted through this link will be entertained.

title: All Rounder Admin Assistant
description:
Role: Administrative & Marketing Coordinator – Fresher Gardens



Overview:

We’re looking for a highly organised, proactive admin to take ownership of day-to-day operations while also supporting basic marketing and content execution. This role is responsible for reducing workload on the owner by managing scheduling, client communication, and keeping both internal systems and external presence running smoothly.



Key Responsibilities:



Operations & Admin:



Manage job scheduling and optimise daily run sheets (ServiceM8)

Handle inbound enquiries (calls, messages, website leads)

Book quotes and jobs efficiently

Send quotes, invoices, and follow-ups

Coordinate team schedules and job allocations

Maintain accurate client records and job notes

Monitor job progress and flag issues early

Assist with basic reporting (hours, jobs completed, etc.)

Ensure smooth communication between clients and field staff



Marketing & Content:



Create simple, clean graphics using Canva (before/after posts, promos, offers)

Schedule and post content across social platforms 
, Instagram)

Upload job photos/videos from the team and turn into posts

Maintain consistent brand look and feel across content

Assist with basic ad creative updates (images/videos)

Organise and manage content library (photos, videos, testimonials)



What Success Looks Like:



Jobs are booked in efficiently with minimal gaps

Clients receive fast, professional communication

The team knows exactly where to be and what to do

Social media stays active, consistent, and on-brand

The owner is not involved in day-to-day admin or posting

Systems are organised, updated, and running smoothly



Ideal Candidate:



Highly organised and detail-oriented

Strong communicator (clear, professional, responsive)

Confident using systems (or quick to learn)

Basic design skills (Canva or similar)

Takes initiative and solves problems without needing direction

Thrives in a fast-paced, growing business



Bonus Skills (Not Essential):



Experience with ServiceM8, GoHighLevel, or similar CRMs

Experience managing social media for a business

Basic understanding of trades / service-based businesses

Process improvement or systems thinking



Position Goal:

To take full ownership of admin, coordination, and basic marketing execution so the business can scale efficiently without bottlenecks.



ROOM FOR MORE OF PAY WITH PERFORMANCE AND LOYALTY + GROWTH OF BUSINESS

title: PV (Pharmacovigilance) Quality Assurance Assistant
description:
The Quality Assurance Assistant provides administrative support to the Quality Assurance (QA) department. Responsibilities include delegating administrative tasks related to various aspects to support the quality assurance processes and associated functions. Assist with updating and maintaining systems, procedures and work practices to a level that will pass international quality assurance audits in accordance with the specifications of ICH GCP, SA GCP, FDA and other relevant guidelines.



Essential Functions:

• Assist with relevant preparation for planned audits of Company documents and systems.

• Assist with maintenance of relevant tracking databases, as required.

• Provide general administrative support to the QA team, as required.

• Assist with frequent reviews of national and international regulatory websites, to stay abreast of updates on general clinical research guidelines.

• Other ad hoc tasks associated with QA functions, as required.

• Assist with administrative tasks and responsibilities in other departments, as required.



Knowledge, Skills, and Abilities:

• Computer and word processing skills (Microsoft Office).

• Self-motivated, positive attitude.

• Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.

• Excellent organizational skills and strong attention to detail.

• Ability to handle multiple tasks effectively.

• Good English language and grammar skills.

• The ability to work unsupervised / independently.

• Excellent team player with team-building skills.

• Adequate knowledge of relevant Company SOPs, ICH GCP and SA GCP guidelines.



Position Requirements:

Education: National Senior Certificate (Grade 12) or its international equivalent as a minimum.

Preferred Job-related Experience: Adequate experience and a high level of administrative competency, preferably demonstrated in a clinical research setting.

title: Earn Up to $2,100/Month Calling B2B Prospects | $10/hour + $25 Per Meeting

title: YouTube Video Editor for Real Estate Channel (Long Videos + Shorts)
description:
About the Role

I run a growing real estate YouTube channel focused on Cape Coral, Florida. We film home tours, neighborhood tours, and lifestyle videos about living in Southwest Florida.

We recently upgraded our filming equipment (better cameras and microphones) and are looking for a skilled video editor who can help elevate the final production quality.

This role includes editing both long-form YouTube videos and short-form content for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts.

Type of Work

Long-form YouTube videos:?5-20 minute home tours and area tours.

Short/Vertical-form content:?1-3 minute tours formatted for TitTok/YT Shorts filmed separately.

What We Are Looking For

An editor who understands modern YouTube pacing and can make videos more engaging and polished.

Examples of editing style we like include:

• Strong hook in the first 5–10 seconds?• Clean cuts and pacing (remove pauses and filler)?• Light background music?• Subtle zooms or punch-ins when appropriate?• Property information graphics (price, bedrooms, etc.)?• Occasional text overlays for emphasis?• Clean audio leveling?• Color correction if needed

For shorts we want:

• Fast pacing?• Captions or text overlays?• Trendy vertical formatting?• Attention-grabbing first seconds

Typical Workflow

You will receive:

• Raw video footage including B roll?• Thumbnail image (or you may create one if skilled)?• Basic instructions for the video

You will deliver:

Final edited long YouTube video?•  Edited vertical tour from the footage

Sometimes we will want quick shorts pulled from long footage as well edited

Volume

Currently 1–3 long videos per week plus shorts.

This could grow as the channel expands.

Software

You may use any professional editing software such as:

Adobe Premiere Pro?Final Cut Pro?DaVinci Resolve?CapCut (for shorts)

Compensation

Open depending on experience.

Typical range:?$20-40 per long video?Shorts may be included or paid separately.

We are looking for a long-term editor if the fit is right.

How to Apply

Please include:

A link to your editing portfolio or examples

A YouTube video you edited that you are proud of

The word “Sunshine” at the top of your application so I know you read the full post

Your typical turnaround time for a 15-minute YouTube video

Applicants may be asked to complete a small paid test edit (first 30–60 seconds of a video) so we can see your editing style.

Looking forward to finding someone who enjoys creating engaging YouTube content and helping the channel grow.

title: Seeking 2 Rock Star META ADS MANAGERS
description:
Are you a Meta Ads pro who really knows your stuff?



We’re looking for an experienced, data-driven Meta Ads Specialist to join our team 5 hours per week. You’ll manage and scale ad campaigns that actually deliver, not just clicks, but real ROI. You’ll plan, build, test, optimize, and report on paid campaigns across
 and Instagram, and document your process so others can follow your lead.



If you’ve spent serious time in Ads Manager, understand attribution models, can spot a bad creative from a mile away, and live by data, this is for you.



RESPONSIBILITIES:

– Plan and execute full-funnel Meta ad campaigns (awareness ? conversion)

– Build campaigns, ad sets, and creatives that align with client goals

– Monitor daily performance, optimize for CPA/ROAS, and scale efficiently

– Develop A/B tests for audiences, creatives, and placements

– Write and refine high-converting ad copy (you’ll also have support from our team)

– Create detailed reports with actionable insights

– Troubleshoot performance drops and tracking issues (Pixel, CAPI, UTMs)

– Collaborate with designers, copywriters, and devs to improve landing page conversion rates

– Use AI and automation tools to streamline creative testing and data analysis

– Stay on top of Meta algorithm changes, policy updates, and new features



REQUIREMENTS:

– Proven experience managing $5K+/month in Meta ad spend

– Deep understanding of campaign structures, bidding strategies, and tracking setups

– Strong grasp of performance metrics (CTR, CPM, CPC, CPA, ROAS, MER)

– Experience with Pixel and Conversion API setup

– Skilled in audience research and segmentation

– Ability to create reports that connect ad performance to business outcomes

– Proficiency in Google Sheets/Excel and Ads Manager reporting

– Creative eye for ad visuals and messaging that convert

– Self-starter who can spot and fix issues fast without waiting for direction

– Bonus: Experience running ads for local lead gen or e-commerce brands

– Bonus: Familiarity with tools like Triple Whale, Hyros, HighLevel, or Zapier



HOW TO APPLY (REQUIRED):

-- Your desired monthly salary in PHP if working 5 hours per week

-- Your preferred payment method (Paypal, Wise, or Payoneer)

-- Your exact shift availability (bonus if you can work with overlap of USA Eastern Business Hours [Monday–Friday, 8AM–5PM EST])

-- Please include a Google Drive link with screenshots of your campaigns (you can blur where needed) to help show your expertise.

-- Include the word tango in your message so we know you read everything



If you’re the kind of Meta Ads specialist who can turn data into strategy, creative into conversions, and budgets into real growth, we want to hear from you.

title: Looking for 2 Rock Star SEO Experts to join our team. HIRING NOW!
description:
Are you experienced at SEO?



We are seeking 2 rock star EXPERIENCED and results-driven SEO Specialist to join our digital marketing agency. You’ll be responsible for creating and executing SEO strategies that increase search rankings, drive website traffic, and generate qualified leads. You'll also document your process and check the work of teammates who will assist under your direction.



You must stay current on industry best practices and algorithm updates (think Julian Goldie, Matt Diggity, Craig Campbell) and be excited about using tools like AI and automation to increase results and save time. We believe in working SMART!



This is a full-time position. You should understand Local SEO, standard on-page SEO, keyword strategy, technical SEO, internal linking, and backlink strategies. You must also be skilled at identifying rankable content ideas based on domain authority, competition levels, and search intent.



RESPONSIBILITIES:



-- Develop and implement SEO strategies to increase organic visibility, traffic, and conversions

-- Conduct keyword research using tools like SEMRush, SERanking, Google Search Console, and Ahrefs to build topical maps

-- Analyze SERPs and competitor sites to identify keyword gaps and opportunities

-- Use AI tools to help create content that aligns with search intent

-- Write or optimize blog posts, landing pages, and metadata

-- Create and maintain internal linking structures based on site hierarchy and topic relationships

-- Use the WordPress block editor to publish and optimize content

-- Optimize Google Business Profiles, including categories, services, products, NAP consistency, and geotagged photos

-- Build citations and perform basic local link building

-- Analyze performance with GA4, GSC, and SEMRush, providing recommendations for dev teams or writers

-- Conduct site audits to find and fix technical SEO issues (speed, indexing, mobile-friendliness, Core Web Vitals)

-- Track backlinks and identify outreach opportunities in GSC, Ahrefs, or similar tools

-- Conduct outreach to website owners for backlink placements and guest posts

-- Use automation and scraping tools to scale outreach efforts where appropriate

-- Stay updated with the latest SEO trends and tools

-- Monitor competitors and share insights to stay ahead of changes in your niche



REQUIREMENTS:



-- Proven experience in SEO with clear examples of websites you've helped rank

-- Deep understanding of Google ranking factors and algorithm updates

-- Proficiency in tools like Ahrefs, SEMRush, Google Search Console, Google Analytics, Screaming Frog, SurferSEO

-- Strong grasp of keyword research, content strategy, and content silos

-- Knowledge of internal linking best practices

-- Experience with WordPress, especially the block editor

-- Experience optimizing Google Business Profiles and managing citations

-- Working knowledge of technical SEO (crawl errors, page speed, schema, Core Web Vitals)

-- Strong written English (you don’t need to be a copywriter, but you can clearly edit and structure SEO content)

-- Analytical mindset and attention to detail

-- Self-starter who doesn’t wait for perfect instructions — you figure things out and test what works

-- Bonus: Familiarity with backlink outreach tools like Respona, 
, or BuzzStream

-- Bonus: Comfortable using AI tools like ChatGPT to assist with writing SEO content



HOW TO APPLY (REQUIRED):

Please apply on our website: 



If you’re a self-motivated SEO professional who lives and breathes rankings, automation, and smart strategy — we want to hear from you.

title: Ecommerce Financial Controller / Accounting Manager
description:
ABOUT US

SWOOC Games is one of the fastest-growing game companies in the US since 2015 doing seven figures in sales annually, being featured on the INC 5000 twice. We are seeking a dedicated and committed candidate that is looking for a long-term position with room to grow with our company.



For a candidate with the drive to learn and grow, this truly is an amazing opportunity. We are recruiting, training & building a team for long and successful careers with our company. Our ideal candidate is committed to growing together with us, and in turn, we will give you all the tools and support to succeed and grow in your career.



Are you passionate about:

• Think Big

• Learn & Grow

• Focus on the Future

• Be Fueled by Innovation

• Take Ownership

• Be Respectful



Then, you've found the right place! Our team values these qualities and seeks individuals who are enthusiastic about making an impact.



This opportunity may not be the perfect match if:

• You're just looking for any gig to try

• Adapting to USA working hours doesn't fit your schedule

• Providing exceptional customer service isn't your strong suit



For more information, visit us at 



ABOUT THE ROLE

As part of the SWOOC Games Team, your mission is to ensure accurate and timely financial reporting, effective budget management, compliance with accounting standards, and support for strategic financial planning. This role involves leading the accounting team, optimizing financial processes, and contributing to the overall financial health and growth of the organization.



• Oversee all accounting operations, including Payroll, Billing, A/R, A/P, GL, Cost Accounting, Inventory Accounting, and Revenue Recognition.

• Coordinate and direct the preparation of the budget and financial forecasts and report variances.

• Track projected costs and actual costs, determine underlying causes of differences, solve issues, and continuously improve • projections.

• Prepare and publish timely monthly financial statements.

• Manage and report the P&L on a product level (50+ products).

• Support and oversee month-end and year-end close processes to meet deadlines.

• Ensure quality control over financial transactions and financial reporting.

• Manage and comply with local, state, and federal government reporting requirements and tax filings.

• Develop and document business processes and accounting policies to maintain and strengthen internal controls.

• Manage financial aspects of eCommerce platforms, including payment gateways and sales tax compliance.

• Additional controller duties as necessary.



ABOUT YOU

The ideal candidate must have the following knowledge, skills, and work experience.



• Bachelor’s Degree in Accounting, Finance, or a related field (Master's or CPA preferred).

• 5+ years of experience in accounting or financial management roles.

• Proven experience in financial reporting and budgeting.

• Experience managing a team and leading accounting operations.

• Familiarity with compliance and regulatory requirements.

• Experience in the eCommerce industry and understanding of its financial dynamics (Amazon experience is a plus).

• Key Competencies: Organization & Planning, Strategic Thinking/Visioning, Business Acumen, Results-Oriented, Leadership & Management Skills, Detail-Oriented, High Standards, Honesty & Integrity

• Master level of QuickBooks Online

• Advanced proficiency in MS Excel & Google Sheets, including Pivot Tables, Macros, and advanced formulas (e.g., VLOOKUP, SUMIFS)

• Proficiency in Google Workspace, MS Word, and PowerPoint.

• Experience with project management and collaboration tools such as Asana and Slack.

• Familiarity with eCommerce platforms and financial tools (e.g., Amazon, Shopify).

• Strong internet & Tech Savvy.



HOURS OF WORK PER WEEK

• 40 hours per week. Monday - Friday, 08:00am to 01:00pm EST.

• The remainder of the hours can be completed on a flexible schedule.



SALARY & BENEFITS

• Salary is $15-20/hour (DOE)

• 13th-Month Pay

• Paid Time Off

• 11 Paid Public Holidays

• Quarterly Bonus

• Annual Salary Increment

• Annual Christmas Bonus

• Patent Bonus

• HMO after 3 months (for Full-time Tea
mbers only)

• Education Assistance Program

• SWOOC Tea
mber Discounts

• Referral Bonus Program

• Work/Life Balance

• Salary depends on experience. Paid biweekly via Wise.



If you are a great fit for this position, please reply to this job post with your updated resume. Applications without an updated resume will not be considered.



SWOOC Games team is looking forward to meeting you!

title: LONG TERM General VA With Strong Writing And Social Media Skills
description:
Please read carefully to understand what this job is about and how to apply.



Hi there! I’m Ariana and I run a few UK-based online crafts websites, including YouTube channels, social media accounts on Instagram &
, and online shops. Here are 3 of them as reference:

- 

- 

- 



I am seeking a long-term part-time (4 hours) General VA with strong social media and writing skills to help me and my Senior VA. Knowledge on how to use AI for writing is a strong plus.



No prior crafts/crochet knowledge is required, but you must know good English (written and spoken) and be available for Microsoft Teams screen-sharing calls every week to discuss tasks with my Senior VA.



I know crafts and crochet are more of a women's thing, but men are more than welcome to apply. I just need someone reliable, honest, willing to learn, and who has a good understanding on how social media and Wordpress blogging works. The job does not require you to know how to craft.



While I can teach you the technical skills on using AI for writing blogs and social media, and we provide you with prompts to guide you, having creative writing skills is something you MUST bring to the table. You should already understand what makes a great caption or blog intro.



We use AI to help us write our blog posts and social media, and we will give you the prompts and teach you how to use them. We’ll provide on-the-job training and guide you through every task.



I am looking for someone who can work with us for a long time. This is an established business, and we need permanent assistants to work with us.



We work in a relaxed, friendly environment, and work hours are flexible. You can work daytime or nighttime, weekends or weekdays. We work on a weekly task basis schedule, so you know exactly what needs to be done and what the deadline is.



Contact multiple times a week with my Senior VA through Microsoft Teams’ chat or screen-share is a MUST to keep on top of every task.







Your main tasks will be:

Use AI captions to generate blog posts and social media captions

Research tasks such as finding topics for blogs, finding keywords, compiling listicles

Humanize AI generated content for blog and social media and put it in blog format inside Wordpress along with the media pictures and videos created by us

Managing social media comments

Various admin tasks as needed

Updating old blog posts with new images and videos as provided

SEO & Keyword research





All tasks will be fully explained with step-by-step instructions so you will know exactly what to do. You'll also have my Senior VA's support if you are stuck on a daily basis.





Why join my team?

- Long-term job, this is an established business, not a start-up

- Flexible work hours and workdays, as long as the deadlines are met

- Training on the job

- friendly and relaxed work environment





What I require from you:

- You must write and understand English well; we can't teach you if you can't understand us

- You MUST be familiar with AI, using it to brainstorm, generate text, etc.

- High attention to detail is a MUST

- Regular weekly contact through chat to discuss upcoming tasks, mainly with my Senior VA, who is from the Philippines as well

- Asking questions if you are not sure how to do something is a MUST

- You must be computer savvy, own your laptop, and have a stable, strong internet connection





Experience using the tools and platforms below helps, but we will also show you and train you on each task:

- Social media 
, Pinterest, Instagram, TikTok)

- ClickUp

- Google docs/sheets

- Canva

- AI for writing

- Strong writing skills for blog and social media



Required office equipment

- Home office (not working from coffee shops, malls, or anything like that)

- A good, fast computer

- High-speed internet connection is a MUST

- Microsoft Teams on your mobile, so we can contact you

- You will not be required to pay for any software we use





If you think you might be a good fit for this position, please apply by:



1. Changing the subject of this
 to “ *Add Your Name Here* - Job Application Crafting Happiness”



2. Send me your Microsoft Teams
 or ID and rough times when you are available for the interview. A video interview with your laptop or PC is required and will be conducted by my Senior VA, Seff.

title: Short Term Shopify Store Builder Needed (Product Setup + Store Build)
description:
We are an Australian based branding and apparel company looking for a Shopify expert to assist with building a Shopify store for a short term project.



This is a project based role, however if the work is done well there may be ongoing opportunities for future projects.



We are looking for someone who is confident building a store from the ground up and can work efficiently without constant supervision.



Scope of Work



The project will involve:



• Setting up a Shopify store from scratch

• Installing and configuring a Shopify theme

• Creating collections and navigation menus

• Uploading products with variants (sizes and colours)

• Uploading product images and descriptions

• Setting up policies and basic store settings

• Ensuring the store layout is clean and professional

• Making sure everything is organised and easy to manage



Some products will include multiple variants, so experience working with size and colour variants is essential.



Requirements



• Strong experience building Shopify stores

• Confident working with product variants

• Good understanding of store layout and organisation

• Attention to detail

• Ability to follow instructions

• Fast and reliable communication

• Able to complete work within agreed timeframe



Bonus Skills (Preferred but Not Essential)



• Experience working with apparel products

• Experience building Shopify stores for clothing brands

• Basic graphic design skills

• Experience optimising images for web use



Project Details



• Short term project

• Estimated duration: 1 to 3 weeks

• Potential for ongoing work if successful

• Must be able to communicate clearly and provide progress updates



To Apply



Please include:



• Examples of Shopify stores you have built

• A brief description of your role in those projects

• Your estimated timeframe to complete a store build

• Your hourly rate or project rate



Important:

Start your application with the word “STORE” so we know you have read this job description properly.

title: Python Automation Builder (APIs, Slack, SQLite, YAML)
description:
We are hiring a skilled Python Automation Builder for a fixed-scope implementation project.



This role suits someone who is strong at building from detailed documentation, following exact specs, integrating APIs, and producing clean, reliable work. You should be comfortable working with Python, YAML, SQLite, and Slack, and you should care about testing, debugging, and correctness.



This is not a creative strategy role. This is a build-and-implementation role for someone who can take clear technical instructions and turn them into a working system.



[There may be future work for the right person across technical VA, automation, systems, and AI-assisted workflow projects.]



Project Type:

- Fixed-scope project

- Estimated build effort: 45–60 hours for an experienced builder

- Project fee of $575 USD for the full scoped build, testing, bug fixes, and refinement to acceptance standards.



What You Will Build:

- You will help build a Python-based alerting and summarization system from a detailed set of pre-written documents, templates, YAML configs, and checklists.



You will be working from:

- Locked specs

- YAML config files

- Message templates

- Acceptance tests

- A step-by-step build guide

- Implementation checklists

- You are not expected to invent the product logic from scratch.

- You are expected to implement it accurately, test it properly, and refine it until it behaves correctly.



Main Responsibilities:

- Set up the repo structure

- Implement config loading and validation

- Build the SQLite database and migrations

- Connect external APIs

- Normalize and store incoming data

- Implement rules-based classification and alert logic

- Implement clustering and update logic

- Build scheduled digest generation

- Connect Slack delivery via webhooks

- Add dry-run, replay, and testing support

- Run tests, fix bugs, and improve reliability

- Keep the code modular and easy to refine later



Priority Skills for This Role:

- Python + APIs + reliability

- YAML / config-driven systems

- Testing and debugging

- LLM / prompt / AI workflow familiarity (bonus)



Required Skills - You must ALREADY be strong in:

- Python

- REST APIs

- JSON / YAML

- SQLite

- Linux / VPS basics

- Cron or scheduled jobs

- Webhooks (Slack)

- Debugging and testing

- Reading and following technical documentation carefully



Bonus Skills - These are helpful:

- Pydantic

- Structured logging

- Pytest

- Retry / backoff handling

- Data normalization

- Text processing

- Reddit API / PRAW

- OpenAI / Claude API integration

- Prompt engineering

- Troubleshooting LLM outputs

- Building reliable AI-assisted workflows with guardrails



Ideal Person - You are a strong fit if you:

- Can follow written instructions carefully

- Write clean, simple, maintainable code

- Test your work properly before calling it done

- Care about correctness, reliability, and edge cases

- Can work independently once the scope is clear

- Ask smart questions instead of guessing



You are not a fit if you:

- Prefer vague instructions

- Want to redesign the system instead of implementing it

- Skip testing / steps

- Rush through details

- Rely on hard-coded shortcuts instead of proper config-driven logic



How To Apply. Please include the following in your reply:

- A short intro

- Your Python/API/automation experience

- 2–3 examples of systems or automation's you have built

- Your hourly rate in USD

- Your current availability (hours per week and date available)

- Include the word “structured” somewhere in your application. [Applications without it will not be considered]

- In the first line of your application, answer this in one sentence:

"What makes you a strong fit for a spec-driven Python automation build?"

title: Sales & Admin Coordinator — Australia Boat Hire Agency
description:
Sales & Admin Coordinator — Sydney Boat Hire Agency (Part-Time trial ? Full-Time)



$8 USD/hr + Uncapped Performance Bonus | 9am-5pm AEST (7am-3pm PHT)



1 Month trial to 
 days per week transitioning to 5 days upon successful trial



About Us

We are a boat charter agency in Sydney. We manage 160+ boats and help customers book vessels for birthdays, corporate events, weddings, and private cruises. No boat experience needed — we teach the product. You bring the sales ability.



We have an AI-powered dashboard that helps with pricing, recommendations etc... Your job is to be the expert on top of that — understand what customers need, recommend the right options, and close the booking.



Who You Are



You're the kind of person who proactively researches and learns. When a customer asks about something you've never heard of, you research it and come back sounding like you've done it a hundred times. You don't wait to be told what to do — you see what needs doing and you do it.



You're motivated by earning, not just by a salary. When you see an uncapped commission, you get excited about the earning opportunity.



You care about the details — the right name, the right price, the right date, the needs of the client. Because one mistake in a $15,000 booking is a very expensive mistake.



What You'll Do



Handle inbound customer enquiries via
 and close bookings (75% of the role)

Occasionally call customers or boat operators — maybe 4-5 calls per day, not a phone-heavy role

Research unfamiliar requests using Google, ChatGPT, or whatever tools you need

Website updates, social media, coordinating with boat operators, keeping records up to date (25%)

Build relationships with boat operators — you'll be their main point of contact for bookings, availability, and

customer requirements



What We're Looking For



Strong written English and comfortable on the phone

Sales experience — you've sold something before and enjoyed it

Resourceful, detail-oriented, coachable

Fast — our best performers reply within minutes, not hours

Reliable — you show up on time, every time



Compensation



"$8 USD/hr base plus commissions on your bookings. Performance bonus that scales the more you sell — the harder you work, the higher the rate. Quiet months add a few hundred on top of base. Strong months add $500-1,000+. Our best months? $2,000+ in bonus. No cap. Top performers earn $2,500-3,500+ USD/month total.



Equipment Required

Computer with Chrome browser

Stable internet (minimum 10 Mbps)

Headset with microphone and webcam

Quiet workspace



How to Apply



To show you've read this listing carefully, begin your application with the word "Harbour".



Include:

A short message (not a template) explaining why you'd be good at this role

A 60-second video introducing yourself — camera on, tell us about a time you sold something or helped a customer. Upload to Google Drive or a familiar way to include the link to the video.

Your available days and hours in AEST

title: Video Content Editor & Assistant (Short + Long Form Storytelling)
description:
???? JOB TITLE



Video Content Editor & Assistant (Short + Long Form Storytelling)

Remote | Part-Time (20 hrs/week, potential to grow)



???? COMPENSATION



$6–$8/hour (based on experience)

Paid biweekly

Long-term opportunity with potential for increased hours



???? LOCATION



Philippines (strong English communication required)



? ABOUT US



We are an inspirational lifestyle and jewelry brand built around a powerful message:



Everyone is beautiful.



Our founder and CEO is a jewelry designer, entrepreneur, cancer survivor, and individual with a disability who is building a movement centered on:



• confidence

• kindness

• inclusion

• celebrating people with unique abilities



Our content blends real-life moments, storytelling, and uplifting messages, and we are looking for someone who can help bring that content to life through video.



We are building a long-term team, not hiring short-term freelancers.



???? ABOUT THE ROLE



This is a video-first role, not a typical admin VA position.



You will be responsible for transforming raw footage into engaging content, including:



Short-form content



• Instagram Reels

• TikTok

• YouTube Shorts



Long-form content



• YouTube videos

• interviews

• lifestyle storytelling

• event recap / micro-documentary edits



You will NOT be responsible for posting or scheduling — our social media manager handles that.



Your role is to prepare high-quality, engaging content that is ready to publish.



???? WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR



We are looking for someone who understands how to create engaging, scroll-stopping content, including:



• strong hooks in the first few seconds

• pacing that keeps viewers watching

• storytelling that captures attention

• ability to identify emotional or compelling moments



???? KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

???? Video Editing



• Edit engaging short-form videos (Reels, TikTok, Shorts)

• Edit longer-form storytelling videos (5–15 minutes)

• Add captions, music, and transitions

• Create multiple short clips from long-form videos



?? Content Clipping & Selection



• Review raw footage and identify the best moments

• Pull high-quality clips for social media

• Select strong hooks and engaging segments

• Choose the best frames from iPhone Live Photos



????? Content Organization



• Organize raw and edited content

• Remove duplicate or unnecessary files

• Maintain a clean and structured content library

• Prepare final files for publishing



?? WORKFLOW



We use an iCloud shared folder to manage content.



You should be comfortable:



• working with large photo and video files

• downloading and uploading content

• organizing files within shared folders



? REQUIREMENTS



• Proven experience editing both short-form and long-form video

• Strong understanding of pacing, storytelling, and engagement

• Ability to identify what makes content compelling

• Strong English (written + conversational)

• Organized, detail-oriented, and reliable

• Ability to work independently and meet deadlines



? BONUS (NOT REQUIRED)



• Experience editing YouTube content

• Understanding of social media trends and hooks

• Experience with lifestyle, fashion, or inspirational brands



? HOURS



20–30 hours per week to start



Flexible schedule

Opportunity to grow into a larger role over time



???? WHAT WE OFFER



• Long-term stable position

• Flexible schedule

• Positive, mission-driven brand

• Opportunity to grow with the company

• Supportive and respectful work environment



???? HOW TO APPLY (IMPORTANT)



To apply, please include ALL of the following:



1?? Your resume



2?? Links to 3 short-form videos you have edited



3?? Links to 2 long-form videos you have edited



4?? A short paragraph explaining why you are a good fit



5?? A 1-minute video introducing yourself and describing your editing experience



? At the TOP of your application, include the phrase:



Choose Joy



Applications without this phrase may not be reviewed.



???? NEXT STEP (SELECTED APPLICANTS)



If selected, you may be asked to complete a small paid test task ($20–$25), which may include:



• editing a short reel

• editing a short long-form clip

• identifying strong hooks from footage



? FINAL NOTE



We are looking for someone who wants to grow with a meaningful brand, not just complete tasks.



If you enjoy creating content that inspires others and tells a story, we would love to meet you.

title: Product Research & Listing VA – UAE Ecommerce (Shopify + Meta Ads)
description:
We're a UAE-based ecommerce company running multiple Shopify stores selling across the UAE and KSA. We're looking for a sharp, self-driven Virtual Assistant to handle product research, creative sourcing, store listings, and ad launches on a weekly basis.



This is an ongoing role with clear deliverables — not a one-off project.





## What You'll Be Doing



**Product Research (Daily)**

- Research and identify new winning products with strong potential in the UAE/KSA market

- Use the Meta Ad Library as your primary research tool to find trending products and validate demand

- Present product recommendations with supporting data (ad examples, competitor pricing, margins, 1688 supplier link)



**Creative Sourcing**

- Find high-performing ad creatives (video and static) for both new and existing products

- Source creatives from international markets that can be localized for the UAE audience



**Shopify Store Management**

- List approved products on our Shopify store with accurate titles, descriptions, images, and pricing

- Set up volume discount bundles for each product



**Meta Ads Launch**

- Launch approved ad creatives on Meta 
/Instagram) following our existing campaign structure and naming conventions

- You won't be managing or optimizing ads — just setting them up and launching per our guidelines



---



## Weekly Output



You are expected to deliver **7 outputs per week**. Each output consists of either:

- **5–10 new product recommendations** with supporting data (ad examples, competitor pricing, margins), OR

- **10–20 new creatives** sourced for existing products in our catalogue



On top of that, you'll handle listing approved products to Shopify and launching approved ads on Meta as they come through.





## Requirements



- Experience with Shopify (listing products, basic store management)

- Experience with Meta Ads Manager (campaign creation and ad setup)

- Familiarity with the Meta Ad Library for product and creative research

- Strong eye for winning ad creatives and product-market fit

- Comfortable working independently with minimal supervision

- Reliable internet and available during UAE business hours (or with reasonable overlap)

- Good written English



## Nice to Have



- Previous experience working with ecommerce brands

- Experience with dropshipping or general store models



---

Send a short message covering:

title: [URGENT] Customer Success Manager / Product Specialist - EST TIMEZONE
description:
We are looking for a highly customer-focused Customer Success Manager / Product Specialist who will serve as the primary product expert for our platform. This role requires someone who deeply understands the product and can confidently guide customers through onboarding, product usage, troubleshooting, and best practices.



The ideal candidate is experienced in handling client relationships, answering product-related questions, conducting product demonstrations, and ensuring customers maximize the value of the platform. You will act as a trusted partner to customers by helping them successfully adopt the product while providing timely support and strategic guidance.



This role requires strong communication skills, product expertise, and the ability to manage customer concerns with professionalism and empathy.



Key Responsibilities



Customer Onboarding & Adoption

• Guide new customers through the onboarding process, ensuring a smooth and successful setup.

• Help clients understand product capabilities and best practices to accelerate adoption.

• Provide clear walkthroughs and training sessions to ensure customers can effectively use the platform.



Product Expertise & Customer Support

• Serve as the primary product expert and point of contact for customer questions.

• Provide timely support by diagnosing issues, answering inquiries, and guiding customers toward solutions.

• Maintain a strong understanding of product features, updates, and workflows to assist customers effectively.



Client Relationship Management

• Build strong, long-term relationships with customers and key stakeholders.

• Act as a trusted advisor by proactively identifying opportunities to improve the customer experience.

• Ensure customers feel supported and confident using the platform.



Product Demonstrations & Training

• Conduct product demos for new and existing clients.

• Provide guidance and recommendations based on client needs and use cases.

• Help customers understand how to best leverage the product for their workflows.



Customer Retention & Success

• Monitor customer health, engagement, and satisfaction.

• Proactively identify risks or potential issues and address them before they impact customer experience.

• Work closely with internal teams to ensure customer feedback is communicated and addressed.



Key Qualifications & Skills

Experience

• 3–5+ years of experience in Customer Success, Account Management, Client Support, or similar customer-facing roles.

• Proven experience managing and supporting clients in a SaaS or technology-driven environment is highly preferred.



Customer Handling Expertise

• Strong background in managing customer relationships and handling inquiries professionally.

• Ability to remain calm, solution-oriented, and empathetic when resolving customer concerns.



Communication Skills

• Excellent verbal and written communication skills.

• Comfortable presenting product features, running demos, and explaining technical concepts to non-technical users.



Product & Technical Aptitude

• Ability to quickly become an expert in the platform and confidently support users.

• Comfortable troubleshooting workflows, product features, and user issues.



Problem-Solving & Empathy

• Strong analytical and critical thinking skills.

• Ability to understand customer pain points and provide practical, customer-focused solutions.



Typical Success Metrics (KPIs)

• Customer Satisfaction Score (CSAT)

• Net Promoter Score (NPS)

• Customer Retention Rate

• Product Adoption and Engagement

• Response and Resolution Time for Customer Support
