title: We’re Hiring: SEO Strategist (Philippines-Based)
description:
I’m Dustin, founder of Marketing Done Right, a Cleveland-based digital marketing agency. We’re on the lookout for a motivated SEO Strategist to join our Philippines-based crew and take ownership of client projects.



About Us

Marketing Done Right is a close-knit digital marketing agency that delivers top-tier Local SEO and National SEO solutions. We pride ourselves on collaboration, innovation, and helping our tea
mbers grow professionally while delivering measurable results for our clients.





Why Join Us?

Supportive Team Culture – Work with a collaborative, international team where your contributions truly matter.

Career Growth – Long-term role with opportunities to grow and advance.

Performance-Based Salary Increase – Strong results and consistent performance can lead to salary growth.

Diverse Projects – Lead SEO strategies across a variety of client accounts and industries.

Job Stability – We’re in it for the long run and are looking for someone who is, too.





Role (Overview of the Position)



This position will be responsible for leading the strategy and planning of assigned client SEO projects. The strategist will execute these strategies through MDR’s pod and support systems, working with SEO Specialists, SEO Supports, VAs, and the content team. This role involves taking clear ownership of assigned projects, ensuring strategies are aligned with client goals, guided by data, and carried through effectively from planning to delivery.



Responsibilities (Tasks Associated with the Role)



- Manage multiple client projects simultaneously while ensuring quality, focus, and on-time delivery.

- Lead the strategy and planning for assigned client SEO projects.

- Create monthly reports to show progress, highlight wins, and identify opportunities for improvement.

- Collaborate with the content team by suggesting topics and outlining content deliverables for each month.

- Work with SEO Specialists, SEO Supports, and VAs within the pod system to execute strategies effectively.

- Oversee timelines, deliverables, and workflows to ensure projects are managed smoothly from start to finish.

- Conduct audits, keyword research, and performance reviews to inform data-driven decisions.

- Provide guidance, direction, and feedback to pod members to maintain alignment and quality.

- Develop and maintain SEO documents (such as strategies, audits, and reports) for both internal use and client reporting.

- Take ownership of project outcomes, ensuring strategies stay on track and aligned with client goals.



Results (Expected Accomplishments)



- Assigned SEO projects are delivered with clear direction, steady progress, and alignment to client business objectives.

- Multiple client accounts are handled efficiently, with competing priorities balanced without delays or quality issues.

- Monthly reports consistently highlight wins, performance insights, and opportunities, equipping leadership with valuable talking points for client updates.

- Content deliverables are strategically planned, ensuring each piece contributes to improved visibility and rankings.

- Pod collaboration is seamless, with Specialists, Supports, and VAs executing tasks on time and to standard.

- Timelines, workflows, and deliverables are proactively managed, preventing bottlenecks and ensuring smooth project flow.

- Audits and keyword research regularly uncover growth opportunities, guiding smarter decision-making.

- Performance reviews lead to tangible strategy adjustments that improve traffic, rankings, or conversions.

- Leadership receives accurate, well-structured documentation that strengthens client communication and trust.

- Strategists demonstrate effective delegation and feedback, resulting in stronger team performance and accountability within pods.

- Campaigns remain adaptable to changing client needs or market conditions without losing 
ntum.

- Projects demonstrate consistent alignment with MDR’s quality standards and brand reputation.

- Workload across multiple clients is prioritized effectively, ensuring no project falls behind schedule.

- Collaboration with the content team results in deliverables that not only support SEO but also enhance overall marketing strategy.

- Client satisfaction is reinforced by clear communication, visible progress, and the strategist’s ownership of outcomes.

- Strategists show the ability to anticipate potential challenges and address them before they become roadblocks.

- Reports and strategies are presented in a way that simplifies complex data into actionable insights.

- Campaign outcomes contribute to MDR’s larger goal of delivering measurable growth and value for clients.





Requirements (Expected Proficiencies)



- Proven experience in SEO strategy, including keyword research, audits, and data-driven decision-making.

- Strong understanding of SEO best practices, local SEO, analytics, and reporting tools (e.g., Google Analytics, Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, etc.).

- Ability to manage and prioritize multiple client accounts at the same time without losing focus on quality or deadlines.

- Skilled in creating SEO documents for both client reporting and internal use (such as strategies, reports, and project plans) that clearly outline progress, insights, and next steps.

- Experience working closely with cross-functional teams (such as content, design, development, PPC, and virtual assistants) to ensure deliverables align with SEO strategies and client goals.

- Strong communication and collaboration skills, both written and verbal.

- Ability to think critically, stay calm under pressure, and find solutions in urgent or challenging situations.

- Comfortable giving direction, feedback, and guidance to tea
mbers to keep projects on track.

- Detail-oriented, organized, and able to keep timelines and deliverables moving smoothly.

- Familiarity with the latest SEO trends, algorithm updates, and digital marketing practices.

Interested applicants must fill out this Google Form to be considered:

title: Packaging Graphic Designer
description:
Job Summary:

We are a a young and dynamic growing E-commerce company focusing on baby and maternity products with customers based in the USA, Canada, and Europe. We are seeking a capable Packaging Graphic Designer to deliver positive results in packaging design. If you are looking for a challenging, rewarding, and fulfilling career, we welcome you to apply for the job below.



Key Responsibilities:

• Build packaging layouts on dielines (boxes, sleeves, labels, inserts, hang tags, stickers) using KeaBabies brand guidelines.

• Apply and format packaging content: approved copy, icons, benefit callouts, charts, barcodes/UPCs, product info, and required markings.

• Prepare print-ready files: correct bleed/safe zones, dieline alignment, CMYK setup, font handling (outline/package), linked images, and export specs.

• Create internal review mockups (clean 2D + simple 3D visuals) for quick approvals.

• Handle packaging updates and versioning quickly (pack count/size changes, language/copy updates, claim changes, retailer/Amazon variants, seasonal refreshes).

• Design occasional full-color packaging boxes for existing products (front/back/sides), keeping hierarchy clear and branding consistent.

• Maintain packaging templates and systems so new SKUs/variations stay consistent (type scale, grids, icon rules, layout logic).

• Organize and deliver final handoff packages to Product Development (clear file naming, folder structure, exports, and “final” version control).



Must-have requirements:

• Packaging design + production experience (consumer goods preferred), with ability to work from dielines.

• Strong understanding of print production basics:

1. bleed / safe zone / trim

2. CMYK vs RGB

3. exporting print-ready PDFs

4. font handling (outlining/packaging) + linked assets

• High attention to detail (typo-free, aligned layouts, consistent spacing, correct SKUs/info).

• Ability to execute both minimal / limited-ink e-commerce packaging, and full-color box designs for existing products when needed.

• Comfortable with fast iteration + versioning (counts, sizes, copy/claim updates, variants).

• Strong file hygiene: organized layers, naming conventions, clean exports, version control.

• Clear communication and ability to implement feedback quickly in an async remote workflow.

• Capability to use the following tools:

1. Adobe Illustrator

2. Adobe Photoshop + Acrobat



Nice-to-have, but optional:

• Working knowledge of InDesign

• Experience with Amazon/e-commerce packaging constraints (clarity-first layouts, compliance callouts)



Portfolio requirements:

• Portfolio showing packaging work (ideally includes at least: - one minimal/limited-ink style layout, and - one full-color box design)



Additional Information:

• Title your message: "I want to be your next Packaging Graphic Designer"

• No moonlighting is allowed during work hours in this role.

The ideal candidate will be responsible for coming up with patterns for textile products and assisting in other projects such as packaging and illustrations for baby/maternity industry. The designer will be expected to work collaboratively with our team to produce high-quality designs and assist in other design projects as and when required.

• Original Illustration: Create engaging, unique, and high-quality illustrations specifically tailored for KeaBabies' range of baby and children's products, such as swaddles, blankets, and bibs.

• Packaging Design: Assist in developing compelling and functional packaging designs that are on-brand, protect the product, and significantly enhance the overall customer experience.

• Production Readiness & Quality: Ensure all designs are production-ready and technically sound, meeting high-quality standards. This includes preparing accurate files and maintaining organized project records.

Examples relevant to the baby and children's product industry are highly preferred.

title: Product Creative Designer
description:
Job Summary:

We are seeking a highly creative and experienced Product Creative Designer to join our growing design team. In this role, you will be responsible for conceptualizing, ideating, sketching, and developing 3D models for innovative baby products that combine functionality, aesthetics, and emotional connection. You will drive early-stage product ideas — turning insights and trends into tangible concepts — and collaborate closely with our product and creative teams to bring these ideas to life.



This role requires strong conceptual thinking, aesthetic sensitivity, and technical product design skills. If you are passionate about designing purposeful baby products that make everyday parenting easier and more joyful, we would love to hear from you.



Note: Please see application instructions below.

• Conduct market and consumer research to identify trends, unmet needs, and product opportunities relevant to baby products.

• Collaborate with the Senior Designer, Creative, and Product Development teams to explore, refine, and finalize design directions.

• Translate abstract ideas and feedback into clear visual storytelling and refined design outputs.

• Support multiple design projects simultaneously, maintaining quality, accuracy, and alignment with brand standards.

• Use Photoshop, Illustrator, and 3D modeling tools (e.g., SolidWorks, Fusion 360) to visualize and present design concepts professionally.



Requirements:

• Minimum of 2 years of working experience in a relevant product design or industrial design role.

• A portfolio that highlights concept sketches, 3D visualizations, and final product outcomes — especially for consumer or baby-related products.

• Strong conceptual thinking — demonstrated ability to ideate and communicate design intent through clear hand sketches and storyboards.

• Creative, energetic, and passionate about the baby product industry with a focus on safety and ergonomics.

• Required proficiency in design software, including Photoshop, Illustrator, and 3D modeling skills (e.g., SolidWorks). 3D rendering skills is a plus.

Order Processing: Assist customers with placing orders and addressing inquiries about products, shipping, and returns.

Feedback Collection: Collect customer insights and feedback to refine our product offerings and improve satisfaction.



Reporting: Maintain detailed records of customer interactions and sales activities for performance evaluation.



Qualifications:

Demonstrated experience in customer service or sales, ideally in a virtual setting.

Excellent written communication skills with a friendly demeanor.

Solid grasp of online sales techniques and customer engagement strategies.

Ability to multitask and navigate a fast-paced work environment.



What We Offer:

Competitive salary, with incentives based on performance.

Flexible hours and the ability to work remotely.

A chance to be a part of a vibrant and supportive team.

Access to training and development resources for skill enhancement.



How to Apply:

If you are interested, please send your resume and a short cover letter detailing your relevant experience and suitability for the role to

title: Bookkeeper
description:
BOOKKEEPER (ENTRY-LEVEL | LONG-TERM | REMOTE)



Company: Luxury Bookkeeping & Tax Medics ER

Schedule: 30 Hours Per Week (Availability Required)

Hours: 10:00 AM – 6:00 PM CST

Philippines Time: 11:00 PM - 07:00 AM PHT





COMPENSATION & STRUCTURE

• $250 USD monthly during training period

• Increase to $300 USD monthly after 6 months

• Fixed pay during first year

• Performance-based increases only

• Annual performance bonus

• Paid Christmas holiday

• Student load is capped to prevent stress and burnout

• This is a long-term position only



This is an entry-level role with structured systems and training.





ROLE SUMMARY

We are hiring an Entry-Level Bookkeeper to support client accounts using QuickBooks Online.



This role is designed for someone who already understands the fundamentals of bookkeeping and has working familiarity with QuickBooks Online, but does not need to be advanced or perfect.



You will follow clear SOPs, checklists, and training videos to complete assigned tasks independently.







REQUIRED BASIC KNOWLEDGE

You must have a basic understanding of the below:

• QuickBooks Online

• Categorizations

Great English ( You will speak with students)



We will provide structured training for firm-specific systems. So anything you don’t know we will teach you.







CORE RESPONSIBILITIES

• Categorize transactions in QuickBooks Online

• Maintain organized books using firm checklists

• Track payments and update records

• Review accounts for consistency

• Communicate when documentation is missing

• Prepare books for internal review

• Answer student
s when assigned

• Conduct simple check-in financial calls (scripted, once per student every 3 months)



All tasks are checklist-based.





ADDITIONAL TASKS (AS NEEDED)

• Create simple Canva graphics

• Prepare clean PowerPoint presentations





QUALIFICATIONS

• Degree in Accounting or related field

• Working familiarity with QuickBooks Online (required)

• Strong written and spoken English

• Reliable internet and computer

• Quiet, professional workspace

• Detail-oriented and able to follow systems

• Able to work CST hours consistently



HOW TO APPLY

Submit:

2-Minute Video Introduction – Please Answer Clearly and Directly SO YOU CAN BE CONSIDERED

	2.	How long do you see yourself working with us if hired?

	5.	Do you currently run or own any business, freelance work, or online selling activity?

	7.	Describe your QuickBooks Online experience in detail. What specific tasks have you personally completed?

	8.	If you do NOT have QuickBooks Online experience, please state that clearly. Are you a fast learner, and can you commit to learning our systems quickly and thoroughly?

	9.	Have you performed bank reconciliations before? If yes, explain your process briefly.If no that’s ok. We just want to know your skill set.

12. What do you do for fun in your spare time?

title: DATA ENTRY CLERK - Hourly Pay
description:
We’re looking for a reliable Data Entry Assistant to support a growing U.S.-based tax and accounting firm. This role involves highly sensitive client data, so dependability, communication, and accuracy are non-negotiable.



Please read carefully. This message is meant to give full awareness upfront so you can d
 whether this role is truly a fit.



ROLE STRUCTURE

This position may be hourly or salaried, depending on alignment, performance, and availability. At this time we are only looking fir candidates in a salaried position.



• Compensation is discussed and negotiated after conversation

• Rates are not posted publicly





HOURS & AVAILABILITY

• Monday–Friday

• Core hours: 10:00 AM – 6:00 PM CST (1-hour break)

• Peak tax season (January–April, September–October): hours may increase if needed

• Must check messages daily and remain responsive



Time Off Policy

	•	Hourly: No paid time off in the first year. If you don’t work, you don’t get paid.

	•	Salaried: Some paid holidays may be included in the first year; vacation time begins the following year.



All details are explained clearly during the interview so there are no surprises later.





WHO THIS ROLE IS FOR

This role is for someone who:

• Loves structure and clear instructions

• Is dependable even when work is repetitive or quiet

• Communicates clearly and consistently

• Can handle routine work without disappearing

• Is looking for a long-term role, not short-term gigs



This is not a role for someone who needs constant flexibility, frequent time off, or loosely defined expectations.





RESPONSIBILITIES

• Enter and organize tax data (W-2s, 1099s, receipts, etc.)

• Label and upload documents accurately

• Double-check all work for errors

• Follow checklists and procedures exactly

• Flag missing or unclear information promptly

• Protect confidentiality at all times





TOOLS YOU’LL USE

• Drake Tax

• TaxDome

• Google Drive (Docs, Sheets)

• Trello

• Other tax software as applicable





GROWTH PATH

Your first year is a foundation year.



After one year of consistent, reliable service, you may be considered for:

• A permanent salaried role

• Paid holidays

• Paid Christmas shutdown

• Annual bonuses



These benefits are not available during the first year and are only available for salaried roles.





PERSONALITY & CULTURE

We value honesty, communication, consistency, and positive energy.

We joke, support each other, and work hard during tax season without drama.



If you’re dependable, focused, communicative, and calm under pressure, you’ll thrive here.

If you tend to go quiet, disappear, or feel overwhelmed by structure, this role will not be a fit.

title: Dm setter / Social media manager
description:
I'm looking for a DM setter and social media manager to join my team.



Here's what the role looks like:



DM Setting:

- Responding to inbound DMs from interested followers

- Qualifying leads and moving them through the pipeline

- Booking sales calls or collecting info for me to close

- Following up with warm leads who haven't responded

- Using a script and framework I provide



Important: every DM needs to feel human and personal. You open someone's profile, look at their content, and write something specific to them. For example: "Hey [name], I was going through my comments and saw your account, wow, your handstand is beautiful already! How long have you been training?" That kind of energy. AI can be used to help structure or draft messages, but the final message must feel real and personal not copy-paste.



Social Media Management:

- Uploading and scheduling content I film

- Writing captions based on my style and tone

- Engaging with comments and replies on posts

- Reposting and cross-posting across platforms (Instagram, TikTok, Youtube)



What I'm looking for:

- Someone proactive, reliable and takes ownership

- Good written English

- Available daily, even if just 1-2 hours

- Someone who understands personal brand and online coaching

- AI tools are fine to use, but the human touch is non-negotiable



If this sounds like you, let me know and we can jump on a quick call to see if it's a fit.



- Sjakie

title: E-commerce Product Specialist
description:
We operate three established and profitable e-commerce stores and are expanding our team to support growth and product excellence. We’re looking for an experienced, detail-oriented E-commerce Product Specialist who can manage product listings, perform web scraping, and help optimize our Shopify stores.



This is a senior-level role with long-term potential for the right candidate. PLEASE READ THE ENTIRE JOB DESCRIPTION AND ANSWER ALL QUESTIONS FOR YOUR APPLICATION TO BE CONSIDERED.



Responsibilities -

• Manage and maintain product information across all stores: uploading new products, updating listings, and maintaining vendor databases.

• Coordinate with vendors to gather accurate product information, lead times, and order details.

• Research products and competitors to identify new opportunities and monitor performance metrics.

• Optimize Shopify listings for product rankings, conversion rates, and sales growth.

• Perform mass uploads and bulk changes to products efficiently.

• Quality-check product images, titles, descriptions, and specifications for accuracy.

• Collaborate with the team to resolve product and website issues promptly.

• Oversee inventory reconciliation and track stock levels.

• Document SOPs, maintain records of product performance, and suggest process improvements.

• Complete daily administrative tasks, including reports, logs, and operational updates.

• Manage assigned tasks proactively and independently, without needing follow-ups or reminders.



What You Need to Succeed -



Required Experience:

• 2+ years of Product Management or Product Specialist experience in an e-commerce environment.

• Proven hands-on experience with Shopify (being Shopify Certified is a plus).

• Strong attention to detail (include the word mushroom in your application).

• Comfortable handling multiple priorities in a fast-moving environment.



Technical Requirements:

• Proficiency with Shopify, ClickUp, Airtable, Google Workspace, and web scraping tools.

• Advanced Excel/Google Sheets skills.

• A reliable computer and at least 20 Mbps internet connection.

• Backup solutions for both power and internet outages.



Work Style:

• Self-directed: takes initiative, owns tasks, and solves problems independently.

• Process-minded: documents and refines workflows naturally.

• Detail-oriented: accuracy is a priority.

• Customer-focused: product issues and feedback are opportunities to improve systems.



Work Schedule:

• Full-time, 40 hours/week

• US business hours: 9 PM–6 AM or 10 PM–7 AM PHT

• 1-hour break

• Five days per week



This Role Won’t Be a Match If:

• You need micromanagement or detailed daily task lists.

• You cannot work 9 PM–7 AM PHT consistently.

• You experience frequent power/internet outages without backup solutions.

• You view this as temporary income between other opportunities.



Before You Apply – Please Confirm:

• Weekly payments for the first 4 weeks (starting from week 3), then bi-monthly every other Tuesday.

• Full-time role, US hours.

• Must be open to a one-month trial period.

• Daily End of Shift (EOS) report answering:

  a) What did you do today? (detailed description)

  b) What issues did you run into?

  c) Anything you need help with?



If you agree to all terms, write “I AGREE TO ALL TERMS” and answer the questions below.

Application Instructions (Follow Exactly)

Subject Line:

[Your First Name] – I Am Your Product Specialist

Example: Kevin – I Am Your Product Specialist



Submit:

• Cover letter (focused on relevant e-commerce experience)

• Resume



Answer These Questions (Complete Sentences Required):

• What is your previous experience with managing products for e-commerce companies?

• List the tools/software you’ve used for product management, including web scraping, bulk uploads, or analytics, and explain how you applied them.

• Have you worked with Shopify before? Please describe your tasks.

• Are you currently engaged in another job or commitment?

• How fast is your internet (include a screenshot)?

• Do you have a reliable computer? Please share specs.

• How often do you experience power or internet outages?

• What backup solutions do you have for power outages?

• What backup solutions do you have for internet outages?



Important: AI-generated or template responses will be immediately disqualified. We are looking for thoughtful, specific answers that demonstrate you read and understood this posting.

Technical Requirements:

• Backup solutions for both power and internet outages.



Work Style:

• Self-directed - you take initiative and solve problems independently.

• Detail-oriented with a focus on accuracy.

• Customer-focused - complaints are opportunities to improve systems.

• Process-minded - you document and refine workflows naturally.



Work Schedule:

• Full-time, 40 hours/week

You're NOT a Fit If:

• You need micromanagement or detailed daily task lists

• You view this as temporary income between other opportunities

a) What did you do today? (detailed description)

b) What issues did you run into?

c) Anything you need help with?

If you agree to all terms, write “I AGREE TO ALL TERMS” and answer the questions below.

Example: Kevin – E-commerce Assistant Store Manager



Submit:

Answer These Questions (Complete Sentences Required):

2. What specific Shopify tasks have you performed?

3. What are your current work commitments and availability?

4. Provide your internet speed (include screenshot), computer specifications, and backup solutions for power & internet issues.

5. Provide one example of a difficult customer situation you handled and how you resolved it.

6. Why are you interested in this specific role instead of other VA positions?

title: Looking for 2 Rock Star Web Developers (Wordpress + Vue + Astro) - Exciting Opportunity!

title: Executive Assistant (Short-Term rental/AirBnB Management)
description:
Executive Assistant Responsibilities:



Own the daily agenda and follow-up tracking - if something is discussed in a meeting, YOU make sure it gets done

Make phone calls to US vendors, tenants, and service providers

Coordinate with property managers, plumbers, insurance companies, etc.

Manage Airbnb/VRBO guest communications (excellent English required)

Keep me on track - remind me of deadlines, flag items before they become problems.

Manage and prioritize
 inbox - know what's urgent vs. what can wait

Work independently when I'm unavailable - progress shouldn't stop because I'm in meetings or on vacation

Bookkeeping Responsibilities (QuickBooks Online) - Cross Training on these:



Accounts Payable - vendor payments, bill scheduling

Bank and credit card reconciliation

Auditing - matching receipts to expenses

Review of Profit & Loss statements and Balance Sheets



Required Skills (In Order of Importance)

1. Google Workspace Expert - Docs, Sheets, Drive, Calendar, Gmail



This is #1 for a reason. We want someone who can teach US new tricks.

You should know smart chips, building blocks, conditional formatting, data validation, formulas, calendar management, and more.

If you just "use" Google, this isn't the role. We want a power user.



2. Excellent Written & Spoken English - You'll communicate with American clients, guests, and vendors by
 AND phone



3. QuickBooks Online - Real experience with AP, reconciliation, and financial review



How to Apply:



1.
 your resume to: 

2. Subject line must be exactly: "EA Application - [Your Name] - I read the instructions"

3. In your
, briefly answer:

    > Are you currently working another job? If yes, what hours?

    > What tools/systems do you use to make sure nothing falls through the cracks?

4. Record a 2-3 minute Loom video (free at 
) showing us a Google Workspace trick, shortcut, or feauture you think most people don't know about. Share your screen and talk us through it. This is the most important part of your application.



Note: application without the Loom video will not be considered.

title: Social Media Shopper for Luxury Watches
description:
Applications that do not include all required items in the “How to Apply” section will not be reviewed. We value attention to detail and the ability to follow instructions—key traits for this role. If any part of this application is incomplete or missing, your submission will be automatically disregarded.?



Browse. Discover. Hunt for hidden watch deals.

(No set hours. Total freedom. Serious fun.)



Do you love scrolling through social media and online marketplaces?

Are you obsessed with finding rare gems and scoring amazing deals?

Do you think watches are fascinating — or just plain beautiful?



If you just shouted “YES!”, this might be your dream gig.



About us:



Majestix Collection is a premier destination for buying, selling, and trading luxury timepieces. We curate an exceptional selection of watches for collectors around the world, driven by a commitment to authenticity, transparency, and unparalleled client service. Our main headquarters is located in Garden Grove, California.



What You’ll Do

Scan
 groups, marketplaces, Instagram, and other online platforms for watch listings.

Identify undervalued or rare timepieces (don’t worry — I’ll train you to spot them).

Enter potential deals into a Google Sheet with a built-in calculator to evaluate value.

Help grow our collection of rare, desirable watches.



Why You’ll Love This

Total freedom — work anytime, anywhere. No fixed hours.

Paid to scroll — get paid to do what you already love on your phone or laptop.

Hands-on mentorship — learn directly fro
 how to spot high-value deals and develop an investor’s eye.

Niche, valuable skills — gain knowledge about watches, deal analysis, and market trends.

Fun & flexible — perfect for curious minds, treasure hunters, and explorers.



You’re a Great Fit If You:

Love browsing online for interesting items.

Have a sharp eye for detail and enjoy comparing deals.

Are curious about watches and eager to learn more.

Are independent, self-motivated, and reliable.



Bonus: You already follow watch pages, groups, or forums.





To apply, send the following:



1. Your DISC test - Take it here - 
 - Please send a link to your results.

2. Your personality test - Take it here - 
 - Please send a link to your results.

3. Your updated resume, showcasing your most relevant experience.

4. Typing Test - Take this typing test (30 seconds): 





5. A video or videos that answer the following. Feel free to give as much information and context as possible. Also please make sure that, when you submit the video(s) links, they are in public, viewable format.



a. Tell us about yourself. Hobbies/passions. What are your career/life goals and in what amount of time?

b. Show off your work setup (computer/laptop, monitor(s), speakers, lights, etc) and tech setup - browser you use, other tech/platforms you use

c. Think of one objective you’ve had to complete in your current or previous role. Explain what metric(s) were you measured on (time spent, money saved, traffic/engagement/leads/sales, etc). Reverse engineer said objective with the target measurement in mind. Map out the process that you came up with in google docs, google sheets, or in Canva as a visual representation. How could you have made it easier/faster/better using AI?

d. What are your salary expectations from day one until the end of the first calendar year?



This isn’t just another gig — it’s a chance to dive into the fast-paced, luxury-driven world of watches and become a master at spotting hidden gems others overlook.



Ready to start the hunt?

Apply now — let’s find treasures together.



— Wilson

title: WordPress Developer | Mid-Senior Level
description:
About the Role

We are hiring a WordPress Developer with experience in user-centered design, AI-assisted development, CRM integration, workflow automation, and WooCommerce.

We already have a working WordPress website, a live WooCommerce store, and some existing CRM integrations in place. This is not a build-from-scratch role. We need someone who can step in, understand what we have, and take it further — improving the user experience, expanding CRM and automation capabilities, and maintaining what is already running.



Responsibilities

Web Design and User Experience

Review and improve the existing WordPress website with a focus on usability, navigation, and conversion

Apply UX principles such as visual hierarchy, cognitive load management, and common scanning patterns to optimize current page layouts

Ensure responsive, mobile-first performance across devices and browsers

WooCommerce (Existing Store)

Maintain and optimize the existing product pages, checkout flows, and payment/shipping configurations

Troubleshoot store issues and improve performance

AI-Assisted Development

Use AI coding tools such as Claude Code, OpenAI Codex, or similar platforms to support development, debugging, and code generation

Integrate AI-driven features into the website where applicable 

Stay informed on new AI development tools and evaluate them for practical use

CRM Integration — Zoho CRM and GoHighLevel (Expand Existing Setup)

Review and improve existing CRM integrations between WordPress and Zoho CRM and/or GoHighLevel

Expand integration coverage to include additional contacts, deals, pipelines, custom fields, workflows as needed

Knows how to use Zapier, Make, Pabbly, or n8n to connect WordPress with CRM

Troubleshoot and resolve issues with current integrations

Custom WordPress Development

Build or customize themes using block-based, Full Site Editing, or classic theme approaches

Write backend logic in PHP using WordPress hooks, actions, filters, and the REST API

Create custom post types, taxonomies, meta boxes, and advanced field configurations



Requirements

2–3+ years of WordPress development experience (themes, plugins, and full-stack builds)

WooCommerce experience including store customization, custom extensions, and performance optimization

Understanding of UX design principles and how user behavior applies to web page layouts

Hands-on experience with AI coding tools such as Claude Code, OpenAI Codex, or equivalent

Experience working with Zoho CRM and/or GoHighLevel integrations (contacts, deals, pipelines, webhooks)

Working knowledge of at least one of: Zapier, Make, Pabbly, n8n

Proficiency in PHP, JavaScript, HTML.

Comfortable inheriting and improving existing codebases and integrations



What We Offer

Flexible schedule — work when you're most creative, no time tracker, no micromanagement

Performance-based salary growth — Strong performers move up fast

A collaborative team that values creative input and fresh ideas

Access to AI tools and a professional development budget

Competitive compensation based on experience

A supportive team environment where asking questions is encouraged

Manageable workload with clear priorities — we focus on one thing at a time, not everything at once

Hands-on guidance and clear direction from the team — you will not be left to figure everything out alone

Ready to Apply?



I'd love to see what you can create! To help me understand if we're a great fit, please share the following:



1. Your DISC test - Take it here - 
/disc-personality-test/ - Please send a link to your results.

2. Your personality test - Take it here - 
/free-personality-test - Please send a link to your results.

3. Your updated resume, showcasing your most relevant experience.

4. Typing Test - Take this typing test (30 seconds):


p?minutes=0.5&textfile=0&mode=sent&result_url=
p&bt=0&gt=normal



5. A video or videos that answer the following. Feel free to give as much information and context as possible. Also please make sure that, when you submit the video(s) links, they are in public, viewable format.



a. Tell us about yourself. Hobbies/passions. What are your career/life goals and in what amount of time?

b. Show off your work setup (computer/laptop, monitor(s), speakers, lights, etc) and tech setup - browser you use, other tech/platforms you use

c. Think of one objective you’ve had to complete in your current or previous role. Explain what metric(s) were you measured on (time spent, money saved, traffic/engagement/leads/sales, etc). Reverse engineer said objective with the target measurement in mind. Map out the process that you came up with in google docs, google sheets, or in Canva as a visual representation. How could you have made it easier/faster/better using AI?

Majestix Collection is a premier destination for buying, selling, and trading luxury timepieces. We curate an exceptional selection of watches for collectors around the world, driven by a commitment to authenticity, transparency, and unparalleled client service.

About the Role:



We are seeking a versatile Video Editor skilled in producing both long-form content (YouTube

faceless videos, luxury watch tour videos) and short-form content (TikTok, Instagram Reels,

Editing & Post-Production

- Edit long-form videos for YouTube, including faceless content and high-quality luxury

watch tour videos.

- Create short-form videos such as TikToks, Reels, YouTube Shorts, and other social clips.

- Repurpose long-form videos into short, engaging bite-sized content.

- Add motion graphics, subtitles, transitions, animations, SFX, and music.

- Perform color correction, grading, audio clean-up, and overall quality refinement.

Creative & Strategy

- Collaborate with creative leads to understand briefs, objectives, and desired outcomes.

- Craft compelling narratives, pacing, and visual storytelling across all formats.

- Optimize content for platform-specific best practices (YouTube, TikTok, Instagram,

, etc.).

- Contribute creative ideas for content themes, visual direction, and storytelling approach.

Workflow & Asset Management

- Organize and maintain all media assets, project files, and working libraries.

- Manage multiple projects simultaneously and meet tight deadlines.

- Export and deliver videos in various formats, resolutions, and aspect ratios depending on

platform needs.

required).

DaVinci Resolve, or After Effects.

- Strong understanding of pacing, storytelling, rhythm, and audience retention strategies.

- Experience creating platform-optimized content for YouTube, TikTok, Instagram Reels,

and Shorts.

- Ability to maintain consistent branding and visual style across various content types.

- Strong organizational skills with high attention to detail.

- Ability to work in a fast-paced, deadline-driven environment.

title: AI Automation Specialist: $6 to $8 per hour
description:
AI Automation Specialist | Position Type: Part-time | Experience Level: At least 2 Years 



About the Role

Join our expanding organization as an AI & Automation Specialist and become one of the key drivers of our digital transformation journey. In this unique hybrid role, you'll joint our team to architect innovative automation solutions while simultaneously building internal expertise across our team. You're not just implementing technology — you're contributing to empower our entire organization to work smarter.



This is an ideal opportunity for someone who thrives at the intersection of technology and people development, combining hands-on technical implementation with strategic education and organizational change management.



What You'll Do:

Technical Implementation & Optimization

+ Design, implement, and maintain sophisticated automation workflows using industry-leading platforms (Make, Zapier, n8n)

+ Integrate AI solutions strategically across departments to drive measurable productivity gains

+ Build complex, multi-step workflows featuring API integrations and webhooks

+ Continuously troubleshoot, optimize, and enhance existing automation processes

+ Stay ahead of emerging AI technologies and evaluate their applicability to organizational needs



Knowledge Transfer & Education:

+ Develop and deliver customized training programs that enable tea
mbers to confidently use AI tools and automation platforms in their daily roles

+ Create comprehensive, step-by-step documentation and Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs) that empower independence

+ Produce engaging training materials, video tutorials, and resource guides

+ Provide ongoing mentorship and support as the organization scales



Cross-Functional Collaboration:

+ Partner with department leaders to identify automation opportunities and pain points

+ Translate business requirements into technical solutions

+ Champion a culture of innovation and continuous improvement throughout the organization





Required Technical Qualifications

Automation & Integration Expertise:

+ Hands-on proficiency with Make (Integromat), Zapier, and/or n8n (minimum 2+ years of demonstrated experience)

+ Solid understanding of API integrations, webhooks, and data flows

+ Proven ability to design and execute complex, multi-step automation workflows

+ Experience troubleshooting and optimizing existing processes



AI & Emerging Technologies:

+ Working knowledge of generative AI platforms including ChatGPT, Claude AI, Perplexity, and similar tools

+ Understanding of AI capabilities, limitations, and appropriate use cases

+ Familiarity with emerging AI applications relevant to business operations

+ Ability to evaluate and recommend new tools as technology evolves



Project & Information Management:

+ Proficiency with project management and workflow organization tools (Trello or similar platforms)

+ Strong documentation and SOP creation skills

+ Ability to organize and prioritize multiple concurrent projects





Required Soft Skills & Personal Qualities

+ Excellent Communicator: Translates complex technical concepts into clear, accessible language for non-technical audiences

+ Strategic Educator: Passionate about teaching others and genuinely invested in their success

+ Proactive & Ambitious: Takes initiative, identifies improvement opportunities, and continuously raises the bar

+ Adaptable & Flexible: Thrives in fast-paced environments and embraces evolving priorities with a growth mindset

+ Reliable & Results-Oriented: Committed to delivering high-quality work and following through on commitments

+ Collaborative Team Player: Works effectively in small, growing teams while also functioning independently

+ Strong Multitasker: Comfortable managing competing priorities without losing attention to detail





What Success Looks Like



In your first 90 days, you'll:

+ Audit existing processes and identify top automation opportunities

+ Implement 2-3 high-impact automation workflows

+ Deliver initial training to key departments

+ Establish documentation standards and create foundational SOPs



Within 6 months, you should:

+ Have significantly expanded automation across the organization

+ Built a culture where tea
mbers confidently use AI and automation tools

+ Established yourself as the go-to expert for digital transformation initiatives

+ Developed training materials that enable semi-independent learning





Why Join Us?

+ Strategic Impact: Shape how an entire organization adopts and scales AI and automation technologies

+ Growth Trajectory: Join an expanding company where your contributions directly influence company success

+ Innovation Culture: Work with cutting-edge technologies and stay at the forefront of AI implementation

+ Meaningful Work: Make a tangible difference across the entire organization—from individual productivity to strategic operations

+ Development Opportunities: In a growing company, there's significant room for career progression and skill expansion

+ Collaborative Environment: Work with a team that values innovation, continuous learning, and mutual support





What We're Looking For

The ideal candidate is someone who genuinely loves solving problems with automation and AI, stays curious about emerging technologies, and gets energized by helping others succeed. You should be comfortable wearing multiple hats, working independently when needed, and thriving in an environment that rewards initiative and continuous improvement. If you're both a "builder" and a "teacher," this role is for you.



How to Apply

Please submit the following materials:

+ Your Resume – Highlighting relevant automation and AI experience

+ Portfolio or Examples – Specific automation workflows you've built or contributed to (feel free to share links, screenshots, or descriptions). Highlight complexity and impact.

+ Experience Summary – A brief description of:

- Your hands-on experience with Make, Zapier, n8n, or similar platforms

- Examples of AI tools you've implemented or trained others on

- Your approach to teaching technical concepts to non-technical tea
mbers

- What drew you to this type of hybrid technical/educational role



Your Story – In a few sentences, tell us why you're genuinely excited about this opportunity and what you hope to accomplish



About Us

We're a growing organization committed to leveraging AI and automation to work smarter, not just harder. We believe in continuous learning, collaborative problem-solving, and building a culture where technology empowers every tea
mber.

title: Remote Auto Body Dispatcher and Parts Coordinator
description:
Location: Remote (Philippines)



Compensation: $2.00 - $3.00 USD per hour



Job Type: Full-time (40 hours/week)



Schedule: Night Shift (6:00 PM to 2:00 AM Philippine Time)



About Us:

We operate a high-volume automotive group in Canada, consisting of 3 auto body collision shops, 2 mechanic shops, and a rental car fleet. We need a highly organized remote dispatcher to act as the central control tower for our daily shop operations.



The Role:

We are looking for a Remote Auto Body Dispatcher and Parts Coordinator. You will be the central hub connecting our front office to the shop floor. Your main goal is to keep cars moving by matching parts photos to repair estimates, tracking vehicle progress across all 5 locations, managing our rental fleet, and demanding hourly updates from the on-site staff.



Main Responsibilities:



Parts Photo Auditing: When parts arrive at the shop, the team will send you photos. You will cross-check those pictures against the estimates to ensure every single clip, bracket, and panel is accounted for before a car goes into the repair bay.



Live Shop Dispatching: You are responsible for keeping the workflow moving. You will call or message the shop floor every hour on the dot to get status updates on every vehicle in the repair pipeline.



Rental Fleet Enforcement: You will manage the daily log for our rental cars. When a customer returns a rental, it is your job to immediately message the on-site staff and require them to take upload condition photos.



Repair Pipeline Tracking: Update our digital trackers the 
nt a car moves from teardown, to body, to paint, to final delivery. If a car is stuck waiting on a part, you make sure the management team knows about it instantly.



Requirements:



Automotive or Dispatch Experience: You must have a background in auto body repair, fleet management, or fast-paced logistics dispatching.



Aggressive Follow-Up Skills: You are not afraid to double-text or call the shop mechanics to get the hourly updates you need. You do not wait for information to come to you.



High-Level Organization: You can manage multiple spreadsheets, chat windows, and photo folders all at the same time without making mistakes.

title: Video Editor for Meta Ads - Become Part of Our Team!
description:
Hi, I’m Zebbi from E-Factory Group srl.



We are not looking for a video editor who just cuts clips together. We are looking for someone who understands marketing — someone who knows why a clip is used, not just how to place it.



We’re a small but serious Italian team selling a niche health product in the US. We’re 6 guys, 22 to 27 years old, and if we work together, you’ll mostly be working directly with me, the head editor.

Right now we mainly produce VSLs (usually 5–7 minutes, sometimes shorter or longer) and some UGC-style ads. The main goal is conversion on Meta ads.



---



What we need is: 

- strong clip selection, 

- clean editing, 

- subtitles, 

- sound effects, 

- simple transitions when needed, 

- and most importantly someone who is creative but also thoughtful. 

- You need to understand the script and make smart editing choices, not just execute. 

- Some familiarity with AI is also important since we’re integrating it more and more into the workflow.



We work with clear briefs and clear instructions, but this is important: you won’t just assemble clips. You’ll need to think, make decisions, and sometimes find the right footage yourself. 

A lot of material will be in our drive, but not everything.

Workload depends on the period. Right now it’s around 1–2 videos per week, usually around 5 minutes each. When we scale, it can go up to 4–5 videos per week. Payment is per video, paid weekly or monthly depending on what you prefer.

There is real room for growth and stability here for the right person.



---



Step 1 — Please Answer These Questions: 

(IMPORTANT: Start your message with “HAKUNA MATATA” to let me know you've read everything)



1) Which AI tools are you familiar with, and which ones do you currently use or have used in your workflow?

2) What kind of ads have you edited the most: VSLs, UGC, direct response ads, brand ads, or something else?

3) How fast can you usually deliver a 5–7 minute VSL if the brief is clear? We’re looking for a simple edit, but well thought-out and intentional. ()

4) Send 2–3 examples of ads you edited that you think are your strongest work.

Beyond execution, you’ll play a key role in analyzing data, identifying opportunities, and translating insights into actionable strategies that guide our marketing, content, and social media teams. This position bridges technical execution and strategic growth, helping ensure all efforts contribute directly to revenue.

 marketing flows (welcome, abandoned cart, post-purchase, win-back)

title: Operations Manager
description:
Join the Aventus Team!



We are Aventus — a boutique customer experience BPO in Charleston, South Carolina, with over 10 years of providing omnichannel support to 100+ amazing clients and partners in the e-commerce industry.



Check out our website: 



We’re looking for a dynamic and results-driven Operations Manager to ensure the success of assigned campaigns by overseeing daily operations, driving performance, and building strong client relationships. This role is ideal for someone who thrives in a fast-paced environment, balances people development with operational rigor, and brings a strategic lens to campaign management.



What You’ll Be Doing:

As an Operations Manager, you’ll oversee client campaigns, coach and develop team leaders, monitor performance, and collaborate with cross-functional teams to ensure KPIs and SLAs are consistently achieved. You’ll also play a key role in identifying opportunities for growth, innovation, and operational excellence.



Your Core Responsibilities:

**Coach Development

- Equip coaches to meet client SLAs and KPIs

- Provide mentorship and actionable feedback to enhance agent performance

- Foster continuous learning and personalized growth plans for coaches

**Performance Management & KPIs

- Ensure SLA and KPI goals are consistently met or exceeded

- Monitor and drive performance through daily, weekly, and monthly reporting

**Client Relationship Management

- Identify growth opportunities within client accounts, including volume and channel expansion

- Collaborate with the Client Success team to support expansion proposals

- Maintain strong, trusted client relationships to exceed expectations

**Process Improvement & Innovation

- Identify and implement process improvements based on data and best practices

- Enhance service quality and efficiency through continuous improvement initiatives

**Operational Compliance & Risk Management

- Ensure compliance with client protocols, industry regulations, internal policies, and PCI requirements

**Technology & Tools Optimization

- Partner with IT and Product teams to optimize CRM, ticketing, QA, and e-commerce platforms (e.g., Shopify, Gorgias)

**Cross-Functional Leadership

- Lead initiatives with QA, Training, Workforce, and HR to support business continuity, certification, and scaling



What You’ll Bring to the Table

- 3–5+ years’ experience in operations management, preferably in BPO, customer experience, or e-commerce support

- Proven success in meeting and exceeding SLAs, KPIs, and client expectations

- Strong leadership skills with experience in coaching and developing managers/coaches

- Excellent client-facing communication and relationship management skills

- Data-driven mindset with the ability to translate insights into strategy and action

- Familiarity with CRM, CX, and e-commerce platforms (e.g., Gorgias, Shopify)



Core Competencies

- Customer Centricity: Advocates for the customer while balancing efficiency

- Strategic Thinking: Aligns team goals with broader business objectives

- Results Orientation: Focused on achieving measurable outcomes (CSAT, AHT, FCR, conversion rates)

- Team Empowerment: Builds a coaching culture of accountability, feedback, and growth



What’s In It For You?

- 100% Remote Work – Work from anywhere in the Philippines

- Career Development – Grow your leadership and operational expertise in a scaling organization

- Competitive Compensation – $11/hr + bonuses + benefits as an independent contractor

- Inclusive Culture – Join a team that values transparency, balance, and kindness

- Purposeful Work – Lead meaningful initiatives that impact clients and their customers every day



Ready to Drive Operational Success?

If you’re a strategic leader who thrives on building teams, exceeding client expectations, and driving operational excellence, we’d love to meet you!

title: Onboarding Specialist (Accounting Systems)
description:
About Accountally

Accountally is a growing US-based bookkeeping and accounting firm that partners with small and mid-sized businesses to keep their finances clean, organized, and stress-free. We're a remote-first team built on strong systems, clear communication, and a high standard for clean work.



About the Role

The Onboarding Specialist plays a critical role in preparing new client accounts before they transition to the bookkeeping team.



Every client that joins Accountally requires their accounting systems to be reviewed, connected, cleaned, and configured before ongoing bookkeeping work begins. This role owns that process from start to finish.



You will evaluate incoming accounting files, connect financial systems, identify bookkeeping issues, perform cleanup work within scope, and deliver a fully prepared accounting file to the assigned bookkeeping team.



This position requires strong technical accounting knowledge, exceptional organization, and the ability to independently diagnose and resolve issues in messy or incomplete accounting files.



Success in this role means consistently delivering clean, properly configured client files with clear documentation, enabling the bookkeeping team to immediately begin accurate month-to-month financial work.



Core Responsibilities

**Client Onboarding & System Setup

- Configure and provision client accounting environments before cleanup begins.

- Establish accountant access and user permissions across accounting platforms.

- Connect bank feeds, credit cards, and financial data sources.

- Integrate third-party platforms such as Amazon, Shopify, payroll systems, and financial applications.

- Configure the client file within internal workflow and practice management systems.

- Ensure all financial integrations are properly connected and functioning before proceeding with cleanup.



**Accounting File Review & Diagnosis

- Evaluate the current condition of incoming client accounting files.

- Identify key issues, including miscoded transactions, unreconciled accounts, incomplete records, broken chart of accounts structures, or historical backlogs.

- Assess cleanup complexity and communicate findings to the internal team.

- Document observations clearly and flag potential risks or scope concerns before beginning remediation work.



**Cleanup & Accounting Configuration

- Perform accounting cleanup work within the defined project scope.

- Reclassify and recode transactions to correct accounts.

- Reconcile bank, credit card, and balance sheet accounts.

- Restructure or standardize the client’s chart of accounts to align with internal standards.

- Clear historical backlogs and prepare books for ongoing monthly close processes.

- Configure accounting platform settings and integrations to support long-term bookkeeping workflows.



**Documentation & Handoff

- Deliver a clean, fully prepared accounting file to the assigned bookkeeping team.

- Provide detailed documentation outlining:

- Issues identified during diagnosis

- Cleanup work performed

- Structural changes made

- Outstanding items requiring future monitoring

- Ensure the receiving bookkeeper has full clarity on the client’s accounting setup and any potential risks or complexities.



Qualifications

- 3+ years of bookkeeping or accounting experience, preferably supporting multiple clients.

- Advanced proficiency in QuickBooks Online, including:

* Chart of accounts structure

* Reconciliations

* Journal entries

* Platform configuration

- Experience performing accounting cleanups or file migrations.

- Familiarity with e-commerce accounting environments and integrations.

- Strong organizational skills and ability to manage multiple onboarding projects simultaneously.

- Excellent written communication and documentation skills.

- Ability to work independently and diagnose accounting issues with minimal supervision.

- Experience provisioning and managing access across accounting platforms, financial institutions, payroll systems, and integrations.



Nice to Have

- Experience working with Xero or other accounting platforms

- Familiarity with practice management tools such as Double HQ, Karbon, or similar systems

- Previous experience at a bookkeeping firm or BPO supporting U.S. clients

- Exposure to multi-entity accounting environments or inventory-heavy businesses

- Experience working with Amazon, Shopify, A2X, or similar e-commerce integrations



Why Join Accountally?

- $13/hr USD, consistent and reliable pay

- Fully remote, long-term role

- Work with a growing U.S. accounting firm serving ambitious SMB clients

- Structured systems and processes designed for efficiency

- Opportunity to grow into more senior accounting or operational roles as the firm scales

- Collaborative team focused on quality, ownership, and continuous improvement

title: Video Editor for Social Media Ads and Organic Content
description:
We’re looking for a video editor who understands how to create strong short-form content for social media and online selling.



This role is focused on editing content for product marketing, brand awareness, and platform growth. You should be comfortable producing videos that are clean, fast-paced, and suited for today’s social media style.



What you’ll handle



Edit short videos for TikTok, Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts, and

Turn raw clips, product footage, and concepts into polished content

Add captions, cuts, transitions, pacing, and visual elements where needed

Help create promotional and conversion-focused content for ecommerce products

Work with our team to improve content quality over time



What we want



Strong video editing ability, especially for short-form content

Must fully master CapCut and Google Veo 3

Experience with CapCut or similar editing software

Good sense of social media pacing and current content style

Attention to detail and ability to follow direction

Reliable communication and consistent delivery

Graphic design sense is a plus



How to apply

Send:

"Video Pro"

one direct portfolio link

to your best short-form video work



Accepted platforms:

TikTok, YouTube, Instagram,
, Canva, or Behance



Please do not send Google Drive, Dropbox, or other file-sharing links.



About us

We are an ecommerce business selling through marketplaces such as Shopee, Lazada, eBay, and our own website. We are building for long-term growth and want someone who is serious about improving, contributing, and growing with the company.



Compensation can be reviewed after 12 months based on performance, consistency, and overall contribution.

title: Growth Product Engineer (React Native) - Full Stack Developer - Game Developer - Growth Product Engineer - Design, Gamep
description:
Do you love escape rooms, puzzles, and scavenger hunts? We are looking for a visionary builder to bring the thrill of real-world adventure to the palm of a user’s hand. At Let’s Roam, we don’t just fix bugs—we build worlds. We need a "Vision-to-Reality" engineer who can take a vague vibe (e.g., "Make this Ghost Tour more thrilling") and translate it into concrete, testable UI improvements by sunset.



The Mission

As our Growth Product Engineer, you will prototype, design, and develop app and website improvements that turn standard interfaces into intuitive, engaging adventures. You are the bridge between "high-level vision" and "working code," leveraging AI-augmented workflows to build at a velocity that traditional engineers can’t touch.

The Role & Responsibilities

1. Visionary Product Engineering

Design-First Execution: Use your intuition to build "punchy" and "sexy" flows. You don’t need a 20-page PRD to know what feels like a world-class game.

End-to-End Ownership: Design user flows in Figma and bring them to life in React Native and PHP (Codeigniter).

Gameplay Innovation: Create and refine new game mechanics that drive long-term engagement and make the app feel alive.

2. High-Velocity A/B Testing & Optimization

The Loop: Proactively identify at least 3 "leaking" points in our conversion funnels per month and implement autonomous fixes.

Weekly Cadence: Research, design, and launch A/B tests across the app and web to optimize conversion and user retention.

Data-Driven Iteration: Analyze test results and iterate immediately. You understand conversion psychology and how to design for specific customer personas.

3. Strategic Building & AI Mastery

AI-Augmented Dev: Leverage Cursor, Claude, and Codex to "self-heal" code, refactor directories, and prototype complex features 7x faster than a standard dev process.

Sprint to Success: Take a feature from "whiteboard" to "live" within a single sprint.

Stability: Proactively identify UX pain points and squash bugs to ensure a seamless adventure for our users.



Key Competencies & Requirements

Experience: 2+ years as a Product Engineer or Web Developer with a strong portfolio of past work.

Design Mastery: Ability to create stunning, logical user interfaces in Figma from scratch.

The "Visionary" Filter: The ability to translate abstract goals into concrete, testable UI/UX improvements.

AI Expert: You are a power user of AI code generation and prompt engineering. You use AI to multiply your output, not just as a spell-checker.

Tech Stack: Proficiency in React Native, PHP (Codeigniter), and Figma.

Gamification Mindset: A deep understanding of what makes games fun and the ability to apply those mechanics to a mobile app environment.



Success Metrics (Key Outcomes)

Speed to Market: Transitioning features from idea to implementation in record time using AI workflows.

Creative Delta: Measuring success by how much "fun" and "surprise" you add to a standard feature.

Growth: Increasing weekly active users through superior design and addictive game mechanics.

Conversion: Continuous improvement of funnel metrics through high-leverage A/B testing.



We need you to submit your application here:
