title: Graphic Design Expert
description:
We are a growing e-commerce gifting company selling on Amazon, Etsy, and our own Shopify website.

We are looking for a Graphic Designer to join our sales department.

We frequently launch new listings and seasonal pages (for example Mother’s Day collections or new product categories) and need someone who can think strategically about what type of images, content, and visual storytelling will drive conversions.

This role goes beyond graphic design — we are looking for someone who can identify opportunities, develop creative concepts, and guide the visual strategy behind our listings.



Requirements

Minimum 3 years of experience in a creative role

Experience with AI software/tools, content creation for listings for Amazon and Social Media

Video making abilities with knowledge of product rendering

Strong understanding of visual storytelling and conversion-driven content

Experience developing creative concepts, not just designing graphics



Portfolio Requirement

Please share relevant past work.

We are not looking for simple graphics. Show us a problem you identified and the creative solution you developed.



Job Details

Schedule: Sunday – Friday

9:00 AM – 6:00 PM EST (1-hour break)



Compensation

$750– $1000 USD per month depending on experience.

title: Creative Coffee Experience & Ideas Specialist
description:
Mile Café is a growing specialty coffee brand in Dubai focused on experience, design, and creativity.





Website: milecafe.ae



What We Need



The coffee industry is full of trends.

We need someone smart who can spot the best ideas from coffee shops around the world and apply them in Mile Café.



Your role is to:



Bring new ideas

Improve drinks, cups, packaging, and overall experience

Think from the customer’s perspective

Most importantly: know how to apply ideas, not just suggest them

What You Get

Strong incentives for people who add real value

Opportunity to grow into a long-term role

Application (Important)



To apply, please send:



1. Your Experience (with proof)

Real work, projects, or examples related to creativity or the coffee industry

2. 3 Ideas for Mile Café (PDF Required)



Based on our brand:



Provide 3 ideas or trends you would apply, and for each include:



The idea

Why it works

How to apply it in our shop



Important:



Submit this part as a PDF

Do not make it general — be specific

Make sure the ideas add real value and are things customers will actually like

3. What You Would Improve

Based on your experience, what would you help us improve or focus on first

Important

No general or AI-generated answers

We are looking for real thinking and real execution



If you understand that coffee is an experience, and you know how to take the best ideas and apply them — apply.

title: Marketing Coordinator
description:
Agency Overview

Hughes Media is a growing independent, full-service digital marketing agency based in Atlanta, GA. We provide best-in-class marketing and creative execution. We’re passionate about our clients and our growing team, and we are looking for a dynamic Marketing Coordinator to help drive our continued growth.



The Role

The Marketing Coordinator collaborates with the Account Service team and agency partners on the development and execution of all marketing campaigns. The ideal candidate thrives in a high-energy, fast-paced environment, possesses exceptional organizational skills, and brings a proactive, "can-do" attitude to every project.



Key Responsibilities

Project Leadership

Campaign Support: Assist the team in daily deliverables, activities, budgets, and deadlines for creative campaigns and individual client projects.

Project Lifecycle: Coordinate or participate in any phase of the project cycle—including planning, design, development, testing, implementation, and closure.

Efficiency: Ensure orderly and timely completion of work, adhering to all agency processes and procedures.

Documentation: Facilitate all administrative duties including weekly status reports, project documentation, and internal job management (including conference reports within 24 hours of meetings).

Meeting Execution: Coordinate and execute internal, partner, and client meetings (e.g., Creative kickoffs, brand immersions, and project post-mortems).

Accountability: Manage small projects as assigned and maintain accurate daily timesheets.

Marketing & Client Relations

Brand Growth: Strengthen client relationships by gaining a deep understanding of their industry, products, and competition.

Industry Trends: Maintain a base understanding of advertising, digital, and media trends to present business-building ideas.

Performance Tracking: Support the team with metrics and program performance measures to evaluate effectiveness and inform future initiatives.



Skills & Abilities

Education: Bachelor’s degree (BA/BS) from a four-year college or university (preferably in Marketing, Advertising, or a related field).

Communication: Ability to communicate clearly and concisely, both verbally and in writing.

Work Ethic: Results-oriented, self-motivated, and able to balance multiple priorities with strict attention to detail.

Collaboration: Ability to work both independently and as a vital part of a team.

Technical: Proficiency in Excel, PowerPoint, and Word is required.

Experience Requirements

Functional Expertise: 4-5 years within an Agency or in-house Marketing environment (combined part-time and full-time experience is accepted).

Project Management: 4-3 years of experience coordinating marketing workflows and timelines.



How to Apply

If you have the energy and expertise to join a fast-growing agency, please send your resume to

title: Executive Assistant
description:
Attention, Rockstars! We’re looking for a full-time Executive Assistant. This role provides high-level administrative support to the CEO, ensuring the smooth operation of daily activities. This role involves managing schedules, coordinating meetings, handling communications, and performing a wide range of administrative tasks to support executives in their strategic responsibilities. The Executive Assistant acts as a key point of contact and is responsible for maintaining confidentiality, ensuring efficient workflow, and managing critical tasks with professionalism and discretion.



Responsibilities:

Manage the executive’s calendar, scheduling meetings, appointments, and travel arrangements, and ensuring that time is allocated efficiently.

Act as the primary point of contact for internal and external communications, screening calls,
s, and visitors, and directing inquiries as appropriate.

Coordinate meetings, conferences, and events, including preparing agendas, arranging logistics, and ensuring all materials are available.

Prepare and edit correspondence, reports, presentations, and other documents on behalf of the executive.

Handle confidential information with the utmost discretion and ensure sensitive documents are securely maintained.

Assist with special projects, conducting research, gathering data, and preparing reports as required by the executive.

Liaise with other departments and executives to ensure smooth communication and collaboration on cross-functional initiatives.

Anticipate the executive's needs and provide support to ensure they are well-prepared for meetings, presentations, and other engagements.



Qualifications/Requirements:

Proven experience (1-2 years) as an Executive Assistant, Personal Assistant, or in a similar role supporting senior executives.

Exceptional organizational skills with the ability to prioritize tasks, manage multiple responsibilities, and meet deadlines.

Excellent written and verbal communication skills, with a professional and polished demeanor.

Strong attention to detail and accuracy in completing tasks.

High level of discretion and confidentiality when handling sensitive information.

Proficiency in GSuite (Doc, Sheet, Slides, Drive) and Zoom Workspace and familiarity with office management tools and software.

Ability to work independently and proactively, with a strong sense of initiative.

Strong interpersonal skills, with the ability to work effectively with executives, staff, and external contacts.



Our Purpose:

To develop and market products that help individuals to grow in multiple facets in life.

To Increase awareness and skill sets for the public we serve.

To make a significant difference in the quality of life of people not reaching their potential and those often left behind.

To produce and develop Millionaire closers.



By applying, you will show that you are committed to being a SUCCESS, and your success is important to us. I believe in supporting our clients and helping associates achieve their financial goals.



The position is Full-Time (remote) between the hours of 8:00AM - 5:00PM Pacific Standard Time, Monday through Friday.



About Mike Barron & Limelight Media LLC:

My name is Mike Barron and I am the founder of Limelight Media, a leading online coaching and sales training academy. Many of our students are seeking career change and or looking to acquire high-ticket skill sets so as to achieve career advancement and financial freedom. We are leaders in the online coaching industry and have receipts of multiple “Two Comma Club” Awards.



I'm really active on social media (Check out my IG and 
 and "influence" is a cornerstone of our operation. We create daily content, record coaching calls, case studies, short films, etc... The culture is fast-paced, raw, and fun... I was a former school President in my last job in 2013, and let's just say I'm Far (far) removed from that corporate-type environment. You can learn more about our community here: 
/watch?v=LdqINft4osw&t=75s.





A CULTURE LIKE NO OTHER!

Limelight Media has a culture like no other! Our mission is to spread positivity and create an uplifting environment for all of our employees. We offer a Disneyland-like experience for everyone we engage with - employees, students, business partners and anyone else we come into contact with. At our facility you will find a fun atmosphere that consists of energetic employees, arcade games, basketball hoops, food and drinks, 85 inch TVs and more! Come be a part of something great!!!



Limelight Media offers many packages that teach personal awareness, sales techniques, skills to become a master closer, and how to become the best version of yourself!



Limelight Media LLC is an equal opportunity employer. All aspects of employment including the decision to hire, promote, discipline, or discharge, will be based on merit, competence, performance, and business needs. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, color, religion, marital status, age, national origin, ancestry, physical or mental disability, medical condition, pregnancy, genetic information, gender, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, veteran status, or any other status protected under federal, state, or local law.

title: Social Media, SEO/GAIO, Email Marketing & Website Manager
description:
HEG is a trade-oriented sales and installation company based in Tasmania, Australia, a cool temperate climate zone. We have 8 different product categories (solar, batteries, heat pump hot water, reverse cycle air conditioning, insulation, thermal window coverings, etc) and 20 staff, including 5 tea
mbers that work remotely (2 off-shore in Philippines).



Our cloud-based systems are:

* Simpro Enterprise: ERP / job management (leads -> Quotes -> Jobs -> Invoices + catalogues)

* Podium: voip, chat, reviews, AI chatbot

* Xero: accounting

* Google Business Suite: office docs and collaborative inboxes

*
: 

* Google Business Profiles: 

* Wordpress: 

* Mailchimp:
 campaign management

* DelightAI: AI module for custom communications with customers.

* Canva: social media graphics and web

* X/Instagram 



Our goal is to achieve top of mind awareness for consumers by displaying our expertise with residential thermal efficiency, renewable energy and energy storage in our target markets. Our desired outcome is to reach new customers and have existing customers being awareness of our full range of products/services, ultimately generating a steady flow of sales leads.



What We Need

We currently have a disjointed approach to our social media, often limited due to poor time resources due to continued business growth.  We need someone with multi-disciplinary skills that can schedule and coordinate cohesive social media and online advertising campaigns to become number one in our chosen fields, including:

* improve our organic search engine ranking / SEO

* optimise HEG for Answer Engine Optimisation (AEO)

* improve Generative AI Optimisation (GAIO)

* update our website as required, including landing pages, etc

* collate social media post material from a variety of sources

* coordinate with HEG tea
mbers for necessary content e.g. videos

* develop a social media marketing plan in consultation with HEG management.

* Schedule social media posts

* Generate and coordinate seasonal Google/Facebook Ads



What now?

If you feel you are confident and competent with these tasks, please send an introductory
 outlining your experiences, skills and/or qualifications. We look forward to hearing from you. We may be conducting in-person interviews for short-listed candidates in Philippines (Manila).

title: Simpro Administration and Accounts Officer for Australian Trade Company
description:
HEG, or Home Efficiency Group, is an Australian rooftop solar, home battery and HVAC sales & installation company that focuses on the Tasmanian residential market. Simpro Enterprise underpins our operations, as well as Xero for accounting, Google Business Suite for office management, Podium for VOIP/chat/text communications and Wordpress for web.



We are experiencing solid growth, which is putting strain on our scheduling and accounts team. Depending on the skills, aptitude and experience that the applicant possesses, these are the main tasks of the position:



1. Assist current scheduling tea
mbers with general solar and battery administration, including liaising with sub-contractors, sales consultants, end customers and energy utility representatives.

2. Assist the Finance and Accounts Manager with AR/AP invoice entry and quality checks to ensure accuracy.

3. Lead entry of customer details, and initial "touch base"
s and text.

4. Updating of Simpro catalogue items and pre-builds when special pricing arises. (Mostly catalogues are automatically imported from our key suppliers.)



Whilst formal bookkeeping qualifications aren't required, they would be highly regarded, but significant exposure to AR/AP is requested.



Are you IT Savvy? AI Automation = bonus!

We have a strong emphasis on automation of repetitive tasks, where possible, to ensure accuracy and to allow tea
mbers to focus on customer-oriented interactions. This may include customer reminders and alerts, for example, or entry of leads, invoices etc automatically. A candidate with AI Automation exposure and IT/software literacy to allow automation of processes would be of value.



About HEG

20 staff, including 2 existing offshore tea
mbers and 3 others that work remotely from home. Based in Tasmania, Australia, established in 2009, flexible working hours with daytime ph hours available. We have 8 different product categories that we sell/install, including reverse cycle air conditioning, ceiling/underfloor insulation, solar, batteries, heat pump hot water and a newly-introduced thermal window furnishings division. Temperatures in Tasmania are cold/temperate, so the emphasis  is on heating down here.



To Apply

Please
 a covering letter or
 to us outlining your skill sets and experiences that outline why you think you'd be suitable for this position, and outline additional skills that you have that may contribute to the company. We really look forward to hearing from you.

title: Female Homecare Scheduler / Coordinator (US)
description:
JOB SUMMARY:

We are looking for a dependable and detail-oriented Homecare Scheduler/Coordinator to manage caregiver and client schedules for our US-based homecare operations. This role plays a key part in ensuring accurate scheduling, timely communication, and high-quality service delivery while maintaining confidentiality and compliance.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES:

Create, manage, and update schedules for caregivers/home health aides (HHA)

Coordinate client schedules based on care plans and staff availability

Communicate daily schedule changes with caregivers, clients, and healthcare personnel

Maintain accurate staff and client records in scheduling and database systems

Track and update compliance requirements (e.g., TB, CQA, admissions, discharges)

Prepare and maintain scheduling reports and statistics

Ensure scheduling systems are accurate and up to date

Escalate scheduling conflicts to the Team Manager

Build professional relationships with clients to ensure excellent service delivery

Perform general administrative and office support tasks as needed

Maintain strict confidentiality of patient and staff information



WORK SCHEDULE/SHIFT AVAILABILITY:

Must be open to potential on-call shifts as operational needs evolve



QUALIFICATIONS (Preferred):

2 years of previous experience in healthcare or homecare scheduling is a plus

Strong organizational, time-management, and communication skills

High attention to detail and accuracy

Ability to manage frequent schedule changes

Familiarity with healthcare databases and compliance requirements

WellSky CRM Experience is a plus



APPLICATION INSTRUCTIONS (Important):

Attach your updated resume

Subject line must be formatted exactly as: Last Name, First Name – Homecare Scheduler

Only 10 application points will be accepted

Applications that do not follow these instructions will be disregarded

title: Media Buyer – Paid Ads (YouTube & Facebook/Meta)
description:
Job Description



Media Buyer – Paid Ads (YouTube &
/Meta)



About 



We are one of the world’s leading companies in chatbot and AI marketing, helping businesses automate lead generation, sales, and engagement using ManyChat combined with advanced artificial intelligence. Recognized as a 4x Inc. 5000 fastest-growing company, we are a small, high-performance, tight-knit team filled with top talent (including several skilled teammates from the Philippines).



We are rapidly scaling toward $1M+ per month in ad spend, and we need a rockstar media buyer to help drive that growth.



This role is not just about running campaigns, you will directly advise clients, see real results every day, collaborate on creative strategy, and help shape our internal growth. If you love paid advertising, strategy, and helping businesses grow, this is an ideal place for you. 



Do you live and breathe Paid Ads? This role is for you if you:

- Have experience managing and scaling YouTube and
/Meta (Instagram) ad campaigns, with at least $1,000,000 in total ad spend

- Understand the “why” behind every campaign decision, not just task execution

- Have advanced English (written and spoken), required for leading client meetings via Zoom

- Are proactive, resourceful, fast-moving, and accountable

- Are tech-savvy, organized, positive, and a strong team player with high integrity

- Are reliable, adaptable, and committed to long-term growth



Required Qualifications:

- Proven experience running paid ads (YouTube and
/Meta) with real, measurable results

- Advanced English (written and spoken)

- Fast and reliable internet connection + backup connection

- Functional computer/laptop

- Webcam for Zoo
etings

- Availability to use time-tracking software with activity screenshots



What You Will Do Day-to-Day:

- Manage, optimize, and scale YouTube and
/Meta campaigns for clients across various industries

- Analyze data, troubleshoot underperforming ads, and identify opportunities to improve ROI

- Work directly with clients: define strategies, educate on best practices, and ensure performance results

- Collaborate with our design and video team to create high-converting ads

- Contribute strategic insights to improve our marketing and internal systems



What We Offer:

- Competitive starting salary: USD $1,000–$2,500/month (negotiable for the right candidate)

- Performance-based bonuses and growth opportunities

- Advanced training and mentorship with top experts in AI/chatbot marketing

- A collaborative, family-like team culture where we support each other

- Paid time off, clear expectations, and long-term stability

- Opportunity to grow with a cutting-edge company in AI and automation



Extra Credit (to stand out and get priority review):

Record a 1–3 minute video introducing yourself:

- Your experience with ad spend and your biggest achievements

- Why you are passionate about paid ads and helping businesses grow



How to Apply (for fast consideration):

- Send your CV + portfolio/case studies to: 

- Complete our Culture Index survey (5–8 minutes, fun, not a test):



- Include a short written paragraph (no AI—be authentic) explaining why you are the ideal candidate

- Bonus: Attach or link your introduction video

title: Hiring for History YouTube Channel - 2D artist & Animator
description:
I run a YouTube channel, Journey Through History, focused on cinematic storytelling about world history, mythology, and ancient civilization. With a revamp of the channel, I am aiming to be similar in style to channels like Para Bellum, Kings and Generals, and Epic History.



Due to time constraints, I’m no longer able to manage the full production process myself, but I remain deeply passionate about the channel and its long-term vision. I’m looking for a 2D Artist who can also support animation, helping create original visuals that elevate the channel beyond stock content.



Role Overview

You will create historical illustrations and animated sequences to support storytelling.



Responsibilities



Illustrate:

Historical figures and scenes

Ancient cities and environments

Mythological or cultural moments



Animate:

Simple scene movement

Character or environmental animation

Maintain a consistent visual style



Deliverables

Individual illustrations and/or short animated clips

title: Schedule Manager for Nursing homes (Central Scheduler) healthcare
description:
Schedule Manager for Nursing homes (Central Scheduler) healthcare  

Full-Time | Remote | US-Based Healthcare Company 

 

Submission of a CV/resume is required to be considered for this position. Applications without a resume will not be considered



Experience Required: Long-Term Care / Nursing Home background preferred 5+ years 



About the Role

We’re seeking a proactive and people-focused Central Scheduler to join our healthcare support team. This role is more than just managing spreadsheets — it’s about building strong relationships with staff, encouraging them to take shifts, and ensuring our partner facilities in the U.S. are fully staffed. If you have excellent communication skills, enjoy connecting with people, and can thrive in a fast-paced environment, this role is for you.

Key Responsibilities

Coordinate and manage daily shift schedules across multiple U.S. healthcare facilities.

Actively engage with nurses and clinical staff to encourage and secure shift coverage.

Build strong relationships with staff to understand their availability and preferences.

Handle last-minute scheduling changes with urgency, empathy, and professionalism.

Communicate directly with facility managers to resolve conflicts and maintain compliance.

Keep schedules accurate and up to date to prevent staffing shortages or overlaps.

Answer calls and messages promptly, offering reliable support to staff and facilities.

Use Microsoft Excel and scheduling software to track shifts and maintain records.

 Must-Have Skills & Experience:

1+ year of experience in a call center, scheduling, or workforce management role.

Excellent communication skills — strong English (verbal and written) is essential.

Ability to build rapport quickly and encourage staff to commit to shifts.

Strong organizational skills and attention to detail.

Ability to stay calm and professional in high-pressure or last-minute situations.

Reliable internet connection and dedicated workspace at home.

Nice to Have (but not required):

Previous healthcare scheduling or staffing experience.

Familiarity with U.S. time zones and shift patterns.

Experience working with nursing home or long-term care environments.

Why You’ll Love This Role

Fully remote — enjoy the convenience of working from home.

Meaningful impact — play a key role in ensuring patients receive uninterrupted care.

Supportive culture — work with a collaborative team that values your contribution.

Growth opportunities — develop your skills and advance in healthcare support.

Equal Opportunity Employer We are an Equal Opportunity Employer and welcome applicants from all backgrounds. We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive workplace.

title: Lead Generation Specialist
description:
Role Purpose



The purpose of this role is to generate inbound leads for the company’s digital products by setting up and operating external digital marketing channels that drive potential customers to the company website.



This role focuses on lead generation only.

The employee is not responsible for converting leads into customers.



All sales conversations, closing, and client conversion are handled by the seller.



Core Responsibilities

1. Marketing Platform Setup



Create and configure all external marketing accounts required to generate inbound leads.



Platforms to set up include:



Google Ads

Meta Ads Manager

Google Business Profile



Tasks include:



Creating business accounts

Configuring account settings

Linking accounts to the company website

Uploading business information

Connecting payment methods if required



Ensuring and managing accounts are ready for campaign execution



Goal:

Establish fully operational marketing channels capable of sending inbound traffic and leads.



2. Paid Advertising Campaign Execution



Launch and manage advertising campaigns that drive traffic to the company website.



Platforms used:



Google Ads

Meta Ads Manager

LinkedIn



Tasks include:



Creating advertising campaigns

Uploading ad creatives

Entering targeting settings

Setting budgets and schedules

Launching campaigns

Monitoring campaign status

Campaign strategy and optimization will be provided by the owner.



Goal:

Drive qualified visitors who may become inbound leads.



3. Freelance Marketplace Lead Channels



Create and manage marketplace accounts that generate inbound inquiries from buyers searching for website services.



Platforms include:



Fiverr

Upwork



Responsibilities include:



Creating seller accounts

Publishing service listings

Uploading portfolio examples

Updating gig descriptions

Responding to written inquiries

Maintaining platform account health



Goal:

Generate inbound leads and project inquiries from marketplace buyers.



4. Business Directory Presence



Create and maintain business listings to allow customers to discover the service through search.



Primary platform:



Google Business Profile



Tasks include:



Creating and verifying the listing

Uploading service information

Adding portfolio images

Updating business details

Maintaining profile accuracy



Goal:

Allow businesses searching online to discover and contact the company.



5. Lead & Data Collection



Record marketing and lead information so the owner can analyze performance.



Tool used:



Google or Excel Sheets

Apollo AI

Any other tool



Tasks include recording:



campaign names

advertising spend

number of inquiries

lead source

lead date



The employee does not analyze the data.

The owner reviews the information and provides further instructions.



Performance Objective



The success of this role is measured by:



The number of inbound leads generated for the sales team.

Conversion of those leads into paying customers is handled by the seller, not the digital marketing operator.



Required Skills



Basic knowledge of:



Online advertising platforms

Creating marketing accounts

AI tools for lead generation

Entering campaign settings

Managing marketplace listings

Spreadsheet data entry

Written communication



No speaking is required.



IF YOU CAN PERFORM AT LEAST  3 OF THE CORE DUTIES, PLEASE APPLY. 

Don't be discouraged not to apply. 



???? Bonuses are available, and ?? travel expenses are fully covered by the company.
